#Figure1
#FigureS1
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ComplexUpset)

disease2_colors <- c(
  "TFH" = "darkblue",
  "PTCLNOS" = "#ff7f0e",
  "MFLCT" = "darkgreen",
  "Others" = "gray",
  "SS" = "#d62728",
  "ATLL" = "cyan",
  "MEITL" = "purple",
  "ALKnegALCL" = "yellow",
  "ENKTL" = "#e377c2",
  "PCGDTCL" = "black",
  "ALKposALCL" = "lightgreen",
  "TFHDLBCL" = "darkblue",
  "EATL" = "lightblue"
)

disease_colors_upset <- c(
  "TFH" = "darkblue",
  "PTCLNOS" = "#ff7f0e",
  "MFLCT" = "darkgreen",
  "Others" = "gray",
  "SS" = "#d62728",
  "ATLL" = "cyan",
  "MEITL" = "purple",
  "ALKnegALCL" = "yellow",
  "ENKTL" = "#e377c2",
  "PCGDTCL" = "black",
  "ALKposALCL" = "lightgreen",
  "CompositeTCLBCL" = "darkblue",
  "EATL" = "lightblue",
  "HTLV1Carriers" = "gray"
)

#Clininfo_AF_combined <- read.delim("0000TableS1.txt")
#upsetdata <- read.delim("0000TableS2v4.txt")
data <- upsetdata %>% 
  filter(Included==1)
binary_cols <- c("Tumor.genotype", "EOTcfDNA", "Pretreatment.cfDNA", "Interim.cfDNA","Cohort", "HTLV1Carriers")
data_selected <- data[,c(binary_cols,"Disease")]
data_selected$Disease <- factor(data_selected$Disease)

data_selected$Disease <- factor(
  data_selected$Disease,
  levels = names(disease_colors_upset)
)

intersections_order <- list(
  c("Pretreatment.cfDNA"),
  c("Pretreatment.cfDNA","Tumor.genotype"),
  c("Interim.cfDNA"),
  c("Interim.cfDNA","Tumor.genotype"),
  c("EOTcfDNA"),
  c("EOTcfDNA", "Tumor.genotype"),
  c("HTLV1Carriers")
)

set_cols <- c(
  "HTLV1Carriers",
  "Tumor.genotype",
  "EOTcfDNA",
  "Interim.cfDNA",
  "Pretreatment.cfDNA"
)

Upset_plot <- upset(
  data_selected,
  intersect      = set_cols,
  intersections  = intersections_order,
  name           = "Samples",
  min_size       = 1,
  sort_sets      = FALSE, # when you manually sort
  sort_intersections = FALSE, # when you manually sort
  width_ratio    = 0.25,
  base_annotations = list(
    "Intersection size" = (
      intersection_size(
        counts = TRUE,
        mapping = aes(fill = Disease),
        text   = list(size = 10 / .pt)
      ) +
        scale_fill_manual(
          values = disease_colors_upset,
          breaks = names(disease_colors_upset),
          drop = FALSE
        ) +
        guides(fill = guide_legend(title = "Disease"))
    )
  )
) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
    legend.key.size = unit(5, "mm"),
    legend.box = "horizontal",
    legend.spacing.x = unit(2, "mm"),
    legend.box.just = "center"
  )

Clininfo_AF_combined$Diseasex <- gsub("ATLLacutetype|ATLLlymphoma","ATLL",Clininfo_AF_combined$Disease)
Clininfo_AF_combined$Diseasex <- gsub("Others","Unknown",Clininfo_AF_combined$Diseasex)
pie_data <- Clininfo_AF_combined %>%
  dplyr::count(Diseasex) %>%
  mutate(perc = n / sum(n) * 100,
         label = paste0(Diseasex, "\n", sprintf("%.1f%%", perc)))

disease3_colors <- c(
  "TFH" = "darkblue",
  "PTCLNOS" = "#ff7f0e",
  "MFLCT" = "darkgreen",
  "TFHDLBCL" = "darkblue",
  "Unknown" = "gray",
  "SS" = "#d62728",
  "ATLL" = "cyan",
  "MEITL" = "purple",
  "EATL" = "lightblue",
  "ALKnegALCL" = "yellow",
  "ENKTL" = "#e377c2",
  "PCGDTCL" = "black",
  "ALKposALCL" = "lightgreen"
)

pie_data <- Clininfo_AF_combined %>%
  dplyr::count(Diseasex) %>%
  arrange(desc(n)) %>%
  mutate(
    Diseasex = factor(Diseasex, levels = Diseasex),
    perc = n / sum(n) * 100,
    label = paste0(Diseasex, "\n", n, " (", sprintf("%.1f%%", perc), ")")
  )

PieDisease <- ggplot(pie_data, aes(x = "", y = perc, fill = Diseasex)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 1, color = "white") +
  coord_polar(theta = "y") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = disease2_colors, drop = FALSE) +
  theme_void(base_size = 14) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), size = 3) +
  ggtitle("Distribution of Disease Categories") +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",        # legend in bottom
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.key.size = unit(6, "mm"),
    legend.box = "horizontal",         # horizontal
    legend.spacing.x = unit(3, "mm"),
    legend.justification = "center",
    legend.box.just = "center"
  ) +
  guides(
    fill = guide_legend(nrow = 2) #legend in 3 rows
  )

#data2 <- read.csv("Upset_cohort.csv")

set_cols <- c(
  #"Tumor",
  "EOT",
  "Interim",
  "Pretreatment"
)

df2 <- data2 %>%
  filter(!is.na(Disease)) %>%              # 必要なら NA を除外
  mutate(
    across(all_of(set_cols), ~ . == "YES"),
    Disease = factor(Disease),
    Cohort  = factor(Cohort)
  )

cohort_colors <- c(
  "NCT03297697"   = "#3B5B92",
  "UMIN000017672" = "#E09F3E",
  "Stanford"      = "#2A9D8F",
  "UMIN000034499" = "#C8553D",
  "CZECH"         = "#8E6C8A",
  "NCT05006664"   = "#6BAED6"
)

valid_cohorts <- intersect(levels(df2$Cohort), names(cohort_colors))
cohort_colors_used <- cohort_colors[valid_cohorts]
df2$Cohort <- factor(df2$Cohort, levels = valid_cohorts)

cohort_bar <- ggplot(df2, aes(x = Cohort)) +
  geom_bar() +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Count")


Upset_Cohort <- upset(
  df2,
  intersect      = set_cols,
  #intersections  = intersections_order,
  name           = "Samples",
  min_size       = 1,
  sort_sets      = FALSE, # when you manually sort
  sort_intersections = FALSE, # when you manually sort
  width_ratio    = 0.25,
  base_annotations = list(
    "Intersection size" = (
      intersection_size(
        counts = TRUE,
        mapping = aes(fill = Cohort),
        text   = list(size = 10 / .pt)
      ) +
        scale_fill_manual(
          values = cohort_colors,
          breaks = names(cohort_colors),
          drop = FALSE
        ) +
        guides(fill = guide_legend(title = "Cohort"))
    )
  )
) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
    legend.key.size = unit(5, "mm"),
    legend.box = "horizontal",
    legend.spacing.x = unit(2, "mm"),
    legend.box.just = "center"
  )



##00FigureS1New2

library(patchwork)

Upset_plot2 <- Upset_plot +
  theme(
    legend.position   = "bottom",
    legend.title      = element_text(size = 8, face = "bold"),
    legend.text       = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text         = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.title        = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.key.size   = unit(5, "mm"),
    legend.box        = "horizontal",
    legend.spacing.x  = unit(2, "mm"),
    legend.box.just   = "center"
  )

UpsetCohort2 <- Upset_Cohort +
  theme(
    legend.position   = "bottom",
    legend.title      = element_text(size = 8, face = "bold"),
    legend.text       = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text         = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.title        = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.key.size   = unit(5, "mm"),
    legend.box        = "horizontal",
    legend.spacing.x  = unit(2, "mm"),
    legend.box.just   = "center"
  )

combined_upset <- (Upset_plot2 | UpsetCohort2) +
  plot_layout(widths = c(2, 1.2), guides = "collect") &
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.key.size = unit(5, "mm"),
    legend.box = "horizontal"
  )

combined_upset <- combined_upset +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Figure S1",
    theme = theme(
      plot.title = element_text(
        hjust = 0,
        size  = 10,
        face  = "bold"
      )
    )
  )

ggsave(
  filename = "00Figure_S1_UpsetPlots.pdf",
  plot     = combined_upset,
  width    = 8.5,
  height   = 5,
  units    = "in"
)

##00Figure1

library(patchwork)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(grid)

add_tag <- function(p, label) {
  p + 
    labs(tag = label) +
    theme(
      plot.tag = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
      plot.tag.position = c(-0.2, 1),        #upper left（x=0, y=1）
      plot.margin = margin(8, 8, 8, 8)    #put some mergin
    )
}

add_tag2 <- function(p, label) {
  p + 
    labs(tag = label) +
    theme(
      plot.tag = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
      plot.tag.position = c(-0.2, 2.65),        #upper left（x=0, y=1）
      plot.margin = margin(8, 8, 8, 8)    #put some mergin
    )
}

# Blank plot
Figure1B <- ggplot() + theme_void()


# Add label
Figure1A_tagged <- add_tag(PieDisease, "A")
Figure1B_tagged <- add_tag(Figure1B, "B")

Figure1 <- (
  plot_spacer() + Figure1A_tagged + plot_spacer()  + Figure1B_tagged + plot_spacer()
) +
  plot_layout(ncol = 5, widths = c(0.1, 0.7, 0.1, 2.3, 0.1)) +
  plot_annotation(title = "Figure 1") &
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14, hjust = 0, vjust = 1),
    plot.title.position = "plot")

# save
ggsave("00Figure1.pdf", Figure1, width = 8.5, height = 3, units = "in", dpi = 300)

```

#Figure2
#FigureS2
```{r}
# ============================================================
# Sample and patient list before treatment
# ============================================================

cfDNAannotation_atDxlist <- upsetdata %>%
  filter(Status == "Pre Treatment") %>%
  pull(Stanford_ID)

cfDNAannotation_atDxPatientlist <- upsetdata %>%
  filter(Status == "Pre Treatment") %>%
  pull(Patient_ID)

# ============================================================
# Read clinical / cfDNA / cfRNA / viral / QUARTZ data
# ============================================================

#Clininfo_AF_combined <- read.delim("0000TableS1.txt")
Clindata <- Clininfo_AF_combined

cfDNAdata <- upsetdata

#Viraldata_cast_df_cfDNA_select <- read.csv("0000TableS14.csv")

#TRG_QUARTZ_select <- read.csv("0000TableS10.csv")
#TRG_QUARTZ_select <- TRG_QUARTZ_select %>% dplyr::select(SampleID = "SampleID", TRG_QUARTZ = "T.cell.fraction.in.DNA")

# ============================================================
# Read TCR data
# ============================================================

#TI_WholeTCL_tcrB_mono <- read.delim("0000TableS8a2.txt", header = 1)
#TI_WholeTCL_tcrB_poly <- read.delim("0000TableS8b2.txt", header = 1)
#TI_WholeTCL_tcrA_mono <- read.delim("0000TableS8c2.txt", header = 1)
#TI_WholeTCL_tcrA_poly <- read.delim("0000TableS8d2.txt", header = 1)
#TI_WholeTCL_tcrG_mono <- read.delim("0000TableS8e2.txt", header = 1)
#TI_WholeTCL_tcrG_poly <- read.delim("0000TableS8f2.txt", header = 1)

#TN_WholeTCL_tcrB_mono <- read.delim("0000TableS9a2.txt", header = 1)
#TN_WholeTCL_tcrB_poly <- read.delim("0000TableS9b2.txt", header = 1)
#TN_WholeTCL_tcrA_mono <- read.delim("0000TableS9c2.txt", header = 1)
#TN_WholeTCL_tcrA_poly <- read.delim("0000TableS9d2.txt", header = 1)
#TN_WholeTCL_tcrG_mono <- read.delim("0000TableS9e2.txt", header = 1)
#TN_WholeTCL_tcrG_poly <- read.delim("0000TableS9f2.txt", header = 1)

# ============================================================
# Functions
# ============================================================

cutoffvalue <- 0.10

replace_Tumor_fraction <- function(df, cutoffvalue) {
  df %>%
    mutate(
      Tumor_fraction = if_else(
        Fraction1_in_Tumor < cutoffvalue,
        99,
        Tumor_fraction_in_sample
      )
    ) %>%
    filter(Tumor_fraction != 99)
}

make_monitoring_df <- function(mono, poly, fraction_colname) {
  bind_rows(
    mono %>%
      dplyr::select(
        SampleID,
        !!fraction_colname := Tumor_fraction_in_sample
      ),
    poly %>%
      dplyr::select(
        SampleID,
        !!fraction_colname := Tumor_fraction_in_sample
      )
  )
}

get_detected_patients <- function(mono, poly, sampletype_filter = NULL) {
  mono2 <- mono %>%
    separate(SampleID, c("PatientID", "SampleType"), sep = "-", remove = FALSE)

  poly2 <- poly %>%
    separate(SampleID, c("PatientID", "SampleType"), sep = "-", remove = FALSE)

  if (!is.null(sampletype_filter)) {
    mono2 <- mono2 %>% filter(SampleType %in% sampletype_filter)
    poly2 <- poly2 %>% filter(SampleType %in% sampletype_filter)
  }

  unique(c(mono2$PatientID, poly2$PatientID))
}

make_detection_summary <- function(detected_vec, total_n) {
  detected_n <- length(detected_vec)
  undetected_n <- total_n - detected_n

  c(
    Detected = detected_n,
    Undetected = undetected_n
  )
}

make_tcr_long_df <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(
      Total = Detected + Undetected,
      Group = row.names(df)
    ) %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols = c(Detected, Undetected),
      names_to = "Status",
      values_to = "Count"
    ) %>%
    group_by(Group) %>%
    mutate(Fraction = Count / sum(Count)) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    as.data.frame()
}

# ============================================================
# Apply tumor clonotype cutoff
# ============================================================

TI_WholeTCL_tcrB_mono <- replace_Tumor_fraction(TI_WholeTCL_tcrB_mono, cutoffvalue)
TI_WholeTCL_tcrB_poly <- replace_Tumor_fraction(TI_WholeTCL_tcrB_poly, cutoffvalue)
TI_WholeTCL_tcrA_mono <- replace_Tumor_fraction(TI_WholeTCL_tcrA_mono, cutoffvalue)
TI_WholeTCL_tcrA_poly <- replace_Tumor_fraction(TI_WholeTCL_tcrA_poly, cutoffvalue)
TI_WholeTCL_tcrG_mono <- replace_Tumor_fraction(TI_WholeTCL_tcrG_mono, cutoffvalue)
TI_WholeTCL_tcrG_poly <- replace_Tumor_fraction(TI_WholeTCL_tcrG_poly, cutoffvalue)

TN_WholeTCL_tcrB_mono <- replace_Tumor_fraction(TN_WholeTCL_tcrB_mono, cutoffvalue)
TN_WholeTCL_tcrB_poly <- replace_Tumor_fraction(TN_WholeTCL_tcrB_poly, cutoffvalue)
TN_WholeTCL_tcrA_mono <- replace_Tumor_fraction(TN_WholeTCL_tcrA_mono, cutoffvalue)
TN_WholeTCL_tcrA_poly <- replace_Tumor_fraction(TN_WholeTCL_tcrA_poly, cutoffvalue)
TN_WholeTCL_tcrG_mono <- replace_Tumor_fraction(TN_WholeTCL_tcrG_mono, cutoffvalue)
TN_WholeTCL_tcrG_poly <- replace_Tumor_fraction(TN_WholeTCL_tcrG_poly, cutoffvalue)

# ============================================================
# Make monitoring data
# ============================================================

TI_WholeTCL_tcrB_monitoring <- make_monitoring_df(TI_WholeTCL_tcrB_mono, TI_WholeTCL_tcrB_poly, "TI_Tumor_tcrB_fraction")
TI_WholeTCL_tcrG_monitoring <- make_monitoring_df(TI_WholeTCL_tcrG_mono, TI_WholeTCL_tcrG_poly, "TI_Tumor_tcrG_fraction")
TI_WholeTCL_tcrA_monitoring <- make_monitoring_df(TI_WholeTCL_tcrA_mono, TI_WholeTCL_tcrA_poly, "TI_Tumor_tcrA_fraction")

TN_WholeTCL_tcrB_monitoring <- make_monitoring_df(TN_WholeTCL_tcrB_mono, TN_WholeTCL_tcrB_poly, "TN_Tumor_tcrB_fraction")
TN_WholeTCL_tcrG_monitoring <- make_monitoring_df(TN_WholeTCL_tcrG_mono, TN_WholeTCL_tcrG_poly, "TN_Tumor_tcrG_fraction")
TN_WholeTCL_tcrA_monitoring <- make_monitoring_df(TN_WholeTCL_tcrA_mono, TN_WholeTCL_tcrA_poly, "TN_Tumor_tcrA_fraction")

# ============================================================
# Detected patients by locus
# ============================================================

tumor_sampletypes <- c("T1", "T0", "T2", "T01")
cfdna_sampletypes <- c("P01", "P1", "C1")

TI_detected_patient_tcrG <- get_detected_patients(TI_WholeTCL_tcrG_mono, TI_WholeTCL_tcrG_poly)
TN_detected_patient_tcrG <- get_detected_patients(TN_WholeTCL_tcrG_mono, TN_WholeTCL_tcrG_poly)

TIonly_tcrG <- setdiff(TI_detected_patient_tcrG, TN_detected_patient_tcrG)
TNonly_tcrG <- setdiff(TN_detected_patient_tcrG, TI_detected_patient_tcrG)
concordant_tcrG <- intersect(TI_detected_patient_tcrG, TN_detected_patient_tcrG)

TI_detected_patient_tcrB <- get_detected_patients(
  TI_WholeTCL_tcrB_mono,
  TI_WholeTCL_tcrB_poly,
  sampletype_filter = tumor_sampletypes
)

TN_detected_patient_tcrB <- get_detected_patients(
  TN_WholeTCL_tcrB_mono,
  TN_WholeTCL_tcrB_poly,
  sampletype_filter = cfdna_sampletypes
)

TIonly_tcrB <- setdiff(TI_detected_patient_tcrB, TN_detected_patient_tcrB)
TNonly_tcrB <- setdiff(TN_detected_patient_tcrB, TI_detected_patient_tcrB)
concordant_tcrB <- intersect(TI_detected_patient_tcrB, TN_detected_patient_tcrB)

TI_detected_patient_tcrA <- get_detected_patients(TI_WholeTCL_tcrA_mono, TI_WholeTCL_tcrA_poly)
TN_detected_patient_tcrA <- get_detected_patients(TN_WholeTCL_tcrA_mono, TN_WholeTCL_tcrA_poly)

TIonly_tcrA <- setdiff(TI_detected_patient_tcrA, TN_detected_patient_tcrA)
TNonly_tcrA <- setdiff(TN_detected_patient_tcrA, TI_detected_patient_tcrA)
concordant_tcrA <- intersect(TI_detected_patient_tcrA, TN_detected_patient_tcrA)

# ============================================================
# Tumor-paired patients
# ============================================================

Clininfo_AF_combined_tumorpaired <- Clininfo_AF_combined %>%
  filter(Paired_with_Tumor == "YES")

PatientWithPairedTumor <- Clininfo_AF_combined_tumorpaired$PatientID

tTCRGdetectedTumor <- intersect(PatientWithPairedTumor, TI_detected_patient_tcrG)
tTCRAdetectedTumor <- intersect(PatientWithPairedTumor, TI_detected_patient_tcrA)
tTCRBdetectedTumor <- intersect(PatientWithPairedTumor, TI_detected_patient_tcrB)

tTCRanydetectedTumor <- unique(c(
  tTCRAdetectedTumor,
  tTCRBdetectedTumor,
  tTCRGdetectedTumor
))

tTCRanydetectedTumor <- tTCRanydetectedTumor[
  !grepl("^TCL5|^TCL3", tTCRanydetectedTumor)
]

tTCRGdetectedcfDNA <- intersect(PatientWithPairedTumor, TN_detected_patient_tcrG)
tTCRAdetectedcfDNA <- intersect(PatientWithPairedTumor, TN_detected_patient_tcrA)
tTCRBdetectedcfDNA <- intersect(PatientWithPairedTumor, TN_detected_patient_tcrB)

tTCRanydetectedcfDNA <- unique(c(
  tTCRAdetectedcfDNA,
  tTCRBdetectedcfDNA,
  tTCRGdetectedcfDNA
))

tTCRanydetectedANY <- unique(c(
  tTCRanydetectedcfDNA,
  tTCRanydetectedTumor
))

# ============================================================
# Detection counts
# ============================================================

tTCRanyNONdetectedTumor <- nrow(Clininfo_AF_combined_tumorpaired) - length(tTCRanydetectedTumor)
tTCRanyNONdetectedcfDNA <- nrow(Clininfo_AF_combined_tumorpaired) - length(tTCRanydetectedcfDNA)
tTCRanyNONdetectedANY <- nrow(Clininfo_AF_combined_tumorpaired) - length(tTCRanydetectedANY)

tTCRanydetectedcfDNAinTumorpaired <- intersect(
  PatientWithPairedTumor,
  tTCRanydetectedcfDNA
)

tTCRanydetectedANYinTumorpaired <- intersect(
  PatientWithPairedTumor,
  tTCRanydetectedANY
)

# ============================================================
# Detection summary: all patients
# ============================================================

dfTCR <- data.frame(
  Detected = c(
    length(tTCRanydetectedcfDNA),
    length(tTCRanydetectedTumor),
    length(tTCRanydetectedANY)
  ),
  Undetected = c(
    tTCRanyNONdetectedcfDNA,
    tTCRanyNONdetectedTumor,
    tTCRanyNONdetectedANY
  )
)

row.names(dfTCR) <- c("cfDNA only", "Tumor only", "cfDNA and Tumor")

dfTCR_long <- make_tcr_long_df(dfTCR)

dfTCR_long_detected <- dfTCR_long %>%
  filter(Status == "Detected")

ggplot(dfTCR_long, aes(x = Group, y = Fraction, fill = Status)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  geom_text(
    data = dfTCR_long_detected,
    aes(
      x = Group,
      y = 1.05,
      label = paste0("n=", Total, "\n", round(Fraction, 3))
    ),
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 1.1),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0))
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("Detected" = "skyblue", "Undetected" = "orange")
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Group",
    y = "Proportion"
  ) +
  theme_bw()

# ============================================================
# Detection summary: tumor-paired patients only
# ============================================================

tTCRanyNONdetectedcfDNAinTumorpaired <- length(PatientWithPairedTumor) -
  length(tTCRanydetectedcfDNAinTumorpaired)

tTCRanyNONdetectedANYinTumorpaired <- length(PatientWithPairedTumor) -
  length(tTCRanydetectedANYinTumorpaired)

dfTCR_Tumorpaired <- data.frame(
  Detected = c(
    length(tTCRanydetectedcfDNAinTumorpaired),
    length(tTCRanydetectedTumor),
    length(tTCRanydetectedANYinTumorpaired)
  ),
  Undetected = c(
    tTCRanyNONdetectedcfDNAinTumorpaired,
    tTCRanyNONdetectedTumor,
    tTCRanyNONdetectedANYinTumorpaired
  )
)

row.names(dfTCR_Tumorpaired) <- c("cfDNA only", "Tumor only", "cfDNA and Tumor")

dfTCR_Tumorpaired_long <- make_tcr_long_df(dfTCR_Tumorpaired)

dfTCR_Tumorpaired_long_detected <- dfTCR_Tumorpaired_long %>%
  filter(Status == "Detected")
```

#make Tissue Biopsy Naive files & Tissue Biopsy Informed files
```{r}
BaselinecfDNA_informed <- cfDNA25pctMax
Tumor_informed <- list(Tumor25pctMax, Tumor25pctMax1) %>%
  reduce(full_join, by = "Sample")

#Set threshold
threshold_Tumor <- 0
threshold_cfDNA <- 0.2
threshold_WES_read <- 5
threshold_Tumor_WES <- 2
#list of recover
listofrecover <- c("IDH2","KRAS","CD28","FAS","FYN","DNMT3A","NCOR1")
#black_list
blacklist <- c("OR5H1")
#CHIP candidate
CHIPmut <- c("ASXL1", "PPM1D", "DNMT3A", "TET2", "GNB1", "CBL", "JAK2", "STAT3", "GNAS", "MYD88", "SF3B1")

#read data
#df_mutation <- read.delim(mutation,header=1)
df_mutation <- df_mutation %>%
  mutate(SampleID=gsub("PL9","C1",SampleID))

#set function
join_4samples <- function(df, join_df, sample_col = "SampleID") {
  df %>%
    left_join(join_df, by = setNames(sample_col, "Sample1"), suffix = c("", "_1")) %>%
    left_join(join_df, by = setNames(sample_col, "Sample2"), suffix = c("", "_2")) %>%
    left_join(join_df, by = setNames(sample_col, "Sample3"), suffix = c("", "_3")) %>%
    left_join(join_df, by = setNames(sample_col, "SampleT"), suffix = c("", "_T"))
}

#Create masterfile
Clininfo_AF_combinedX <- Clininfo_AF_combined
Clininfo_AF_combined <- Clininfo_AF_combinedX %>%
  mutate(
    Sample1 = Baseline.Sample,
    Sample2 = C1D8.Samples,
    Sample3 = EOT.Sample,
    SampleT = Tumor.Samples
  ) %>%
  join_4samples(TI_WholeTCL_tcrB_monitoring) %>%
  join_4samples(TN_WholeTCL_tcrB_monitoring) %>%
  join_4samples(TI_WholeTCL_tcrG_monitoring) %>%
  join_4samples(TN_WholeTCL_tcrG_monitoring) %>%
  join_4samples(TI_WholeTCL_tcrA_monitoring) %>%
  join_4samples(TN_WholeTCL_tcrA_monitoring) %>%
  join_4samples(TRG_QUARTZ_select) %>%
  join_4samples(BaselinecfDNA_informed, sample_col = "Sample") %>%
  join_4samples(Tumor_informed, sample_col = "Sample") %>%
  join_4samples(Viraldata_cast_df_cfDNA_select) %>%
  mutate(
    AnnArborStage = AnnArbor.Stage,
    cfEBV_1 = EBV * cfDNAconcpermlPlasma_atDiagnosis * 171823 / 480 * 333,
    cfEBV_2 = EBV_2 * cfDNAconcpermlPlasma_atDiagnosis * 171823 / 480 * 333,
    cfEBV_3 = EBV_3 * cfDNAconcpermlPlasma_atDiagnosis * 171823 / 480 * 333,
    cfHTLV1_1 = HTLV1 * cfDNAconcpermlPlasma_atDiagnosis * 333,
    cfHTLV1_2 = HTLV1_2 * cfDNAconcpermlPlasma_atDiagnosis * 333,
    cfHTLV1_3 = HTLV1_3 * cfDNAconcpermlPlasma_atDiagnosis * 333,
    BVbased = ifelse(grepl("BV",Treatment.1),"YES", "NO"),
    TCR_TIorTN = ifelse(
      PatientID %in% TIonly_tcrG, "Tumoronly",
      ifelse(PatientID %in% TNonly_tcrG, "cfDNAonly",
             ifelse(PatientID %in% concordant_tcrG, "Both", "None"))
    ),
    TCR_TIorTNtcrB = ifelse(
      PatientID %in% TIonly_tcrB, "Tumoronly",
      ifelse(PatientID %in% TNonly_tcrB, "cfDNAonly",
             ifelse(PatientID %in% concordant_tcrB, "Both", "None"))
    ),
    TCR_TIorTNtcrA = ifelse(
      PatientID %in% TIonly_tcrA, "Tumoronly",
      ifelse(PatientID %in% TNonly_tcrA, "cfDNAonly",
             ifelse(PatientID %in% concordant_tcrA, "Both", "None"))
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    across(c(TRG_QUARTZ, TRG_QUARTZ_2, TRG_QUARTZ_3, TRG_QUARTZ_T), as.numeric),
    TCRG_ctDNA_1 = TRG_QUARTZ * TI_Tumor_tcrG_fraction,
    TCRG_ctDNA_2 = TRG_QUARTZ_2 * TI_Tumor_tcrG_fraction_2,
    TCRG_ctDNA_3 = TRG_QUARTZ_3 * TI_Tumor_tcrG_fraction_3,
    TCRG_ctDNA_T = TRG_QUARTZ_T * TI_Tumor_tcrG_fraction_T,
    TCRG_ctDNA_1 = ifelse(TCR_TIorTN == "cfDNAonly", TRG_QUARTZ * TN_Tumor_tcrG_fraction, TCRG_ctDNA_1),
    TCRG_ctDNA_2 = ifelse(TCR_TIorTN == "cfDNAonly", TRG_QUARTZ_2 * TN_Tumor_tcrG_fraction_2, TCRG_ctDNA_2),
    TCRG_ctDNA_3 = ifelse(TCR_TIorTN == "cfDNAonly", TRG_QUARTZ_3 * TN_Tumor_tcrG_fraction_3, TCRG_ctDNA_3),
    TCRG_ctDNA_T = ifelse(TCR_TIorTN == "cfDNAonly", TRG_QUARTZ_T * TN_Tumor_tcrG_fraction_T, TCRG_ctDNA_T),
    Tumor_informed_baselineAF = as.numeric(Tumor25pctMax_AF1),
    Tumor_informed_EOTAF = as.numeric(Tumor25pctMax_AF1_3),
    cfDNA_informed_baselineAF = as.numeric(cfDNA25pctMax_AF),
    cfDNA_informed_EOTAF = as.numeric(cfDNA25pctMax_AF_3),
    ctDNA_Tumorinformed_baseline = Tumor_informed_baselineAF * Total.cfDNA.at.Diagnosis / mlplasma.at.Diagnosis * 3.3,
    ctDNA_Tumorinformed_EOT = Tumor_informed_EOTAF * Total.cfDNA.at.EOT / mlplasma.at.EOT * 3.3,
    ctDNA_cfDNAinformed_baseline = cfDNA_informed_baselineAF * Total.cfDNA.at.Diagnosis / mlplasma.at.Diagnosis * 3.3,
    ctDNA_cfDNAinformed_EOT = cfDNA_informed_EOTAF * Total.cfDNA.at.EOT / mlplasma.at.EOT * 3.3,
    ctDNA_TCRinformed_baseline = TCRG_ctDNA_1 / 2 * 100 * Total.cfDNA.at.Diagnosis / mlplasma.at.Diagnosis * 3.3,
    ctDNA_TCRinformed_EOT = TCRG_ctDNA_3 / 2 * 100 * Total.cfDNA.at.Diagnosis / mlplasma.at.Diagnosis * 3.3,
    Tumor_informed_baselineAF = ifelse(Tumor25pctMax_AF1_T < 2, NA, Tumor_informed_baselineAF),
    Disease9 = ifelse(
      Disease %in% c("ATLLacutetype", "ATLLlymphoma"),
      ifelse(Treatmentnaive == "YES", "ATLL", "RRATLL"),
      Disease
    ),
    ctDNA_Tumorinformed_baseline_log = ifelse(ctDNA_Tumorinformed_baseline == 0, 0.1, ctDNA_Tumorinformed_baseline),
    ctDNA_cfDNAinformed_baseline_log = ifelse(ctDNA_cfDNAinformed_baseline == 0, 0.1, ctDNA_cfDNAinformed_baseline),
    ctDNA_TCRinformed_baseline_log = case_when(
      if_all(c(TCR_TIorTN, TCR_TIorTNtcrB, TCR_TIorTNtcrA), ~ .x == "None") ~ NA_real_,
      ctDNA_TCRinformed_baseline == 0 ~ 0.1,
      TRUE ~ ctDNA_TCRinformed_baseline / 2
    )
  )

#sampleID
All_samples <- unique(df_mutation$SampleID)
all_atDx_sample <- c(unique(Clindata$Baseline.Sample),unique(Clindata$Tumor.Samples))
all_cfDNAatDx_sample <- unique(Clindata$Baseline.Sample)
#remove TSTCL065-C1 because germline free
filtered_samples <- setdiff(All_samples, c("", "TSTCL065-C1"))
#Omit germline free
all_atDx_sample_filtered <- setdiff(all_atDx_sample, c("","TSTCL065-C1","TSTCL060-P1","TSTCL056-P1","TSTCL057-P1"))
all_cfDNAatDx_sample_filtered <- setdiff(all_cfDNAatDx_sample, c("","TSTCL065-C1","TSTCL060-P1","TSTCL056-P1","TSTCL057-P1"))
listofNomutationcalled <- setdiff(all_atDx_sample_filtered,filtered_samples)

#TMB calculation
sample_counts <- df_mutation %>%
  dplyr::count(SampleID) %>%
  arrange(desc(n))
sample_counts_df <- as.data.frame(sample_counts)
sample_counts_df_filtered <- sample_counts_df %>% 
  filter(SampleID %in% cfDNAannotation_atDxlist)

AnnotationDisease <- Clininfo_AF_combined %>% 
  dplyr::select(SampleID="Baseline.Sample",Disease="Disease",AnnArborStage="AnnArbor.Stage")
sample_counts_df_filtered_joined <- left_join(sample_counts_df_filtered,AnnotationDisease,by="SampleID")
sample_counts_df_filtered_joined <- sample_counts_df_filtered_joined %>% 
  filter(!Disease %in% c("NA","AITL_DLBCL")) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(Disease)) %>%
  mutate(SampleID = as.factor(SampleID),
         Disease = fct_reorder(Disease, n, .fun = median, .desc = TRUE))

#Make files for plot
ForDisease <- Clininfo_AF_combined %>%
  filter(
    Disease != "",
    !is.na(Disease),
    Disease != "AITL_DLBCL"
    #!PatientID %in% c("TCL619")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Disease2 = ifelse(
      Disease %in% c("ATLLacutetype", "ATLLlymphoma"),
      ifelse(Treatmentnaive == "YES", "ATLL", "RR_ATLL"),
      Disease
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(Disease2 != "RR_ATLL")

ForDisease_long <- ForDisease %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(ctDNA_Tumorinformed_baseline_log, ctDNA_cfDNAinformed_baseline_log),
    names_to = "MeasurementType",
    values_to = "ctDNA_AF"
  )

ForDisease_long2 <- ForDisease %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(ctDNA_Tumorinformed_baseline_log, ctDNA_cfDNAinformed_baseline_log, ctDNA_TCRinformed_baseline_log),
    names_to = "MeasurementType",
    values_to = "ctDNA_AF"
  )

ForDisease_long2_2 <- ForDisease %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(ctDNA_cfDNAinformed_baseline_log, ctDNA_TCRinformed_baseline_log),
    names_to = "MeasurementType",
    values_to = "ctDNA_AF"
  )

ForDisease <- ForDisease %>%
  mutate(
    cfDNA_Tumor_tcrB_fraction_pct = TN_Tumor_tcrB_fraction * 100,
    cfDNA_Tumor_tcrA_fraction_pct = TN_Tumor_tcrA_fraction * 100,
    cfDNA_Tumor_tcrG_fraction_pct = TN_Tumor_tcrG_fraction * 100,
    TumorInformed_Tumor_tcrB_fraction_pct = TI_Tumor_tcrB_fraction * 100,
    TumorInformed_Tumor_tcrA_fraction_pct = TI_Tumor_tcrA_fraction * 100,
    TumorInformed_Tumor_tcrG_fraction_pct = TI_Tumor_tcrG_fraction * 100,
    cfDNA_Tumor_tcrB_fraction_T_pct = TN_Tumor_tcrB_fraction_T * 100,
    cfDNA_Tumor_tcrA_fraction_T_pct = TN_Tumor_tcrA_fraction_T * 100,
    cfDNA_Tumor_tcrG_fraction_T_pct = TN_Tumor_tcrG_fraction_T * 100,
    TumorInformed_Tumor_tcrB_fraction_T_pct = TI_Tumor_tcrB_fraction_T * 100,
    TumorInformed_Tumor_tcrA_fraction_T_pct = TI_Tumor_tcrA_fraction_T * 100,
    TumorInformed_Tumor_tcrG_fraction_T_pct = TI_Tumor_tcrG_fraction_T * 100
  )

ForDisease_long3 <- ForDisease %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(Tumor25pctMax_AF1, Tumor25pctMax_AF1_T),
               names_to = "MeasurementType",
               values_to = "Mutation_AF")

ForDisease_long4 <- ForDisease %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(Tumor25pctMax_AF, Tumor25pctMax_AF_T,cfDNA25pctMax_AF, cfDNA25pctMax_AF_T),

ForDisease_long5 <- ForDisease %>%

               names_to = "MeasurementType",
               values_to = "ctDNA_AF")

#Validation of viral load
Clininfo_AF_combined_ENKTL <- Clininfo_AF_combined %>% 
  filter(Disease=="ENKTL")
  
Clininfo_AF_combined_ATLL <- Clininfo_AF_combined %>% filter(Disease %in% c("ATLLlymphoma","ATLLacutetype"))

Clininfo_AF_combined_select_Overlap <- Clininfo_AF_combined %>% 
  dplyr::select(PatientID,Disease,AnnArborStage="AnnArbor.Stage")

df_mutation_Overlap <- df_mutation %>%
  mutate(
    gene_position_Ref_Alt = paste(Gene.refGeneWithVer, Start, Ref, Alt, sep = ":"),
    SampleID2 = SampleID
  ) %>%
  separate(SampleID2, into = c("PatientID", "TypeTimepoint"),
           sep = "-", remove = FALSE, extra = "drop", fill = "right") %>%
  dplyr::filter(SampleID %in% cfDNAannotation_atDxlist |TypeTimepoint %in% c("T0", "T01", "T1")) %>% 
  mutate(Type = if_else(TypeTimepoint %in% c("T1","T01","T0"), "Tumor", "cfDNA")) %>%
  left_join(Clininfo_AF_combined_select_Overlap, by = "PatientID")

# 2) 患者ごとの Tumor/cfDNA の集合を作り、重なり/片側のみを集計
df_summary <- df_mutation_Overlap %>%
  filter(!is.na(gene_position_Ref_Alt), gene_position_Ref_Alt != "") %>%
  group_by(PatientID) %>%
  summarise(
    Disease       = first(Disease),
    AnnArborStage = first(AnnArborStage),
    tumor_set     = list(unique(gene_position_Ref_Alt[Type == "Tumor"])),
    cfDNA_set     = list(unique(gene_position_Ref_Alt[Type == "cfDNA"])),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    overlap_n     = map2_int(tumor_set, cfDNA_set, ~ length(intersect(.x, .y))),
    tumor_only_n  = map2_int(tumor_set, cfDNA_set, ~ length(setdiff(.x, .y))),
    cfDNA_only_n  = map2_int(cfDNA_set, tumor_set, ~ length(setdiff(.x, .y))),
    tumor_total_n = map_int(tumor_set, length),
    cfDNA_total_n = map_int(cfDNA_set, length),
    union_n       = map2_int(tumor_set, cfDNA_set, ~ length(union(.x, .y))),
    jaccard       = if_else(union_n > 0, overlap_n / union_n, NA_real_)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(PatientID, Disease, AnnArborStage,
         overlap_n, tumor_only_n, cfDNA_only_n,
         tumor_total_n, cfDNA_total_n, union_n, jaccard) %>%
  arrange(desc(overlap_n), desc(union_n))

graphics.off()
pdf("00overlap.pdf")
ggplot(df_summary, aes(x=Disease,y=jaccard))+
  geom_boxplot()
dev.off()

if (!"Type" %in% names(df_mutation_Overlap)) {
  df_mutation_Overlap <- df_mutation_Overlap %>%
    mutate(Type = if_else(TypeTimepoint %in% c("T1","T01","T0"), "Tumor", "cfDNA"))
}

##name of column
AF_col <- "AF..."
stopifnot(AF_col %in% names(df_mutation_Overlap))
##omit AF = NA
dfm <- df_mutation_Overlap %>%
  filter(!is.na(gene_position_Ref_Alt), gene_position_Ref_Alt != "") %>%
  filter(!is.na(.data[[AF_col]]))
## 1) max AF in tissue biopsy x patient
tumor_by_var <- dfm %>%
  filter(Type == "Tumor") %>%
  group_by(PatientID, gene_position_Ref_Alt) %>%
  summarise(tumor_AF_max = max(.data[[AF_col]], na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

## 2) max AF in tissue biopsy
tumor_max_by_patient <- tumor_by_var %>%
  group_by(PatientID) %>%
  summarise(tumor_max_AF = max(tumor_AF_max, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

## 3) “Tumor marker” = tumor_AF_max >= 0.25 * tumor_max_AF
tumor_markers <- tumor_by_var %>%
  inner_join(tumor_max_by_patient, by = "PatientID") %>%
  mutate(is_marker = tumor_AF_max >= 0.25 * tumor_max_AF) %>%
  filter(is_marker) %>%
  group_by(PatientID) %>%
  summarise(
    marker_set = list(unique(gene_position_Ref_Alt)),
    marker_n   = length(unique(gene_position_Ref_Alt)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

## 4) mutation in cfDNA
cfDNA_sets <- dfm %>%
  filter(Type == "cfDNA") %>%
  group_by(PatientID) %>%
  summarise(cfDNA_set = list(unique(gene_position_Ref_Alt)), .groups = "drop")

## 5) How many “Tumor markers” are found in cfDNA
norm_list <- function(z) if (length(z) == 1 && all(is.na(z))) character(0) else z

df_marker_summary <- tumor_max_by_patient %>%
  left_join(Clininfo_AF_combined_select_Overlap, by = "PatientID") %>%  # 疾患/病期
  left_join(tumor_markers, by = "PatientID") %>%
  left_join(cfDNA_sets, by = "PatientID") %>%
  mutate(
    marker_set  = map(marker_set, norm_list),
    cfDNA_set   = map(cfDNA_set,  norm_list),
    marker_n    = ifelse(is.na(marker_n), 0L, marker_n),
    markers_in_cfDNA_n = map2_int(marker_set, cfDNA_set, ~ length(intersect(.x, .y))),
    marker_capture_rate = ifelse(marker_n > 0, markers_in_cfDNA_n / marker_n, NA_real_),
    markers_found   = map2(marker_set, cfDNA_set, intersect),
    markers_missing = map2(marker_set, cfDNA_set, setdiff)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(PatientID, Disease, AnnArborStage, tumor_max_AF,
         marker_n, markers_in_cfDNA_n, marker_capture_rate,
         markers_found, markers_missing) %>%
  arrange(desc(marker_capture_rate), desc(marker_n))

df_marker_summary_AFnotLow <- df_marker_summary %>% 
  filter(tumor_max_AF > 1) %>% 
  filter(!PatientID %in% c("TCL038","TCL015")) %>% 
  filter(marker_n > 0)
  
graphics.off()
pdf("00markerdetected.pdf",width=8,height=5)
ggplot(df_marker_summary_AFnotLow, aes(x=AnnArborStage,y=marker_capture_rate*100)) +
  geom_boxplot()+
  theme_bw()+
  labs(title="Tumor marker-mutations detected in baseline-cfDNA",
      x="Ann Arbor Stage",
      y="Rate of detection")
dev.off()

df_plot <- df_marker_summary_AFnotLow %>%
  filter(marker_n > 0) %>%
  filter(Disease != "TFHDLBCL") %>%
  filter(PatientID %in% cfDNAannotation_atDxPatientlist) %>% 
  mutate(
    detected_group = ifelse(markers_in_cfDNA_n > 0, ">=1 detected", "0 detected"),
    AnnArborStage = factor(AnnArborStage, levels = c("I","II","III","IV","NA"))
  )

df_plot_AnnArbor <- df_plot %>% 
  filter(AnnArborStage != "NA") %>%
  filter(!is.na(AnnArborStage)) %>% 
  filter(tumor_max_AF > 1)

Fig2B <- ggplot(df_plot_AnnArbor, aes(x = AnnArborStage, fill = detected_group)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_percent(accuracy = 1), limits = c(0, 1)) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    name   = "Status",
    values = c("0 detected" = "#FFA500" , ">=1 detected" = "#5B9BD5"),
    breaks = c("0 detected", ">=1 detected"),
    labels = c("Undetected", "Detected")
  ) +
  labs(
    #title = "Probability of detecting ≥1 tumor-defined mutation\nwith tumor-naïve cfDNA genotyping",
    title = "Tissue Biopsy Naive Mutation\nGenotyping Performance",
    x = "Ann Arbor Stage",
    y = "Patients (%)"
  ) +
  theme_bw()

sample_counts_df_filtered_joined_filter <- sample_counts_df_filtered_joined %>% 
  filter(!Disease %in% c("TFHDLBCL","Others","Unknown")) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(Disease))

disease_levels <- c("ATLLacutetype","ATLLlymphoma","EATL","TFH","PTCLNOS","ALKnegALCL","ALKposALCL","ENKTL","MEITL","SS","PCGDTCL","MFLCT","Healthy")
sample_counts_df_filtered_joined_filter <- sample_counts_df_filtered_joined_filter %>%

# Paired cfDNA vs tumor comparison

ForDisease_long4_filter2 <- ForDisease_long4_filter %>%
  mutate(

  ) %>%
  filter(Group == "Tissue Biopsy Informed")

# Omit ATLL patients who already received chemotherapy
dfff <- ForDisease_long4_filter2 %>%
  filter(Treatmentnaive == "YES")

dfff2 <- ForDisease_long4_filter2 %>%
  filter(!Disease %in% c("ATLLacute", "ATLLlymphoma"))

dfff3 <- bind_rows(dfff, dfff2)

dfff3re <- dfff3 %>%
  filter(PatientID %in% cfDNAannotation_atDxPatientlist) %>% 
  #filter(!Disease %in% c("ATLLacutetype")) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(Disease))

dfff4 <- dfff3re %>%
  group_by(Disease, SampleType) %>%
  filter(n() >= 2) %>%
  ungroup()

paired_df <- dfff4 %>%
  group_by(Disease, PatientID, SampleType) %>%
  summarise(
    Mutation_AF = mean(Mutation_AF, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = SampleType,
    values_from = Mutation_AF
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(cfDNA),
    !is.na(Tumor)
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# y-position for statistical annotation
# ------------------------------------------------------------

y.pos <- dfff3re %>%
  group_by(Disease) %>%
  summarise(
    y.position = 1.2 * max(Mutation_AF, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Paired t-test by disease
# ------------------------------------------------------------

stat.test <- paired_df %>%
  group_by(Disease) %>%
  summarise(
    p = if (n() > 1) {
      t.test(cfDNA, Tumor, paired = TRUE)$p.value
    } else {
      NA_real_
    },
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  add_significance("p") %>%
  left_join(y.pos, by = "Disease") %>%
  mutate(
    x.position = Disease
  )

  xlab("Disease") +
  ylab("Mutation AF %") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1),
        legend.position = "top") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "cfDNA" = "#5B9BD5",
      "Tumor" = "orange"
    ),
    labels = c(
      "cfDNA",
      "Tumor"
    ),
    name = ""
  )

FigS3C <- FigS3C +

    aes(x = x.position, y = y.position, 
        #label = round(p,3)

        ),

  )

# ============================================================
# CNV calling performance by Ann Arbor stage
# ============================================================

Performances <- NULL

Stages <- c("IV", "III", "II", "I", NA)

omitcytoband <- c(
  "6p21.3", "14q11.2", "7q34", "7p14", "7p15",
  "2p11.2", "22q11.22", "22q11.23", "14q32.33"
)

TCLv4 <- c(
  "TSTCL032", "TSTCL033", "TSTCL034", "TSTCL035",
  "TSTCL036", "TSTCL037", "TSTCL038",
  "TSTCL039", "TSTCL040", "TSTCL041", "TSTCL042"
)

cutoff <- 4.0

# ============================================================
# Prepare CNV data
# ============================================================
# ============================================================
# Read and merge CNV data
# ============================================================

#df_CNV <- read.delim("merged.allPTCL.CNV4re.txt", header = 1)
#df_CNV_v4 <- read.delim("merge.TCLv4.canary2re.txt", header = 1)

df_CNV <- df_CNV %>%
  filter(!SampleID %in% df_CNV_v4$SampleID)

df_CNVmt <- bind_rows(df_CNV, df_CNV_v4) %>%
  mutate(SampleID = gsub("Sample_", "", SampleID)) %>%
  separate(
    SampleID,
    c("SampleID", "Type"),
    sep = "_",
    fill = "right",
    extra = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Cohort = substr(SampleID, 1, 3),
    cytobandname = paste0(X.chr, name)
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(gc.corrected.norm.log.std.index.zWeighted.Final),
    !is.na(gc.corrected.norm.log.index.Final)
  ) %>%
  mutate(SampleID2 = SampleID) %>%
  separate(SampleID2, c("PatientID", "TypeTimepoint"), sep = "-") %>%
  mutate(SampleID = gsub("PL9", "C1", SampleID)) %>%
  filter(TypeTimepoint != "N1")

CNVLOB <- 2.5
cutoff <- 4

df_CNV_CTR <- df_CNVmt %>%
  filter(Cohort == "CTR") %>%
  group_by(cytobandname) %>%
  summarise(
    Zscore_mean = mean(as.numeric(gc.corrected.norm.log.std.index.zWeighted.Final), na.rm = TRUE),
    Zscore_std  = sd(as.numeric(gc.corrected.norm.log.std.index.zWeighted.Final), na.rm = TRUE),
    Log2_mean   = mean(as.numeric(gc.corrected.norm.log.index.Final), na.rm = TRUE),
    Log2_std    = sd(as.numeric(gc.corrected.norm.log.index.Final), na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    LOB_Amp_Zscore = Zscore_mean + CNVLOB * Zscore_std,
    LOB_Del_Zscore = Zscore_mean - CNVLOB * Zscore_std,
    LOB_Amp_Log    = Log2_mean + CNVLOB * Log2_std,
    LOB_Del_Log    = Log2_mean - CNVLOB * Log2_std
  )

df_CNV_tumor_merge2 <- inner_join(
  df_CNVmt,
  df_CNV_CTR,
  by = "cytobandname"
) %>%
  mutate(
    gc.corrected.norm.log.std.index.zWeighted.Final =
      as.numeric(gc.corrected.norm.log.std.index.zWeighted.Final),
    
    AmpDel = case_when(
      is.na(gc.corrected.norm.log.std.index.zWeighted.Final) ~ "none",
      gc.corrected.norm.log.std.index.zWeighted.Final < -cutoff ~ "Del",
      gc.corrected.norm.log.std.index.zWeighted.Final >  cutoff ~ "Amp",
      TRUE ~ "none"
    ),
    
    AmpDel = case_when(
      AmpDel == "Amp" &
        gc.corrected.norm.log.std.index.zWeighted.Final > LOB_Amp_Zscore ~ "Amp",
      AmpDel == "Del" &
        gc.corrected.norm.log.std.index.zWeighted.Final < LOB_Del_Zscore ~ "Del",
      TRUE ~ "none"
    ),
    
    PatientID2 = gsub("TCL", "", PatientID),
    Cohort2 = substr(PatientID2, 1, 1),
    SampleID = gsub("PL9", "C1", SampleID)
  )

# ============================================================
# CNV tables
# ============================================================

df_CNV_concordance_check <- df_CNV_tumor_merge2 %>%
  filter(
    AmpDel != "none",
    PatientID %in% cfDNAannotation_atDxPatientlist
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    CNVID = paste0(PatientID, X.chr, name, AmpDel),
    Type = ifelse(TypeTimepoint %in% c("T1", "T0", "T01", "T2"), "Tumor", "cfDNA")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(PatientID, Type, CNVID, SampleID)

df_CNV_concordance_checkNONE <- df_CNV_tumor_merge2 %>%
  filter(
    AmpDel == "none",
    !cytobandname %in% omitcytoband
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    CNVID = paste0(PatientID, X.chr, name, AmpDel),
    Type = ifelse(TypeTimepoint %in% c("T1", "T0", "T01", "T2"), "Tumor", "cfDNA")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(PatientID, Type, CNVID, SampleID)

# ============================================================
# Tumor AF table
# ============================================================

TumorwithAF_1 <- Tumor25pctMax %>%
  mutate(
    PatientID = Sample,
    Mean_Combined_AF = Tumor25pctMax_AF
  ) %>%
  separate(PatientID, c("PatientID", "TypeTimepoint"), sep = "-") %>%
  filter(
    TypeTimepoint %in% c("T01", "T1", "T0"),
    Mean_Combined_AF > 1
  )

# ============================================================
# Function: calculate performance for each stage
# ============================================================

calc_cnv_performance_by_stage <- function(selectedstage) {
  
  atDxsamples <- unique(df_CNV_tumor_merge2$SampleID)
  atDxsamples_filtered <- intersect(atDxsamples, cfDNAannotation_atDxlist)
  
  cfDNAwithAF_0 <- cfDNA25pctMax %>%
    mutate(
      PatientID = Sample,
      Mean_Combined_AF = cfDNA25pctMax_AF
    ) %>%
    separate(PatientID, c("PatientID", "TypeTimepoint"), sep = "-") %>%
    filter(Sample %in% atDxsamples_filtered) %>%
    left_join(Clininfo_AF_combined, by = "PatientID")
  
  if (is.na(selectedstage)) {
    cfDNAwithAF_0 <- cfDNAwithAF_0 %>%
      filter(is.na(AnnArborStage))
  } else {
    cfDNAwithAF_0 <- cfDNAwithAF_0 %>%
      filter(AnnArborStage == selectedstage)
  }
  
  df_cfDNA <- df_CNV_concordance_check %>%
    filter(
      Type == "cfDNA",
      SampleID %in% cfDNAwithAF_0$Sample
    )
  
  df_Tumor <- df_CNV_concordance_check %>%
    filter(
      Type == "Tumor",
      PatientID %in% TumorwithAF_1$PatientID
    )
  
  df_cfDNA_NONE <- df_CNV_concordance_checkNONE %>%
    filter(
      Type == "cfDNA",
      SampleID %in% cfDNAwithAF_0$Sample
    )
  
  df_Tumor_NONE <- df_CNV_concordance_checkNONE %>%
    filter(
      Type == "Tumor",
      PatientID %in% TumorwithAF_1$PatientID
    )
  
  Patient <- intersect(
    unique(df_cfDNA$PatientID),
    unique(df_Tumor$PatientID)
  )
  
  Omitcase <- NULL
  Patient <- setdiff(Patient, Omitcase)
  
  df_cfDNA <- df_cfDNA %>% filter(PatientID %in% Patient)
  df_Tumor <- df_Tumor %>% filter(PatientID %in% Patient)
  df_cfDNA_NONE <- df_cfDNA_NONE %>% filter(PatientID %in% Patient)
  df_Tumor_NONE <- df_Tumor_NONE %>% filter(PatientID %in% Patient)
  
  cfDNA_CNVID <- df_cfDNA$CNVID
  Tumor_CNVID <- df_Tumor$CNVID
  cfDNA_NONE_CNVID <- df_cfDNA_NONE$CNVID
  Tumor_NONE_CNVID <- df_Tumor_NONE$CNVID
  
  PatientNum <- length(unique(intersect(df_Tumor$PatientID, df_cfDNA$PatientID)))
  
  TumoronlyCNV <- length(setdiff(Tumor_CNVID, cfDNA_CNVID))
  cfDNAonlyCNV <- length(setdiff(cfDNA_CNVID, Tumor_CNVID))
  SharedCNV <- length(intersect(Tumor_CNVID, cfDNA_CNVID))
  
  TumoronlyNONE <- length(setdiff(Tumor_NONE_CNVID, cfDNA_NONE_CNVID))
  cfDNAonlyNONE <- length(setdiff(cfDNA_NONE_CNVID, Tumor_NONE_CNVID))
  SharedNONE <- length(intersect(Tumor_NONE_CNVID, cfDNA_NONE_CNVID))
  
  CNVRecoveryRate <- SharedCNV / (SharedCNV + TumoronlyCNV)
  NONERecoveryRate <- SharedNONE / (SharedNONE + TumoronlyNONE)
  
  data.frame(
    Stage = selectedstage,
    n = PatientNum,
    CNV.per.patients = (SharedCNV + TumoronlyCNV) / PatientNum,
    Detected = SharedCNV / PatientNum,
    Undetected = TumoronlyCNV / PatientNum,
    Sensitivity = CNVRecoveryRate,
    Specificity = NONERecoveryRate,
    SharedCNV = SharedCNV,
    TumoronlyCNV = TumoronlyCNV,
    cfDNAonlyCNV = cfDNAonlyCNV,
    SharedNONE = SharedNONE,
    TumoronlyNONE = TumoronlyNONE,
    cfDNAonlyNONE = cfDNAonlyNONE
  )
}

# ============================================================
# Run performance calculation
# ============================================================

Performances_df <- bind_rows(
  lapply(Stages, calc_cnv_performance_by_stage)
) %>%
  mutate(
    CNV.per.patients = as.numeric(CNV.per.patients),
    Sensitivity = as.numeric(Sensitivity),
    Specificity = as.numeric(Specificity)
  )

# ============================================================
# Plot CNV performance
# ============================================================

FigS3D <- ggplot(
  Performances_df,
  aes(x = 1 - Specificity, y = Sensitivity, color = Stage)
) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(
    title = "cfDNA CNV calling Performance",
    x = "1 - Specificity",
    y = "Sensitivity"
  ) +
  theme_bw()

Clininfo_AF_combinedplot91 <- Clininfo_AF_combined %>%
  filter(

    Paired_with_Tumor == "YES"

  )

# ============================================================
# Function: CCC calculation
# ============================================================

calc_ccc_by_group <- function(df, group_col, x_col, y_col) {
  df %>%
    group_by({{ group_col }}) %>%
    group_split() %>%
    map_dfr(function(df_group) {
      ccc <- if (nrow(df_group) >= 2) {
        DescTools::CCC(df_group[[x_col]], df_group[[y_col]], na.rm = TRUE)[["rho.c"]]
      } else {
        NA
      }
      
      data.frame(
        TCR_TIorTN = unique(df_group$TCR_TIorTN),
        n = nrow(df_group),
        CCC_TFmut_vs_TFTCR.est = ccc["est"],
        CCC_TFmut_vs_TFTCR.lwr.ci = ccc["lwr.ci"],
        CCC_TFmut_vs_TFTCR.upr.ci = ccc["upr.ci"]
      )
    }) %>%
    mutate(
      label = paste0(
        "CCC = ", round(CCC_TFmut_vs_TFTCR.est, 2),
        " (", round(CCC_TFmut_vs_TFTCR.lwr.ci, 2),
        "-", round(CCC_TFmut_vs_TFTCR.upr.ci, 2), ")"
      )
    )
}
calc_ccc_by_group <- function(df, group_col, x_col, y_col) {
  df %>%
    group_by({{ group_col }}) %>%
    group_split() %>%
    purrr::map_dfr(function(df_group) {
      
      if (nrow(df_group) >= 2) {
        ccc <- DescTools::CCC(
          df_group[[x_col]],
          df_group[[y_col]],
          na.rm = TRUE
        )[["rho.c"]]
      } else {
        ccc <- data.frame(
          est = NA_real_,
          lwr.ci = NA_real_,
          upr.ci = NA_real_
        )
      }
      
      data.frame(
        TCR_TIorTN = unique(df_group$TCR_TIorTN),
        n = nrow(df_group),
        CCC_TFmut_vs_TFTCR.est = ccc$est,
        CCC_TFmut_vs_TFTCR.lwr.ci = ccc$lwr.ci,
        CCC_TFmut_vs_TFTCR.upr.ci = ccc$upr.ci
      )
    }) %>%
    mutate(
      label = paste0(
        "CCC = ", round(CCC_TFmut_vs_TFTCR.est, 2),
        " (", round(CCC_TFmut_vs_TFTCR.lwr.ci, 2),
        "-", round(CCC_TFmut_vs_TFTCR.upr.ci, 2), ")"
      )
    )
}

# ============================================================
# Fig2D: ctDNA level comparison
# ============================================================

resultsLINCCCre <- calc_ccc_by_group(
  Clininfo_AF_combinedplot91,
  TCR_TIorTN,
  "ctDNA_cfDNAinformed_baseline",
  "ctDNA_TCRinformed_baseline"
)

anno <- resultsLINCCCre %>%
  left_join(
    data.frame(
      TCR_TIorTN = c("Both", "Tumoronly", "cfDNAonly"),
      x = c(100, 100, 100),
      y = c(10^5, 10^4, 10^4.5)
    ),
    by = "TCR_TIorTN"
  )

table(Clininfo_AF_combinedplot91$TCR_TIorTN)

Fig2D <- ggplot(
  Clininfo_AF_combinedplot91,
  aes(
    x = ctDNA_cfDNAinformed_baseline,
    y = ctDNA_TCRinformed_baseline,
    color = TCR_TIorTN
  )
) +
  geom_point() +
  scale_x_log10() +
  scale_y_log10(limits = c(10, 100000)) +
  stat_cor(
    method = "pearson",
    label.x = c(0.8, 0.8, 0.8),
    label.y = c(4.75, 4.25, 3.75),
    na.rm = TRUE,
    size = 2.5
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = anno,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = label, color = TCR_TIorTN),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 2.5
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Tumor Burden Concordance of\nMutations vs TCR in Plasma",
    x = "Mutation based ctDNA level (hGE/ml Plasma)",
    y = "TCR based ctDNA level (hGE/ml Plasma)"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = tcr_colors,
    name = "Tumor\nClonotype\nDefined by",
    labels = c(
      "Tumoronly" = "Tumor\nOnly",
      "cfDNAonly" = "cfDNA\nOnly",
      "Both" = "Both",
      "None" = "None"
    )
  ) +
  theme_bw()

# ============================================================
# Add marker fraction columns
# ============================================================

Clininfo_AF_combinedplot91 <- Clininfo_AF_combinedplot91 %>%
  mutate(
    markerTCRGfracBaseline = case_when(
      TCR_TIorTN == "Tumoronly" ~ TI_Tumor_tcrG_fraction_T,
      TCR_TIorTN == "cfDNAonly" ~ TN_Tumor_tcrG_fraction,
      TCR_TIorTN == "Both" ~ pmax(TI_Tumor_tcrG_fraction_T, TN_Tumor_tcrG_fraction, na.rm = TRUE),
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    markerTCRBfracBaseline = case_when(
      TCR_TIorTNtcrB == "Tumoronly" ~ TI_Tumor_tcrB_fraction_T,
      TCR_TIorTNtcrB == "cfDNAonly" ~ TN_Tumor_tcrB_fraction,
      TCR_TIorTNtcrB == "Both" ~ pmax(TI_Tumor_tcrB_fraction_T, TN_Tumor_tcrB_fraction, na.rm = TRUE),
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    markerTCRAfracBaseline = case_when(
      TCR_TIorTNtcrA == "Tumoronly" ~ TI_Tumor_tcrA_fraction_T,
      TCR_TIorTNtcrA == "cfDNAonly" ~ TN_Tumor_tcrA_fraction,
      TCR_TIorTNtcrA == "Both" ~ pmax(TI_Tumor_tcrA_fraction_T, TN_Tumor_tcrA_fraction, na.rm = TRUE),
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
  )

# ============================================================
# Function: TCR fraction boxplot
# ============================================================

make_tcr_fraction_boxplot <- function(
  df,
  locus_title,
  status_col,
  marker_col,
  tumor_col,
  cfdna_col,
  fraction_name
) {
  
  p1 <- df %>%
    filter(.data[[status_col]] %in% c("Tumoronly", "cfDNAonly")) %>%
    transmute(
      Status = .data[[status_col]],
      Fraction = .data[[marker_col]],
      NewStatus = .data[[status_col]]
    )
  
  p2 <- df %>%
    filter(.data[[status_col]] == "Both") %>%
    transmute(
      Status = .data[[status_col]],
      Fraction = .data[[tumor_col]],
      NewStatus = paste0(.data[[status_col]], " in Tumor")
    )
  
  p3 <- df %>%
    filter(.data[[status_col]] == "Both") %>%
    transmute(
      Status = .data[[status_col]],
      Fraction = .data[[cfdna_col]],
      NewStatus = paste0(.data[[status_col]], " in cfDNA")
    )
  
  paired_t <- t.test(p2$Fraction, p3$Fraction, paired = TRUE)
  paired_p <- paired_t$p.value
  
  plot_df <- bind_rows(p1, p2, p3)
  
  ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = NewStatus, y = Fraction, fill = Status)) +
    geom_boxplot() +
    geom_jitter(width = 0.1, alpha = 0.3) +
    geom_segment(
      aes(x = "Both in cfDNA", xend = "Both in Tumor", y = 1.1, yend = 1.1),
      linewidth = 0.5
    ) +
    annotate("text", x = 1.5, y = 1.15, label = "*", size = 6) +
    labs(
      title = locus_title,
      x = "Sample Type",
      y = "Fraction of Tumor clonotype",
      caption = paste0("* Paired t-test p = ", round(paired_p, 3))
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(
      values = c("Tumoronly" = "#FFA500", "cfDNAonly" = "#5B9BD5", "Both" = "pink"),
      name = "Tumor Clonotype\nDefined by",
      labels = c(
        "Tumoronly" = "Tumor Only",
        "cfDNAonly" = "cfDNA Only",
        "Both" = "Both"
      )
    ) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0, size = 8),
      legend.position = "none"
    )
}

# Boxplots by TCR locus

# ============================================================
# Plot300TCR
# ============================================================

Plot300TCR <- ggplot(
  dfTCR_Tumorpaired_long,
  aes(x = Group, y = Fraction * 100, fill = Status)
) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  geom_text(
    data = dfTCR_Tumorpaired_long_detected,
    aes(
      x = Group,
      y = 50,
      label = paste0("n=", Count, "\n", round(Fraction, 3))
    ),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 3
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 110),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0))
  ) +
  scale_x_discrete(
    labels = c(
      "cfDNA and Tumor" = "Both",
      "cfDNA only" = "cfDNA\nonly",
      "Tumor only" = "Tumor\nonly"
    )
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("Detected" = "#5B9BD5", "Undetected" = "#FFA500")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Tumor clonotyping\nperformance",
    x = "Sample Type",
    y = "Percentage"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )

# Numbers from dfTCR_Tumorpaired_long
library(eulerr)
library(grid)

# ============================================================
# Calculate counts
# ============================================================

N_total <- unique(dfTCR_Tumorpaired_long$Total)

cfDNA_total <- dfTCR_Tumorpaired_long %>%
  filter(Group == "cfDNA only", Status == "Detected") %>%
  pull(Count)

Tumor_total <- dfTCR_Tumorpaired_long %>%
  filter(Group == "Tumor only", Status == "Detected") %>%
  pull(Count)

N_union <- dfTCR_Tumorpaired_long %>%
  filter(Group == "cfDNA and Tumor", Status == "Detected") %>%
  pull(Count)

Common <- Tumor_total + cfDNA_total - N_union
Tumor_only <- Tumor_total - Common
cfDNA_only <- cfDNA_total - Common
Not_defined <- N_total - N_union

# ============================================================
# Euler fit
# ============================================================

fit <- euler(c(
  "Tumor" = Tumor_only,
  "cfDNA" = cfDNA_only,
  "Tumor&cfDNA" = Common
))

venn_grob <- plot(
  fit,
  fills = c(
    "Tumor" = "#FFA500",
    "cfDNA" = "#5B9BD5",
    "Tumor&cfDNA"="pink"
  ),
  alpha = 0.65,
  edges = list(col = "black", lwd = 2),
  quantities = FALSE,
  labels = FALSE
)

venn_grob_scaled <- editGrob(
  venn_grob,
  vp = viewport(
    x = 0.50,
    y = 0.50,
    width = 0.72,
    height = 0.4
  )
)

outer_rect <- rectGrob(
  x = 0.5,
  y = 0.5,
  width = 0.8,
  height = 0.45,
  gp = gpar(
    col = NA,
    fill = "lightgray",
    lwd = 2
  )
)

not_defined_text <- textGrob(
  paste0(
    "Not defined\nN = ", Not_defined,
    "\n", round(Not_defined / N_total * 100, 1), "%"
  ),
  x = 0.80, y = 0.70,
  gp = gpar(fontsize = 6, col = "black")
)

Title_text <- textGrob("Tumor Clonotyping\nPerformance",
  x = 0.50, y = 0.92,
  gp = gpar(
    fontsize = 11,
    col = "black"
  )
)

union_text <- textGrob(
  paste0(
    "Union\nN = ", N_union, "/", N_total,
    "\n", round(N_union / N_total * 100, 1), "%"
  ),
  x = 0.50, y = 0.75,
  gp = gpar(
    fontsize = 8,
    fontface = "bold",
    col = "black"
  )
)

both_text <- textGrob(
  paste0(
    "Both\nN = ", Common,
    "\n", round(Common / N_total * 100, 1), "%"
  ),
  x = 0.50, y = 0.47,
  gp = gpar(fontsize = 6, col = "black")
)

tumor_text <- textGrob(
  paste0(
    "Tumor only\nN = ", Tumor_only,
    "\n", round(Tumor_only / N_total * 100, 1), "%"
  ),
  x = 0.18, y = 0.32,
  gp = gpar(
    fontsize = 7,
    col = "darkorange"
  )
)

cfdna_text <- textGrob(
  paste0(
    "cfDNA only\nN = ", cfDNA_only,
    "\n", round(cfDNA_only / N_total * 100, 1), "%"
  ),
  x = 0.82, y = 0.32,
  gp = gpar(
    fontsize = 7,
    col = "darkblue"
  )
)

Fig2C <- grobTree(
  Title_text,
  outer_rect,
  venn_grob_scaled,
  not_defined_text,
  union_text,
  both_text,
  tumor_text,
  cfdna_text
)
```

```{r}
TCRbased <- Clininfo_AF_combinedcorr$ctDNA_TCRinformed_baseline

TImut <- Clininfo_AF_combinedcorr$ctDNA_Tumorinformed_baseline
TCRbased <- Clininfo_AF_combinedcorr$ctDNA_TCRinformed_baseline

spearman2 <- resultcor$estimate

results <- rbind(additionalrow1,additionalrow2,additionalrow3,additionalrow4)

results_df$rho <- as.numeric(results_df$rho)
results_df$V1 <- as.numeric(results_df$V1)

label_df <- results_df %>% 
  distinct(V1, V2) %>% 
  arrange(V1)

FigS3F <- ggplot(results_df, aes(x = V1, y = rho)) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(
    title = "Correlation of Tissue Biopsy Naive vs. \ninformed ctDNA level"
  )+

  ylab("Spearman Rho") +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = label_df$V1,
    labels = as.character(label_df$V2)
  ) +
  theme_bw()
```

#Fig2A
#mutation file
```{r}
# ============================================================
# Remove unwanted mutations
# ============================================================

remove_func <- c(
  "ncRNA_exonic",
  "ncRNA_intronic",
  "intergenic",
  "upstream",
  "downstream",
  "intronic"
)

df_mutation_removed <- df_mutation %>%
  filter(!Func.refGeneWithVer %in% remove_func) %>%
  filter(!ExonicFunc.refGeneWithVer %in% c("synonymous SNV"))

# ============================================================
# Select mutations above tumor threshold
# ============================================================

df_mutation_removed_tumor <- df_mutation_removed %>%
  filter(AF... > threshold_Tumor) %>%
  mutate(SampleID2 = SampleID) %>%
  separate(SampleID2, c("Sample", "Type"), sep = "-") %>%
  mutate(
    Type2 = substr(Type, 1, 1),
    Timepoint = substr(Type, nchar(Type), nchar(Type)),
    ExonicFunc.refGene = ifelse(
      ExonicFunc.refGeneWithVer == ".",
      Func.refGeneWithVer,
      ExonicFunc.refGeneWithVer
    )
  )

# ============================================================
# Reformat mutation matrix
# ============================================================

df_mutation_reformat <- acast(
  df_mutation_removed_tumor,
  Gene.refGeneWithVer ~ SampleID,
  value.var = "ExonicFunc.refGene",
  fun.aggregate = function(x) paste(unique(x), collapse = ", ")
) %>%
  as.data.frame()

df_mutation_reformat <- df_mutation_reformat %>%
  filter(!rownames(df_mutation_reformat) %in% blacklist)

# ============================================================
# Add back samples without mutations
# ============================================================

Included_samples <- unique(df_mutation_removed_tumor$SampleID)

excluded_samples <- setdiff(
  all_atDx_sample_filtered,
  Included_samples
)

if (length(excluded_samples) > 0) {
  new_columns <- sapply(
    excluded_samples,
    function(p) vector(mode = "character", length = nrow(df_mutation_reformat))
  )
  
  df_mutation_reformat <- cbind(
    df_mutation_reformat,
    new_columns
  )
}
```

#Fig2A
#CNV file
```{r}
# ============================================================
# Read and merge CNV data
# ============================================================

#df_CNV <- read.delim("merged.allPTCL.CNV4re.txt", header = 1)
#df_CNV_v4 <- read.delim("merge.TCLv4.canary2re.txt", header = 1)

df_CNV <- df_CNV %>%
  filter(!SampleID %in% df_CNV_v4$SampleID)

df_CNVmt <- bind_rows(df_CNV, df_CNV_v4) %>%
  mutate(SampleID = gsub("Sample_", "", SampleID)) %>%
  separate(
    SampleID,
    c("SampleID", "Type"),
    sep = "_",
    fill = "right",
    extra = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Cohort = substr(SampleID, 1, 3),
    cytobandname = paste0(X.chr, name)
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(gc.corrected.norm.log.std.index.zWeighted.Final),
    !is.na(gc.corrected.norm.log.index.Final)
  ) %>%
  mutate(SampleID2 = SampleID) %>%
  separate(SampleID2, c("PatientID", "TypeTimepoint"), sep = "-") %>%
  mutate(SampleID = gsub("PL9", "C1", SampleID)) %>%
  filter(TypeTimepoint != "N1")

# ============================================================
# Calculate control-based LOB
# ============================================================

CNVLOB <- 2.5
cutoff <- 4

df_CNV_CTR <- df_CNVmt %>%
  filter(Cohort == "CTR") %>%
  group_by(cytobandname) %>%
  summarise(
    Zscore_mean = mean(as.numeric(gc.corrected.norm.log.std.index.zWeighted.Final), na.rm = TRUE),
    Zscore_std  = sd(as.numeric(gc.corrected.norm.log.std.index.zWeighted.Final), na.rm = TRUE),
    Log2_mean   = mean(as.numeric(gc.corrected.norm.log.index.Final), na.rm = TRUE),
    Log2_std    = sd(as.numeric(gc.corrected.norm.log.index.Final), na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    LOB_Amp_Zscore = Zscore_mean + CNVLOB * Zscore_std,
    LOB_Del_Zscore = Zscore_mean - CNVLOB * Zscore_std,
    LOB_Amp_Log    = Log2_mean + CNVLOB * Log2_std,
    LOB_Del_Log    = Log2_mean - CNVLOB * Log2_std
  )

write.csv(
  df_CNV_CTR,
  "Cutoff_for_CNV_analysis.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

# ============================================================
# Function: call CNV
# ============================================================

call_cnv <- function(df, ctr_df, cutoff = 4) {
  inner_join(df, ctr_df, by = "cytobandname") %>%
    mutate(
      gc.corrected.norm.log.std.index.zWeighted.Final =
        as.numeric(gc.corrected.norm.log.std.index.zWeighted.Final),
      
      AmpDel = case_when(
        is.na(gc.corrected.norm.log.std.index.zWeighted.Final) ~ "none",
        gc.corrected.norm.log.std.index.zWeighted.Final < -cutoff ~ "Del",
        gc.corrected.norm.log.std.index.zWeighted.Final >  cutoff ~ "Amp",
        TRUE ~ "none"
      ),
      
      PatientID2 = gsub("TSTCL", "", PatientID),
      Cohort2 = substr(PatientID2, 1, 1),
      SampleID = gsub("PL9", "C1", SampleID)
    )
}

# ============================================================
# Call CNV
# ============================================================

df_CNV_merge <- call_cnv(df_CNVmt, df_CNV_CTR, cutoff)
df_CNV_tumor_merge <- call_cnv(df_CNVmt, df_CNV_CTR, cutoff)

# ============================================================
# Select baseline cfDNA and baseline tumor samples
# ============================================================

df_CNV_merge_selected <- df_CNV_merge %>%
  filter(SampleID %in% all_cfDNAatDx_sample_filtered)

Patient_list <- unique(
  sub("-.*$", "", as.character(all_cfDNAatDx_sample_filtered))
)

df_CNV_tumor_merge_selected <- df_CNV_tumor_merge %>%
  filter(SampleID %in% all_atDx_sample_filtered)

# ============================================================
# Function: apply LOB filter and create gene_symbol
# ============================================================

apply_lob_filter <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(
      AmpDel_clean = case_when(
        AmpDel == "Amp" &
          gc.corrected.norm.log.std.index.zWeighted.Final > LOB_Amp_Zscore ~ "Amp",
        AmpDel == "Del" &
          gc.corrected.norm.log.std.index.zWeighted.Final < LOB_Del_Zscore ~ "Del",
        TRUE ~ "none"
      )
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(AmpDel_clean)) %>%
    mutate(
      gene_symbol = paste0(cytobandname, "_", AmpDel_clean)
    )
}

df_CNV_merge_lesions_LOBfilter_removed <- df_CNV_merge_selected %>%
  apply_lob_filter()

df_CNV_tumor_merge_lesions_LOBfilter_removed <- df_CNV_tumor_merge_selected %>%
  apply_lob_filter()

# ============================================================
# Reformat cfDNA CNV matrix
# ============================================================

df_CNV_reformat <- acast(
  df_CNV_merge_lesions_LOBfilter_removed,
  cytobandname ~ PatientID,
  value.var = "AmpDel_clean"
) %>%
  as.data.frame()

df_CNV_reformat$count_none <- apply(
  df_CNV_reformat,
  1,
  function(x) sum(x == "none")
)

df_CNV_reformat_re <- df_CNV_reformat %>%
  filter(count_none < 162 - 162 * 0.05)

df_CNV_reformat_re <- df_CNV_reformat_re[, 1:(ncol(df_CNV_reformat) - 1)]

# ============================================================
# Check specific cytoband
# ============================================================

df_CNV_tumor_merge_lesions_LOBfilter_removed_check <-
  df_CNV_tumor_merge_lesions_LOBfilter_removed %>%
  mutate(cytosample = paste0(SampleID, "_", cytobandname)) %>%
  filter(cytobandname == "chr10q26.13")

# ============================================================
# Reformat tumor CNV matrix
# ============================================================

df_CNV_tumor_reformat <- acast(
  df_CNV_tumor_merge_lesions_LOBfilter_removed,
  cytobandname ~ SampleID,
  value.var = "AmpDel_clean",
  fun.aggregate = function(x) paste(unique(x), collapse = ", ")
) %>%
  as.data.frame()

df_CNV_tumor_reformat$count_none <- apply(
  df_CNV_tumor_reformat,
  1,
  function(x) sum(x == "none")
)

df_CNV_tumor_reformat_re <- df_CNV_tumor_reformat %>%
  filter(count_none < ncol(df_CNV_tumor_reformat) - ncol(df_CNV_tumor_reformat) * 0.05)

df_CNV_tumor_reformat_re <- df_CNV_tumor_reformat_re[, 1:(ncol(df_CNV_reformat) - 1)]

```

#Fig2A,FigS2 Draw
```{r}
# ============================================================
# Shared settings for cfDNA oncoprint
# ============================================================
#Function to remove double counted genes (but keep unique CNVs)
col_SNV2 = c("frameshift deletion" = "#191970", "nonframeshift deletion" = "lightblue", "frameshift insertion" = "#ffd700", "nonframeshift insertion" = "#ffd799", "stopgain" = "#32cd32", "nonsynonymous SNV" = "#ff00ff", "startloss" = "#66cdaa", "synonymous SNV" ="#000000", "intronic" = "#fffacd", "stoploss" = "#ffd700", "UTR3" = "#ff8c00", "intergenic" = "#e6e6fa", "upstream" = "#808000", "splicing" = "#8a2be2", "downstream" = "#bc8f8f", "Amp"="red", "Del"="blue", "none"="gray","UTR5"="#556b2f")

# Splitting multiple variant types per gene
alter_fun = function(x, y, w, h, v) {
  n = sum(v)  # How many variant classes for current gene in current sample - used to split cells
  
  h = h*0.9
  alter_graphic("rect", fill = "#CCCCCC")
  # use `names(which(v))` to correctly map between `v` and `col`
  if(n==0) grid.rect(x, y, w*0.9, h,
                     gp = gpar(fill = "#CCCCCC", col = NA))
  else if(n) grid.rect(x, y - h*0.5 + 1:n/n*h, w*0.9, 1/n*h,
                       gp = gpar(fill = col_SNV2[names(which(v))], col = NA), just = "top")
  #if(v["predx"]) grid.points(x, y, pch = 21, gp=gpar(fill="springgreen4"))
}


collapse_duplicate_features <- function(mat) {
  rn <- rownames(mat)
  rn_clean <- ifelse(
    grepl("^chr", rn),
    rn,
    sub("\\.[0-9]+$", "", rn)
  )
  mat$Feature <- rn_clean
  mat_collapsed <- mat %>%
    group_by(Feature) %>%
    summarise(
      across(
        everything(),
        ~ paste(unique(.x[.x != "" & !is.na(.x)]), collapse = ", ")
      ),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    as.data.frame()
  rownames(mat_collapsed) <- mat_collapsed$Feature
  mat_collapsed$Feature <- NULL
  mat_collapsed
}

disease_levels <- c(
  "ATLL", "TFH", "PTCLNOS", "ALKnegALCL", "ALKposALCL",
  "ENKTL", "MEITL", "TFHDLBCL", "PCGDTCL", "SS",
  "MFLCT", "Others", "Unknown"
)

stage_col <- c(
  "I" = "#1e50a2",
  "II" = "lightblue",
  "III" = "lightcoral",
  "IV" = "#c53d43"
)

tcr_col <- c(
  "Both" = "pink",
  "Tumoronly" = "orange",
  "cfDNAonly" = "#5B9BD5",
  "None" = "black"
)

col_SNV2 <- c(
  "nonsynonymous SNV" = "#ff00ff",
  "stopgain" = "#32cd32",
  "startloss" = "#66cdaa",
  "splicing" = "#8a2be2",
  "frameshift insertion" = "#ffd700",
  "nonframeshift insertion" = "#ffd799",
  "frameshift deletion" = "#191970",
  "nonframeshift deletion" = "lightblue",
  "UTR3" = "#ff8c00",
  "UTR5" = "#556b2f",
  "Amp" = "red",
  "Del" = "blue"
)

legend_order <- names(col_SNV2)

needtoomit <- c(
  "chr10q24.1", "chr2q33.2", "CD28.1", "chr17p13.1",
  "chr5q31.1", "chr5q35.2", "chr5q33.3", "chr5q35.1",
  "chr5q34", "chr10q23.31"
)

if (!exists("disease2_colors")) {
  disease2_colors <- setNames(
    grDevices::rainbow(length(disease_levels)),
    disease_levels
  )
}

missing_disease_colors <- setdiff(disease_levels, names(disease2_colors))
if (length(missing_disease_colors) > 0) {
  disease2_colors[missing_disease_colors] <- "gray80"
}

disease2_colors["Others"] <- "gray"
disease2_colors["Unknown"] <- "gray80"

# ============================================================
# Helper functions
# ============================================================

prepare_cfDNA_oncoprint <- function(cols_to_drop = NULL,
                                    sample_suffix_pattern = "-(C1|P1|P01|C3|P2|P4|P6)$") {
  
  cfDNA_cols <- grepl(
    "-(C1|P1|P01)$|^TSTCL054-C3$",
    colnames(df_combined_reformat_filtered2)
  )
  
  df_cfDNA <- df_combined_reformat_filtered2[, cfDNA_cols, drop = FALSE] %>%
    dplyr::select(-any_of(cols_to_drop))
  
  patient_order <- colnames(df_cfDNA)
  patient_order2 <- gsub(sample_suffix_pattern, "", patient_order)
  
  readanno_sorted <- Clininfo_AF_combined[
    match(patient_order2, Clininfo_AF_combined$PatientID),
  ]
  
  rownames(readanno_sorted) <- patient_order
  
  readanno_sorted <- readanno_sorted %>%
    mutate(
      Disease2 = ifelse(
        Disease %in% c("ATLLacutetype", "ATLLlymphoma"),
        "ATLL",
        Disease
      ),
      Disease2 = ifelse(Disease2 == "AITL_DLBCL", "TFHDLBCL", Disease2),
      Disease2 = ifelse(is.na(Disease2), "Unknown", Disease2)
    )
  
  grouping <- factor(readanno_sorted$Disease2, levels = disease_levels)
  
  top_annotation <- HeatmapAnnotation(
    Disease = readanno_sorted$Disease2,
    Stage = readanno_sorted$AnnArborStage,
    TCRmarker = readanno_sorted$TCR_TIorTN,
    col = list(
      Disease = disease2_colors,
      Stage = stage_col,
      TCRmarker = tcr_col
    ),
    simple_anno_size = unit(3, "mm"),
    annotation_height = c(
      Disease = unit(5, "mm"),
      Stage = unit(2.5, "mm"),
      TCRmarker = unit(2.5, "mm")
    ),
    annotation_name_gp = gpar(fontsize = 6.5),
    annotation_legend_param = list(
      Disease = list(title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 6), labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 6), nrow = 2),
      Stage = list(title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 6), labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 6), nrow = 1),
      TCRmarker = list(title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 6), labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 6), nrow = 1)
    )
  )
  
  df_cfDNA2b <- df_cfDNA %>%
    mutate(across(everything(), ~ replace_na(as.character(.x), "none"))) %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.character), ~ ifelse(.x == "none", "", .x)))
  
  list(
    mat = df_cfDNA2b,
    annotation = top_annotation,
    grouping = grouping
  )
}

make_oncoprint_matrix <- function(mat, min_samples = 5, force_genes = NULL) {
  
  mat_filtered <- mat[
    rowSums(mat != "") >= min_samples,
    ,
    drop = FALSE
  ]
  
  mat_filtered <- mat_filtered[
    !(rownames(mat_filtered) %in% needtoomit),
    ,
    drop = FALSE
  ]
  
  if (!is.null(force_genes)) {
    force_genes <- intersect(rownames(mat), force_genes)
    extra <- mat[force_genes, , drop = FALSE]
    
    mat_filtered <- rbind(
      mat_filtered,
      extra[
        setdiff(rownames(extra), rownames(mat_filtered)),
        ,
        drop = FALSE
      ]
    )
  }
  
  mat_filtered
}

make_row_fontface <- function(mat) {
  ifelse(grepl("^chr", rownames(mat)), "plain", "italic")
}

# ============================================================
# Figure 2A
# ============================================================

cols_to_drop_fig2a <- c(
  "TSTCL051-P1", "TSTCL048-C1", "TSTCL050-C1", "TSTCL050-P01",
  "TSTCL016-P1", "TSTCL059-C1",
  "TSTCL041-P01", "TSTCL040-P01", "TSTCL039-P01", "TSTCL042-P01",
  "TSTCL035-P01", "TSTCL034-P01", "TSTCL052-C1", "TSTCL054-C3",
  "TSTCL049-P01", "TSTCL049-C1", "TSTCL032-P01", "TSTCL033-P01",
  "TSTCL037-P01"
)

cfDNA_fig2a <- prepare_cfDNA_oncoprint(cols_to_drop = cols_to_drop_fig2a)

force_genes_fig2a <- c(
  "JAK1", "JAK3", "CDKN2A", "STAT5B",
  "chr9p24.1", "chr9p21.3", "chr2p23.2"
)

df_cfDNA_fig2a <- make_oncoprint_matrix(
  mat = cfDNA_fig2a$mat,
  min_samples = 10,
  force_genes = force_genes_fig2a
)

right_bar <- rowAnnotation(
  row_barplot = anno_oncoprint_barplot(
    width = unit(0.5, "inch"),
    border = FALSE,
    axis_param = list(gp = gpar(fontsize = 6))
  )
)

df_cfDNA_fig2a <- collapse_duplicate_features(df_cfDNA_fig2a)

SNV_cfDNA_fig2a <- oncoPrint(
  df_cfDNA_fig2a,
  show_column_names = FALSE,
  top_annotation = cfDNA_fig2a$annotation,
  alter_fun = alter_fun,
  col = col_SNV2,
  show_row_dend = FALSE,
  row_dend_reorder = TRUE,
  column_split = cfDNA_fig2a$grouping,
  column_title = "Nodal PTCL Oncoprint (cfDNA only)",
  row_names_gp = gpar(
    fontsize = 5.5,
    fontface = make_row_fontface(df_cfDNA_fig2a)
  ),
  right_annotation = right_bar,
  heatmap_legend_param = list(
    title = "Alteration",
    at = legend_order,
    labels = legend_order,
    title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 6),
    labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 6),
    ncol = 1
  )
)

pdf("00Figure2A.pdf", width = 8.5, height = 4.5)
draw(
  SNV_cfDNA_fig2a,
  heatmap_legend_side = "right",
  annotation_legend_side = "bottom"
)
dev.off()

# ============================================================
# Figure S2
# ============================================================

cfDNA_figS2 <- prepare_cfDNA_oncoprint(cols_to_drop = NULL)

df_cfDNA_figS2 <- make_oncoprint_matrix(
  mat = cfDNA_figS2$mat,
  min_samples = 5,
  force_genes = NULL
)

df_cfDNA_figS2 <- collapse_duplicate_features(df_cfDNA_figS2)

SNV_cfDNA_figS2 <- oncoPrint(
  df_cfDNA_figS2,
  show_column_names = FALSE,
  top_annotation = cfDNA_figS2$annotation,
  alter_fun = alter_fun,
  col = col_SNV2,
  show_row_dend = FALSE,
  row_dend_reorder = TRUE,
  column_split = cfDNA_figS2$grouping,
  column_title = "PTCL Oncoprint (cfDNA only)",
  row_names_gp = gpar(
    fontsize = 8,
    fontface = make_row_fontface(df_cfDNA_figS2)
  ),
  heatmap_legend_param = list(
    title = "Alteration",
    at = legend_order,
    labels = legend_order,
    title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 6),
    labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 6),
    ncol = 1
  )
)

pdf("00FigureS2.pdf", width = 8.5, height = 11)
draw(
  SNV_cfDNA_figS2,
  heatmap_legend_side = "right",
  annotation_legend_side = "bottom"
)
dev.off()
```

```{r}
grob2D <- arrangeGrob(ggplotGrob(Fig2D), 
                     top = textGrob("D", x = unit(0, "npc"), just = "left",
                                    gp = gpar(fontface = "bold", fontsize = 12)))
#Tumor TCR is enriched in cfDNA than in Tumor Tissue
Fig2E <- Fig2E +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c(
    "cfDNAonly" = "cfDNA only",
    "Tumoronly"  = "Tumor only"
    )) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 8, angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 8),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 10, hjust = 0.5)
  )
grob2E <- arrangeGrob(Fig2E, 
                     top = textGrob("E", x = unit(0, "npc"), just = "left",
                                    gp = gpar(fontface = "bold", fontsize = 12)))

#Blank
grobBlank <- arrangeGrob(ggplotGrob(Blank))

# Top row (A,B,C)
top_row <- arrangeGrob(grobBlank, grob2A, grobBlank, 
                       ncol = 3, widths = c(0.1, 6, 0.1))
top2_row <- arrangeGrob(grobBlank, grob2B, grobBlank, grob2C, grobBlank, grob2D, grobBlank,grob2E, grobBlank,ncol = 9, widths = c(0.1, 1.5, 0.1, 1.5, 0.1, 1.8, 0.1,1.5,0.1))


#Buffer row
buffer_row <- arrangeGrob(grobBlank, ncol = 1, widths = c(1))

Figure2 <- arrangeGrob(HEADER2,top_row, buffer_row, top2_row, ncol = 1, heights = c(0.1,2.5,0.1,1.9))

grid.newpage()
grid.draw(Figure2)
ggsave("00Figure2New2.pdf", Figure2, width = 8.5, height = 8, dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
  filter(!Disease %in% c("ALKposALCL","ALKnegALCL","ATLLacutetype","ATLLlymphoma")) 
Clininfo_AF_combined_nonALCL <- Clininfo_AF_combined %>%

  mutate(PFS=Days_EFS/30.44) %>%
  dplyr::select(PFS="PFS",PFScensor="EFS",x="ctDNA_cfDNAinformed_baseline")
Clininfo_AF_combined_forragplot_nonALCL <- Clininfo_AF_combined_selected_nonALCL %>% 
  filter(!is.na(PFScensor)) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(PFS)) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(x))
Clininfo_AF_combined_forragplot_nonALCL$PFS <- as.numeric(as.character(Clininfo_AF_combined_forragplot_nonALCL$PFS))
Clininfo_AF_combined_forragplot_nonALCL$x <- as.numeric(Clininfo_AF_combined_forragplot_nonALCL$x)
```
