#Spiderplot
```{r}
cfDNA_SNVINDEL_select <- cfDNA25pctMax
colnames(cfDNA_SNVINDEL_select) <- c("Sample","Combined_AF")

Clininfo_AF_combined_baseline <- Clininfo_AF_combined %>% 
  dplyr::select(Sample="Sample1",cfDNAconcpermlPlasma="cfDNAconcpermlPlasma_atDiagnosis")%>% 
  filter(!is.na(cfDNAconcpermlPlasma))
Clininfo_AF_combined_C1D8 <- Clininfo_AF_combined %>% 
  dplyr::select(Sample="Sample2",cfDNAconcpermlPlasma="cfDNAconcpermlPlasma_atC1D8") %>% 
  filter(!is.na(cfDNAconcpermlPlasma))
Clininfo_AF_combined_EOT<- Clininfo_AF_combined %>% 
  dplyr::select(Sample="Sample3",cfDNAconcpermlPlasma="cfDNAconcpermlPlasma_atEOT") %>% 
  filter(!is.na(cfDNAconcpermlPlasma))
cfDNAyield <- rbind(Clininfo_AF_combined_baseline, Clininfo_AF_combined_C1D8, Clininfo_AF_combined_EOT)

cfDNA_SNVINDEL_select_cfDNAyield <- cfDNA_SNVINDEL_select %>% 
  left_join(cfDNAyield, by = "Sample") %>% 
  filter(!is.na(cfDNAconcpermlPlasma)) %>% 
  mutate(ctDNA_level_log = log(cfDNAconcpermlPlasma*(Combined_AF)*333+0.01,10),
         SampleID2 = Sample) %>% 
  separate(SampleID2, c("PatientID","TypeTimepoint"), sep = "-") %>% 
  left_join(Clininfo_AF_combined, by = "PatientID") %>% 
  filter(!is.na(PETCT_EOT))


cfDNA_SNVINDEL_select_cfDNAyield_WASHU <- cfDNA_SNVINDEL_select_cfDNAyield %>% 
  filter(Cohort == "NCT03297697") %>% 
  add_count(PatientID, name = "Count") %>% 
  mutate(Sample_collection = ifelse(Count==3,"All Timepoint","Pre-EOT only"))

Spider <- ggplot(
  cfDNA_SNVINDEL_select_cfDNAyield_WASHU,
  aes(x = TypeTimepoint,
      y = ctDNA_level_log,
      group = PatientID,
      color = PETCT_EOT,
      linetype = Sample_collection,
      alpha   = Sample_collection)
  ) +
  geom_line(size = 0.5) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c(
    "All Timepoint"       = "solid",
    "Pre-EOT only" = "dashed")) +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c(
    "All Timepoint"     = 1.0,
    "Pre-EOT only" = 0.5
  ))+
  guides(
    color = guide_legend(
      title = "EOT PET",
      nrow = 1, byrow = TRUE,
      override.aes = list(linetype = 1, alpha = 1, size = 0.7)  # 見やすさ調整（任意）
    ),
    linetype = guide_legend(title = "Sample\ncollection",
                            nrow = 3, byrow = TRUE),
    alpha = "none"
  )+
  labs(linetype = "Sample\ncollection",
       color    = "EOT PET")

FigS5D <- Spider
```

```{r}
HEADER <- ggplot() + theme_void()
HEADERFigS5 <- arrangeGrob(ggplotGrob(HEADER), 
                     top = textGrob("Figure S5", x = unit(0, "npc"), just = "left",
                                    gp = gpar(fontface = "bold", fontsize = 12)))
HEADERS5 <- arrangeGrob(HEADERFigS5, ncol = 1, widths = c(3))

Blank <- ggplot() + theme_void()
grobBlank <- arrangeGrob(ggplotGrob(Blank))

#Tissue Biopsy Naive mutation/TCR

              top = textGrob("A", x = unit(0, "npc"), just = "left",

)

#Tissue Biopsy Informed TCR
plot_grob_S5C <- ggplotGrob(Plot27$plot)
risk_table_grob_S5C <- ggplotGrob(Plot27$table)
grobS5C <- arrangeGrob(
  arrangeGrob(plot_grob_S5C,

plot_grob_S5C2 <- ggplotGrob(Plot31$plot)
risk_table_grob_S5C2 <- ggplotGrob(Plot31$table)
grobS5C2 <- arrangeGrob(
  arrangeGrob(plot_grob_S5C2, 
              top = textGrob("", x = unit(0, "npc"), just = "left",

#Spider Plot
Spider <- Spider + labs(title = "Spiderplot ctDNA level")
Spider <- Spider +
  scale_x_discrete(
    limits = c("P1","P2","P3"),
    labels = c("P1" = "Pre",
               "P2" = "C1D8",
               "P3" = "EOT")) +
  ylab(expression("cfDNA level (hGE/ml plasma, " * log[10] * ")"))+
  guides(
    color    = guide_legend(order = 1),
    linetype = guide_legend(order = 2)
  )
Spider <- Spider + theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 10, hjust = 0.5),
                         legend.position  = "bottom",
                         legend.box         = "vertical", 
                         legend.title     = element_text(size = 8),
                         legend.text      = element_text(size = 8),
                         axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
                         axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
                         legend.key.height= unit(4, "pt"),
                         legend.key.width = unit(10, "pt"),
                         legend.spacing.x = unit(2, "pt"),
                         legend.spacing.y = unit(2, "pt"),
                         legend.box.spacing = unit(2, "pt"))
grobS5D <- arrangeGrob(ggplotGrob(Spider), 
                     top = textGrob("D", x = unit(0, "npc"), just = "left",
                                    gp = gpar(fontface = "bold", fontsize = 12)))

# Arrange rows
cap_row <- arrangeGrob(grobBlank, ncol = 1)
middle_row <- arrangeGrob(grobBlank,grobS5A,grobBlank,grobS5A2,grobBlank,grobS5B,grobBlank,grobS5B2,grobBlank, ncol = 9, widths = c(0.1,1,0.1,1,0.1,1,0.1,1,0.1))
bottom_row <- arrangeGrob(grobBlank, grobS5C, grobBlank, grobS5C2, grobBlank, grobS5D, grobBlank, grobBlank, grobBlank, ncol = 9, widths = c(0.1,1,0.1,1,0.1,1,0.1,1,0.1))
FigureS5 <- arrangeGrob(HEADERFigS5, middle_row, bottom_row, ncol = 1, heights = c(0.1,1,1))
grid.newpage()
grid.draw(FigureS5)
ggsave("00FigureS5New.pdf", FigureS5, width = 8.5, height = 7.5, dpi = 300)

```

#Viral Analysis
```{r}
FigS6A <- ggplot(Clininfo_AF_combined_ENKTL, aes(x=cfEBV_1,y=ctDNA_cfDNAinformed_baseline))+
  geom_point() +
  scale_x_log10()+
  scale_y_log10()+
  stat_cor(method = "spearman", na.rm = TRUE) +
  theme_bw()+
  #stat_cor(method = "pearson", na.rm = TRUE) +
  labs(
    title = "Mutation based ctDNA vs. Viral load",
    x = "EBV viral load",
    y = "Tissue Biopsy Naive ctDNA level \n (hGE/ml Plasma)"
  ) +   
  theme_bw()  

#HTLV1 viral load x mutation based ctDNA level
Clininfo_AF_combined_ATLL2 <- Clininfo_AF_combined %>% 
  filter(Disease %in% c("ATLLacutetype","ATLLlymphoma")) %>% 
  filter(!PatientID %in% c("TCL038","TCL044"))
Fig5A <- ggplot(Clininfo_AF_combined_ATLL2, aes(x=cfHTLV1_1,y=ctDNA_cfDNAinformed_baseline))+
  geom_point() +
  scale_x_log10()+
  scale_y_log10() +
  stat_cor(
    method = "pearson", 
    na.rm = TRUE,
    size = 3
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Mutation based ctDNA\nvs. HTLV-1 load in ATLL",
    x = "HTLV1 viral load",
    y = "Tissue Biopsy Naive ctDNA level \n (hGE/ml Plasma)"
  ) +   
  theme_bw()


EBV_order <- Clininfo_AF_combined %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(cfEBV_1),
    !is.na(Disease),
    Disease != "",
    Disease != "AITL_DLBCL"
  ) %>%
  group_by(Disease) %>%
  summarise(median_EBV = median(cfEBV_1, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  arrange(desc(median_EBV)) %>%
  pull(Disease)

Clininfo_AF_combined_EBVsorted <- Clininfo_AF_combined %>%
  filter(!is.na(cfEBV_1), Disease != "AITL_DLBCL", !is.na(Disease) , Disease != "") %>%
  mutate(Disease = factor(Disease, levels = EBV_order))
  

Fig5B <- ggplot(Clininfo_AF_combined_EBVsorted,
                  aes(x = Disease, y = cfEBV_1)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(fill = Disease),
               outlier.shape = NA,          # ← これが正しい
               alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_jitter(aes(color = Disease),
              width = 0.1, alpha = 0.8, size = 1.5, show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_y_log10() +
  labs(
    title = "EBV load by Disease subtypes",
    x = "Disease subtypes",
    y = "EBV viral load"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = disease4_colors,
    breaks = names(disease4_colors),
    drop = FALSE,
    guide = "none"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = disease4_colors,
    breaks = names(disease4_colors),
    drop = FALSE,
    guide = "none"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

#Decide cutoff by maxstat for ATLL by HTLV1 viral load
Clininfo_AF_combined_HTLV1 <- Clininfo_AF_combined_omit_ATLL %>% 
  mutate(cfHTLV1_1_log = log10(cfHTLV1_1))
###Maxstat for non-LOG
cutoffHTLV <- maxstat.test(Surv(Days_EFS, EFS) ~ cfHTLV1_1, data=Clininfo_AF_combined_HTLV1,smethod="LogRank",
pmethod="Lau94", alpha=0.05)
cutoffHTLVv <- cutoffHTLV$estimate[1]
###Set High-Low for HTLV1
Clininfo_AF_combined_HTLV1 <- Clininfo_AF_combined_HTLV1 %>% 
  mutate(Baseline_ctDNAHTLV1 = ifelse(cfHTLV1_1 > cutoffHTLVv,"High","Low"))
###Make models
surv_obj_HTLV1 <- Surv(time = Clininfo_AF_combined_HTLV1$Days_EFS, 
                 event = Clininfo_AF_combined_HTLV1$EFS)
fit_HTLV1 <- survfit(surv_obj_HTLV1 ~ Baseline_ctDNAHTLV1, data = Clininfo_AF_combined_HTLV1)
cox_model_HTLV1 <- coxph(
  Surv(time = Clininfo_AF_combined_HTLV1$Days_EFS, 
       event = Clininfo_AF_combined_HTLV1$EFS) ~ cfHTLV1_1,
  data = Clininfo_AF_combined_HTLV1
)

###Maxstat for HTLV1_log
cutoffHTLV_log <- maxstat.test(Surv(Days_EFS, EFS) ~ cfHTLV1_1_log, data=Clininfo_AF_combined_HTLV1,smethod="LogRank",
                           pmethod="Lau94", alpha=0.05)
cutoffHTLV_logv <- cutoffHTLV_log$estimate[1]
###Set High-Low for HTLV1_log
Clininfo_AF_combined_HTLV1 <- Clininfo_AF_combined_HTLV1 %>% 
  mutate(Baseline_ctDNAHTLV1_log = ifelse(cfHTLV1_1_log > cutoffHTLV_logv,"High","Low"))
###Make models for log
surv_obj_HTLV1_log <- Surv(time = Clininfo_AF_combined_HTLV1$Days_EFS, 
                       event = Clininfo_AF_combined_HTLV1$EFS)
fit_HTLV1_log <- survfit(surv_obj_HTLV1_log ~ Baseline_ctDNAHTLV1_log, data = Clininfo_AF_combined_HTLV1)
cox_model_HTLV1_log <- coxph(
  Surv(time = Clininfo_AF_combined_HTLV1$Days_EFS, 
       event = Clininfo_AF_combined_HTLV1$EFS) ~ cfHTLV1_1_log,
  data = Clininfo_AF_combined_HTLV1
)

####EBV analysis
#####EBV impact on non-ATLL
Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV <- Clininfo_AF_combined %>% 
  filter(!Disease %in% c("ATLLlymphoma","ATLLacutetype")) %>% 
  filter(!is.infinite(cfEBV_1)) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(cfEBV_1)) %>% 
  #mutate(cfEBV_1_log = cfEBV_1/1000)
  mutate(cfEBV_1_log = ifelse(cfEBV_1>0,log10(cfEBV_1),0))

cutoffEBV <- maxstat.test(Surv(Days_EFS, EFS) ~ cfEBV_1, data=Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV,smethod="LogRank",
                          pmethod="Lau94", alpha=0.05)
cutoffEBVv <- cutoffEBV$estimate[1]
#plot(cutoffEBV)
Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV <- Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV %>% 
  mutate(Baseline_ctDNAEBV=ifelse(cfEBV_1 > cutoffEBVv,1,0))
surv_obj_EBV <- Surv(time = Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV$Days_EFS, 
                     event = Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV$EFS)
fit_EBV <- survfit(surv_obj_EBV ~ Baseline_ctDNAEBV, data = Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV)

cox_model_EBVnonlog <- coxph(
  Surv(time = Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV$Days_EFS, 
       event = Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV$EFS) ~ cfEBV_1,
  data = Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV
)

##EBV log mode
cutoffEBV_log <- maxstat.test(Surv(Days_EFS, EFS) ~ cfEBV_1_log, data=Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV,smethod="LogRank",
                              pmethod="Lau94", alpha=0.05)
cutoffEBV_logv <- cutoffEBV_log$estimate[1]
#plot(cutoffEBV_log)
Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV <- Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV %>% 
  #mutate(Baseline_ctDNAEBV_log=ifelse(cfEBV_1_log > cutoffEBV_logv,1,0))
  mutate(Baseline_ctDNAEBV_log=ifelse(cfEBV_1_log > 1.5,1,0))
surv_obj_EBV_log <- Surv(time = Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV$Days_EFS, 
                         event = Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV$EFS)
fit_EBV_log <- survfit(surv_obj_EBV_log ~ Baseline_ctDNAEBV_log, data = Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV)

cox_model_EBV <- coxph(
  Surv(time = Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV$Days_EFS, 
       event = Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV$EFS) ~ cfEBV_1_log,
  data = Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV
)

#######Only NOS
Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV_NOS <- Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV %>% 
  filter(Disease == "PTCLNOS")
cutoffEBVNOS_log <- maxstat.test(Surv(Days_EFS, EFS) ~ cfEBV_1_log, data=Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV_NOS,smethod="LogRank",
                              pmethod="Lau94", alpha=0.05)
cutoffEBVNOS_logv <- cutoffEBVNOS_log$estimate[1]

Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV_NOS <- Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV_NOS %>% 
  mutate(Baseline_ctDNAEBVNOS_log=ifelse(cfEBV_1_log > cutoffEBVNOS_logv,1,0))
  
surv_obj_EBV_NOS_log <- Surv(time = Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV_NOS$Days_EFS, 
                             event = Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV_NOS$EFS)

fit_EBV_NOS_log <- survfit(surv_obj_EBV_NOS_log ~ Baseline_ctDNAEBVNOS_log, data = Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV_NOS)

cox_model_EBV_NOS <- coxph(
  Surv(time = Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV_NOS$Days_EFS, 
       event = Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV_NOS$EFS) ~ cfEBV_1_log,
  data = Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV_NOS
)

##TFH
Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV_TFH <- Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV %>% 
  filter(Disease == "TFH")
cutoffEBVTFH <- maxstat.test(Surv(Days_EFS, EFS) ~ cfEBV_1_log, data=Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV_TFH ,smethod="LogRank",pmethod="Lau94", alpha=0.05)
cutoffEBVTFHv <- cutoffEBVTFH$estimate[1]
Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV_TFH <- Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV_TFH %>%
  filter(Cohort %in% c("CZECH biobank","NCT03297697")) %>% 
  mutate(Baseline_ctDNAEBVTFHlog=ifelse(cfEBV_1_log > 1.5,1,0))
surv_obj_EBV_TFH_log <- Surv(time = Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV_TFH$Days_EFS, 
                             event = Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV_TFH$EFS)
fit_EBV_TFH_log <- survfit(surv_obj_EBV_TFH_log ~ Baseline_ctDNAEBVTFHlog, data = Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV_TFH)

cox_model_EBV_TFH <- coxph(
  Surv(time = Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV_TFH$Days_EFS, 
       event = Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV_TFH$EFS) ~ cfEBV_1_log,
  data = Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV_TFH
)

#ALCL
Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV_ALCL <- Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV %>% 
  filter(Disease %in% c("ALKnegALCL","ALKposALCL"))
surv_obj_EBV_ALCL_log <- Surv(time = Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV_ALCL$Days_EFS, 
                              event = Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV_ALCL$EFS)
fit_EBV_ALCL_log <- survfit(surv_obj_EBV_ALCL_log ~ Baseline_ctDNAEBV_log, data = Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV_ALCL)

cox_model_EBV_ALCL <- coxph(
  Surv(time = Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV_ALCL$Days_EFS, 
       event = Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV_ALCL$EFS) ~ cfEBV_1_log,
  data = Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV_ALCL
)

#####EBV impact on ATLL
Clininfo_AF_combined_ATLL_EBV <- Clininfo_AF_combined %>% 
  filter(Disease %in% c("ATLLlymphoma","ATLLacutetype")) %>% 
  filter(!is.infinite(cfEBV_1)) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(cfEBV_1)) %>%
  #mutate(cfEBV_1_log = cfEBV_1/1000) %>% 
  mutate(cfEBV_1_log = ifelse(cfEBV_1>0,log10(cfEBV_1),0)) %>% 
  filter(ForATLL_Time_Plasma_HSCT < 62) %>%
  filter(ForATLL_Time_Plasma_Diagnosis > 14) %>% 
  #filter(ChemoAfterPlasma=="NO") %>% 
  filter(Treatment == "HSCT") 

cutoffEBV_ATLL <- maxstat.test(Surv(Days_EFS, EFS) ~ cfEBV_1, data=Clininfo_AF_combined_ATLL_EBV,smethod="LogRank",
                          pmethod="Lau94", alpha=0.05)
cutoffEBV_ATLLv <- cutoffEBV_ATLL$estimate[1]
#plot(cutoffEBV_ATLL)
Clininfo_AF_combined_ATLL_EBV <- Clininfo_AF_combined_ATLL_EBV %>% 
  mutate(Baseline_ctDNAEBV_ATLL=ifelse(cfEBV_1 > cutoffEBV_ATLLv,1,-1))
surv_obj_EBV_ATLL <- Surv(time = Clininfo_AF_combined_ATLL_EBV$Days_EFS, 
                     event = Clininfo_AF_combined_ATLL_EBV$EFS)
fit_EBV_ATLL <- survfit(surv_obj_EBV_ATLL ~ Baseline_ctDNAEBV_ATLL, data = Clininfo_AF_combined_ATLL_EBV)

cox_model_EBV_ATLL <- coxph(
  Surv(time = Clininfo_AF_combined_ATLL_EBV$Days_EFS, 
       event = Clininfo_AF_combined_ATLL_EBV$EFS) ~ cfEBV_1_log,
  data = Clininfo_AF_combined_ATLL_EBV
)

####Treatment naive ATLL
Clininfo_AF_combined_ATLL_EBV <- Clininfo_AF_combined %>% 
  filter(Disease %in% c("ATLLlymphoma","ATLLacutetype")) %>% 
  filter(!is.infinite(cfEBV_1)) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(cfEBV_1)) %>%
  #mutate(cfEBV_1_log = cfEBV_1/1000) %>% 
  mutate(cfEBV_1_log = ifelse(cfEBV_1>0,log10(cfEBV_1),0)) %>% 
  filter(Treatmentnaive=="YES")

cutoffEBV_ATLL <- maxstat.test(Surv(Days_EFS, EFS) ~ cfEBV_1, data=Clininfo_AF_combined_ATLL_EBV,smethod="LogRank",
                          pmethod="Lau94", alpha=0.05)
cutoffEBV_ATLLv <- cutoffEBV_ATLL$estimate[1]
#plot(cutoffEBV_ATLL)
Clininfo_AF_combined_ATLL_EBV <- Clininfo_AF_combined_ATLL_EBV %>% 
  mutate(Baseline_ctDNAEBV_ATLL=ifelse(cfEBV_1 > cutoffEBV_ATLLv,1,-1))
surv_obj_EBV_TNATLL <- Surv(time = Clininfo_AF_combined_ATLL_EBV$Days_EFS, 
                     event = Clininfo_AF_combined_ATLL_EBV$EFS)
fit_EBV_TNATLL <- survfit(surv_obj_EBV_TNATLL ~ Baseline_ctDNAEBV_ATLL, data = Clininfo_AF_combined_ATLL_EBV)

cox_model_EBV_TNATLL <- coxph(
  Surv(time = Clininfo_AF_combined_ATLL_EBV$Days_EFS, 
       event = Clininfo_AF_combined_ATLL_EBV$EFS) ~ cfEBV_1_log,
  data = Clininfo_AF_combined_ATLL_EBV
)
###non ALCL non ATLL
Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV_nonatllnonalcl <- Clininfo_AF_combined %>% 
  filter(!Disease %in% c("ATLLlymphoma","ATLLacutetype","ALKnegALCL","ALKposALCL")) %>% 
  filter(!is.infinite(cfEBV_1)) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(cfEBV_1)) %>% 
  #mutate(cfEBV_1_log = cfEBV_1/1000)
  mutate(cfEBV_1_log = ifelse(cfEBV_1>0,log10(cfEBV_1),0))

cutoffEBV <- maxstat.test(Surv(Days_EFS, EFS) ~ cfEBV_1, data=Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV_nonatllnonalcl,smethod="LogRank",
                          pmethod="Lau94", alpha=0.05)
cutoffEBVv <- cutoffEBV$estimate[1]
#plot(cutoffEBV)
Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV_nonatllnonalcl <- Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV_nonatllnonalcl %>% 
  mutate(Baseline_ctDNAEBV=ifelse(cfEBV_1 > cutoffEBVv,1,-1))
surv_obj_EBV_nonatllnonalcl <- Surv(time = Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV_nonatllnonalcl$Days_EFS, 
                     event = Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV_nonatllnonalcl$EFS)
fit_EBV_nonatllnonalcl <- survfit(surv_obj_EBV_nonatllnonalcl ~ Baseline_ctDNAEBV, data = Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV_nonatllnonalcl)

cox_model_EBV_nonatllnonalclnonlog <- coxph(
  Surv(time = Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV_nonatllnonalcl$Days_EFS, 
       event = Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV_nonatllnonalcl$EFS) ~ cfEBV_1,
  data = Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV_nonatllnonalcl
)

##EBV log mode
cutoffEBV_log <- maxstat.test(Surv(Days_EFS, EFS) ~ cfEBV_1_log, data=Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV_nonatllnonalcl,smethod="LogRank",
                              pmethod="Lau94", alpha=0.05)
cutoffEBV_logv <- cutoffEBV_log$estimate[1]
#plot(cutoffEBV_log)
Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV_nonatllnonalcl <- Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV_nonatllnonalcl %>% 
  mutate(Baseline_ctDNAEBV_log=ifelse(cfEBV_1_log > cutoffEBV_logv,1,0))
surv_obj_EBV_nonatllnonalcl_log <- Surv(time = Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV_nonatllnonalcl$Days_EFS, 
                         event = Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV_nonatllnonalcl$EFS)
fit_EBV_nonatllnonalcl_log <- survfit(surv_obj_EBV_nonatllnonalcl_log ~ Baseline_ctDNAEBV_log, data = Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV_nonatllnonalcl)

cox_model_EBV_nonatllnonalcl <- coxph(
  Surv(time = Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV_nonatllnonalcl$Days_EFS, 
       event = Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV_nonatllnonalcl$EFS) ~ cfEBV_1_log,
  data = Clininfo_AF_combined_EBV_nonatllnonalcl
)

EBVatll <- summary(cox_model_EBV_ATLL)
EBVtnatll <- summary(cox_model_EBV_TNATLL)
EBValcl <- summary(cox_model_EBV_ALCL)
EBVtfh <- summary(cox_model_EBV_TFH)
EBVnos <- summary(cox_model_EBV_NOS)
EBVnonatll <- summary(cox_model_EBV)
EBVnonatllnonalcl <- summary(cox_model_EBV_nonatllnonalcl)

EBVnoscox <- cbind("NOS",EBVnos$conf.int,EBVnos$waldtest[3])
EBVtfhcox <- cbind("TFH",EBVtfh$conf.int,EBVtfh$waldtest[3])
EBVatllcox <- cbind("ATLL after Chemo",EBVatll$conf.int,EBVatll$waldtest[3])
EBVtnatllcox <- cbind("ATLL",EBVtnatll$conf.int,EBVtnatll$waldtest[3])
EBValclcox <- cbind("ALCL",EBValcl$conf.int,EBValcl$waldtest[3])
EBVnonatllnonalclcox <- cbind("nonATLLnonALCL",EBVnonatllnonalcl$conf.int,EBVnonatllnonalcl$waldtest[3])

EBVresultcox <- as.data.frame(rbind(EBVnoscox,EBVtfhcox,EBValclcox,EBVtnatllcox,EBVatllcox))
EBVresultcox_select <- EBVresultcox %>% 
  dplyr::select(NAME = "V1", HR = `exp(coef)`, LR = `lower .95`, UR = `upper .95`,P = "V6")
EBVresultcox_select <- EBVresultcox_select %>% 
  mutate(UR = gsub("Inf","10",UR))
EBVresultcox_select$LR[3] <- 0.001
EBVresultcox_select$HR[3] <- 0.01
EBVresultcox_select$HR <- as.numeric(EBVresultcox_select$HR)
EBVresultcox_select$LR <- as.numeric(EBVresultcox_select$LR)
EBVresultcox_select$UR <- as.numeric(EBVresultcox_select$UR)
EBVresultcox_select$P <- as.numeric(EBVresultcox_select$P)

#HTLV1 PFS
FigS6B <- ggsurvplot(fit_HTLV1,
           data = Clininfo_AF_combined_HTLV1,
           palette = c("#FFA500","#5B9BD5"),
           pval = TRUE,            
           conf.int = FALSE,        
           risk.table = TRUE,
           xlab = "Time (years)",   
           ylab = "PFS (%)", fun = function(y) y * 100,
           xscale = "d_y",
           break.time.by = 365,
           xlim = c(0, 5 * 365),
           risk.table.y.text = FALSE,
           ggtheme = theme_bw(base_size = 10),
           tables.theme = theme_classic(base_size = 8),
           tables.col = "black", # 色はstrataごとに保つ
           risk.table.col = "strata", # 色はstrataごとに保つ
           pval.size = 3,
           fontsize = 2.5,
           font.risk.table = c(10, "plain"),
           legend = "top",
           legend.title = "Viral load",
           legend.labs = c("High","Low"),
           risk.table.legend = FALSE
           )
FigS6B$plot <- FigS6B$plot +
  labs(title = "HTLV1 viral load after induction") +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.box = "vertical",
    legend.key.height = unit(0.3, "lines"),
    legend.spacing.y  = unit(0.1, "lines"),
    legend.text       = element_text(lineheight = 0.9, size = 8),
    legend.title       = element_text(size = 8),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 10, hjust = 0.5)
  )

FigS6B$table <- FigS6B$table + 
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        plot.title = element_text(size = 8),
        axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        axis.line.y = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank())

```

#HTLV1 CNV
```{r}
file_list <- read.delim("listATLL.txt", header=FALSE)
bin_for_analysis <- 500

plots <- list()
keeps <- data.frame(Sample = character(), MeanDepth = numeric(), NormMinDepthin5side = numeric(), NormMeanDepthin3side = numeric(), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
keepdf_to_analyze_rolls <- data.frame(Sample = character(), GenomicPosition = numeric(), NormMeanDepth = numeric())
file_names <- file_list$V1
grobs <- list()

for (i in seq_along(file_names)) {
  file <- file_names[i]
  df_to_analyze <- read.delim(file)
  df_to_analyze[is.na(df_to_analyze)] <- 0
  
  #set title name
  sample_name <- sub("Sample_|_cfDNA.dualindex-deduped.sorted.base.coverage.GCcorrected", "", basename(file))
  title_name <- gsub("Sample_|_cfDNA.dualindex-deduped.sorted.base.coverage.GCcorrected", "", sample_name)
  #smooth
  datsmooth2 = rollapply(df_to_analyze$start, width = bin_for_analysis, by = bin_for_analysis, FUN = mean)
  datsmooth3 = rollapply(df_to_analyze$gc.corrected, width = bin_for_analysis, by = bin_for_analysis, FUN = mean)
  datsmooth4 = rollapply(df_to_analyze$f_depth, width = bin_for_analysis, by = bin_for_analysis, FUN = mean)
  ###CNVanalysis
  df_to_analyze_roll <- as.data.frame.array(cbind(datsmooth2,datsmooth3))
  df_to_analyze_roll_withing5prime <- df_to_analyze_roll %>% 
    filter(datsmooth2 < 2500)
  df_to_analyze_roll_withing3prime <- df_to_analyze_roll %>% 
    filter(datsmooth2 > 2500)  
  ###keepdf
  keepdf_to_analyze_roll <- data.frame(Sample=title_name,GenomicPosition=datsmooth2,NormMeanDepth=datsmooth3)
  keepdf_to_analyze_rolls <- rbind(keepdf_to_analyze_rolls,keepdf_to_analyze_roll)

  min5prime <- min(df_to_analyze_roll_withing5prime$datsmooth3)
  print(min5prime)
  mean3prime <- mean(df_to_analyze_roll_withing3prime$datsmooth3)
  keep <- data.frame(Sample = title_name, MeanDepth = mean(datsmooth4), NormMinDepthin5side=min5prime,NormMeanDepthin3side=mean3prime)
  keeps <- rbind(keeps, keep)
  
  if (mean(datsmooth4) < 2.5) {
    next
  }
  title_name <- gsub("Sample_|_cfDNA.dualindex-deduped.sorted.base.coverage.GCcorrected", "", sample_name)
  #plot
  p <- ggplot(df_to_analyze_roll, aes(x=datsmooth2,y=datsmooth3)) +
    geom_line() +
    labs(title = title_name,
         x = "HTLV1 genome position",
         y = "Normalized Depth")+
    ylim(0,3)
  
  grob_p <- ggplotGrob(p)
  grobs <- append(grobs, list(grob_p))
}
combined_grob <- arrangeGrob(grobs = grobs, ncol = 5)
keeps <- keeps %>% 
  mutate(HTLV1_5primeDel=ifelse(NormMinDepthin5side < 0.25 & NormMeanDepthin3side > 0.25,"YES","NO"))
write.csv(keeps,"Depth.summary.ATLL.csv")
keepdf_to_analyze_rolls <- keepdf_to_analyze_rolls %>% 
  left_join(keeps,by="Sample")
keepdf_to_analyze_rolls <- keepdf_to_analyze_rolls %>% 
  arrange(NormMinDepthin5side) %>% 
  mutate(Sample = factor(Sample, levels = unique(Sample)))

#Data for Viral CNV heatmap
keepdf_to_analyze_rolls_cast <- acast(keepdf_to_analyze_rolls, GenomicPosition~Sample, value.var="NormMeanDepth")
row.names(keepdf_to_analyze_rolls_cast) <- c("0-0.5K","0.5-1K","1-1.5K","1.5-2K","2-2.5K","2.5-3K",
                                            "3-3.5K","3.5-4K","4-4.5K","4.5-5K","5-5.5K","5.5-6K",
                                            "6-6.5K","6.5-7K","7-7.5K","7.5-8K")
Plot331 <- Heatmap(
  t(keepdf_to_analyze_rolls_cast),
  name = "NormMeanDepth",
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  col = circlize::colorRamp2(c(0, 0.5, 1), c("blue","white","red")),
  row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 3),
  column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8),
  show_row_names = TRUE,
  show_column_names = TRUE
)

keeps <- keeps %>% 
  mutate(HTLV1_5primeDel=ifelse(MeanDepth<2.5,NA,HTLV1_5primeDel))

Clininfo_AF_combined_select <- Clininfo_AF_combined %>% 
  dplyr::select(Days_EFS,EFS,Sample1,Disease,Treatment,Days_RelapseTRM,RelapseTRM)

Clininfo_AF_combined_select <- left_join(Clininfo_AF_combined_select, keeps, by = c("Sample1" = "Sample"))

Clininfo_AF_combined_HTLV1CNV <- Clininfo_AF_combined_select %>% 
  filter(Disease %in% c("ATLLacutetype","ATLLlymphoma")) %>% 
  filter(Treatment == "HSCT")

Clininfo_AF_combined_HTLV1CNV$Days_EFS <- as.numeric(Clininfo_AF_combined_HTLV1CNV$Days_EFS)

df <- Clininfo_AF_combined_HTLV1CNV
ci <- cuminc(ftime = df$Days_RelapseTRM,
             fstatus = df$RelapseTRM,
             group = df$HTLV1_5primeDel)

df$RelapseStatus <- ifelse(df$RelapseTRM == 1, 1, 0)  # Relapse: 1, それ以外: 0
surv_obj <- Surv(time = df$Days_RelapseTRM, event = df$RelapseStatus)

fit <- survfit(surv_obj ~ HTLV1_5primeDel, data = df)

Fig5E <- ggsurvplot(
  fit,
  data = df,
  risk.table = TRUE,
  conf.int = FALSE,
  pval = TRUE,
  pval.size = 3,
  #fun = function(y) y * 100,
  xlab = "Time (days)",
  ylab = "Cumulative Incidence (%)",
  title = "Relapse after HSCT",
  fun = "event",
  fontsize = 2.5,
  palette = c("#5B9BD5", "#FFA500"),
  legend.title = "HTLV1 5' deletion",
  ggtheme = theme_minimal(base_size = 8),
  risk.table.y.text.col = TRUE, 
  risk.table.y.text = FALSE
)

Fig5E$plot <- Fig5E$plot +
  theme(
    text = element_text(size = 8),                       
    plot.title = element_text(size = 10, hjust = 0.5),    
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),                 
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),                  
    legend.text = element_text(size = 8),                
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8)                
  )+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.2),
                     labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1))

Fig5E$table <- Fig5E$table +
  theme(
    text = element_text(size = 6),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.line.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

```

#HTLV1 CNV for CARRIERS
```{r}
file_list <- read.delim("listCARRIERS.txt", header=FALSE)
bin_for_analysis <- 500

plots <- list()
keepsCARRIERS <- data.frame(Sample = character(), MeanDepth = numeric(), NormMinDepthin5side = numeric(), NormMeanDepthin3side = numeric(), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
keepdf_to_analyze_rollsCARRIERS <- data.frame(Sample = character(), GenomicPosition = numeric(), NormMeanDepth = numeric())
file_names <- file_list$V1
order <- gsub("Sample_|_cfDNA.dualindex-deduped.sorted.reheader.base.coverage.GCcorrected","",file_names)
grobs <- list()

for (i in seq_along(file_names)) {
  file <- file_names[i]
  df_to_analyze <- read.delim(file)
  df_to_analyze[is.na(df_to_analyze)] <- 0
  
  #set title name
  sample_name <- sub("Sample_|_cfDNA.dualindex-deduped.sorted.reheader.base.coverage.GCcorrected", "", basename(file))
  title_name <- gsub("Sample_|_cfDNA.dualindex-deduped.sorted.reheader.base.coverage.GCcorrected", "", sample_name)
  #smooth
  datsmooth2 = rollapply(df_to_analyze$start, width = bin_for_analysis, by = bin_for_analysis, FUN = mean)
  datsmooth3 = rollapply(df_to_analyze$gc.corrected, width = bin_for_analysis, by = bin_for_analysis, FUN = mean)
  datsmooth4 = rollapply(df_to_analyze$f_depth, width = bin_for_analysis, by = bin_for_analysis, FUN = mean)
  ###CNVanalysis
  df_to_analyze_roll <- as.data.frame.array(cbind(datsmooth2,datsmooth3))
  df_to_analyze_roll_withing5prime <- df_to_analyze_roll %>% 
    filter(datsmooth2 < 2500)
  df_to_analyze_roll_withing3prime <- df_to_analyze_roll %>% 
    filter(datsmooth2 > 2500)  
  ###keepdf
  keepdf_to_analyze_roll <- data.frame(Sample=title_name,GenomicPosition=datsmooth2,NormMeanDepth=datsmooth3)
  keepdf_to_analyze_rollsCARRIERS <- rbind(keepdf_to_analyze_rollsCARRIERS,keepdf_to_analyze_roll)

  min5prime <- min(df_to_analyze_roll_withing5prime$datsmooth3)
  mean3prime <- mean(df_to_analyze_roll_withing3prime$datsmooth3)
  keep <- data.frame(Sample = title_name, MeanDepth = mean(datsmooth4), NormMinDepthin5side=min5prime,NormMeanDepthin3side=mean3prime)
  keepsCARRIERS <- rbind(keepsCARRIERS, keep)
  
  if (mean(datsmooth4) < 2.5) {
    next
  }
  title_name <- gsub("Sample_|_cfDNA.dualindex-deduped.sorted.base.coverage.GCcorrected", "", sample_name)
  #plot
  p <- ggplot(df_to_analyze_roll, aes(x=datsmooth2,y=datsmooth3)) +
    geom_line() +
    labs(title = title_name,
         x = "HTLV1 genome position",
         y = "Normalized Depth")+
    ylim(0,3)
  
  grob_p <- ggplotGrob(p)
  grobs <- append(grobs, list(grob_p))
}
combined_grob <- arrangeGrob(grobs = grobs, ncol = 5)
pdf("/Users/takeshisugio/Dropbox/AtStanford/AAlab/Labnote/PTCL_paper/Figure1/ATLL.lowdepth20Skip.Depth.plot.pdf", width = 30, height = 30)
grid.draw(combined_grob)
dev.off()

keepsCARRIERS <- keepsCARRIERS %>% 
  mutate(HTLV1_5primeDel=ifelse(NormMinDepthin5side < 0.25 & NormMeanDepthin3side > 0.25,"YES","NO"))
write.csv(keepsCARRIERS,"Depth.summary.CARRIERS.csv")
keepdf_to_analyze_rollsCARRIERS <- keepdf_to_analyze_rollsCARRIERS %>% 
  left_join(keepsCARRIERS,by="Sample")
keepdf_to_analyze_rollsCARRIERS <- keepdf_to_analyze_rollsCARRIERS %>% 
  arrange(NormMinDepthin5side) %>% 
  mutate(Sample = factor(Sample, levels = unique(Sample)))

keepdf_to_analyze_rolls_castCARRIERS <- acast(keepdf_to_analyze_rollsCARRIERS, GenomicPosition~Sample, value.var="NormMeanDepth")
row.names(keepdf_to_analyze_rolls_castCARRIERS) <- c("0-0.5K","0.5-1K","1-1.5K","1.5-2K","2-2.5K","2.5-3K",
                                            "3-3.5K","3.5-4K","4-4.5K","4.5-5K","5-5.5K","5.5-6K",
                                            "6-6.5K","6.5-7K","7-7.5K","7.5-8K")

colnames(keepdf_to_analyze_rolls_castCARRIERS)

Plot340 <- Heatmap(
  t(keepdf_to_analyze_rolls_castCARRIERS),
  name = "NormMeanDepth",
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  row_order = order,
  col = circlize::colorRamp2(c(0, 0.5, 1), c("blue","white","red")),
  row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 3),
  column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8),
  show_row_names = TRUE,
  show_column_names = TRUE
)

PatientHTLV1 <- t(keepdf_to_analyze_rolls_cast)
CarrierHTLV1 <- t(keepdf_to_analyze_rolls_castCARRIERS)

col_fun <- circlize::colorRamp2(c(0, 0.5, 1), c("blue","white","red"))

PlotPatientHTLV1 <- Heatmap(
  PatientHTLV1,
  name = "NormMeanDepth_Patients",
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  col = col_fun,
  row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 3),
  column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 3),
  show_row_names = TRUE,
  show_column_names = TRUE,
  width = unit(2.5, "inch"),
  heatmap_legend_param = list(
    title = "Normalized\nMean\nDepth",
    title_gp  = gpar(fontsize = 8),
    labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8),
    legend_height = unit(15, "mm")  # 任意：高さを統一
  )
)

PlotCarrierHTLV1 <- Heatmap(
  CarrierHTLV1,
  name = "NormMeanDepth_Carriers",
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  col = col_fun,
  row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 3),
  column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 3),
  show_row_names = TRUE,
  show_column_names = TRUE,
  width = unit(2.5, "inch"),
  heatmap_legend_param = list(
    title = "Normalized\nMean\nDepth",
    title_gp  = gpar(fontsize = 8),
    labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8),
    legend_height = unit(15, "mm")  # 任意：高さを統一
  )
)

w_right <- max_text_width("Carriers with 10-year Follow-up", gp = gpar(fontsize = 10,csx=1))

ann_right_pat <- rowAnnotation(
  label = anno_text("ATLL Patients", rot = 0, just = "left", gp = gpar(fontsize = 10,csx=1)),
  width = w_right
)

ann_right_car <- rowAnnotation(
  label = anno_text("Carriers with 10-year Follow-up", rot = 0, just = "left", gp = gpar(fontsize = 10,csx=1)),
  width = w_right
)

ht_list <- (PlotPatientHTLV1) %v% (PlotCarrierHTLV1)

library(grid)
pdf("00Fig5D_HTLV1CNV.pdf", width = 8, height = 10)
draw(
  ht_list,
  heatmap_legend_side = "right",
  annotation_legend_side = "right",

)

decorate_heatmap_body("NormMeanDepth_Patients", {

            x = unit(1, "npc") + unit(4, "mm"),  # 右にはみ出す位置

            just = "left",
            gp = gpar(fontsize = 10))
})

dev.off()

PlotCombinedHTLV1 <- PlotPatientHTLV1 %v% PlotCarrierHTLV1
```

#Figure5
```{r}
grab_plot  <- function(p) wrap_one(grid::grid.grabExpr(print(p)))
grab_table <- function(t) wrap_one(grid::grid.grabExpr(print(t)))
grab_draw  <- function(expr) wrap_one(grid::grid.grabExpr(expr))

sync_widths <- function(gt1, gt2){
  if (!is.null(gt1$widths) && !is.null(gt2$widths)) {
    mw <- grid::unit.pmax(gt1$widths, gt2$widths)
    gt1$widths <- mw; gt2$widths <- mw
  }
  list(a = gt1, b = gt2)
}

HEADER <- ggplot() + theme_void()
HEADERFig5 <- arrangeGrob(ggplotGrob(HEADER), 
                     top = textGrob("Figure 5", x = unit(0, "npc"), just = "left",
                                    gp = gpar(fontface = "bold", fontsize = 12)))
HEADER5 <- arrangeGrob(HEADERFig5, ncol = 1, widths = c(3))

Fig5A <- Fig5A +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 10, hjust = 0.5)
  )

grob5A <- arrangeGrob(ggplotGrob(Fig5A), 
                     top = textGrob("A", x = unit(0, "npc"), just = "left",
                                    gp = gpar(fontface = "bold", fontsize = 12)))

Fig5B <- Fig5B +
  scale_x_discrete(
    labels = c(
      "ATLLacutetype" = "ATLL acute",
      "ATLLlymphoma"  = "ATLL lymph",
      "ALKposALCL"    = "ALK(+)ALCL",
      "ALKnegALCL"    = "ALK(-)ALCL")
    )+
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 10, hjust = 0.5)
  )
grob5B <- arrangeGrob(ggplotGrob(Fig5B), 
                     top = textGrob("B", x = unit(0, "npc"), just = "left",
                                    gp = gpar(fontface = "bold", fontsize = 12)))

plotheadEBV <- cbind(EBVresultcox_select$NAME, format(EBVresultcox_select$P, digits = 2))
xticks <- c(0.1, 1, 10)

forestplot(
  labeltext = plotheadEBV,                     
  mean   = EBVresultcox_select$HR,
  lower  = EBVresultcox_select$LR,
  upper  = EBVresultcox_select$UR,
  xlog   = TRUE,
  clip   = c(0.1, 10),                      
  grid   = structure(xticks, gp = gpar(col = "#cccccc")),
  xticks = xticks,
  col    = fpColors(box = "royalblue", line = "darkblue", summary = "royalblue"),
  graphwidth = unit(1.2, "inch"),
  colgap     = unit(0.5, "mm"),              
  zero       = 1,                            
  lwd.ci     = 2,                            
  ci.vertices = TRUE,                        
  ci.vertices.height = 0.12,
  boxsize    = 0.2,                          
  lineheight = unit(5, "mm"),                
  title = "EBV load",
  xlab  = "EFS Hazard Ratio",
  txt_gp = fpTxtGp(
    title  = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "plain", cex = 1.0),
    label  = gpar(fontsize = 8),             
    xlab   = gpar(fontsize = 8, cex = 1.0),             
    ticks  = gpar(fontsize = 6, cex = 1.0)    
  )
)

grid.force()
Fig5C <- grid.grab()

grob5C <- arrangeGrob(
  Fig5C,
  top = textGrob("C", x = unit(0, "npc"), just = "left", 
                 gp = gpar(fontface = "bold", fontsize = 12))
)

ht_grob <- grid.grabExpr({
  draw(ht_list, 
       heatmap_legend_side    = "right",
       annotation_legend_side = "right")

  decorate_heatmap_body("NormMeanDepth_Patients", {
    grid.text("ATLL Patients",
              x = unit(1, "npc") + unit(4, "mm"),
              y = unit(0.5, "npc"),
              rot = 270,
              just = "left",
              gp = gpar(fontsize = 8, csx=1))
  })

  decorate_heatmap_body("NormMeanDepth_Carriers", {
    grid.text("Carriers with\n10-year Follow-up",
              x = unit(1, "npc") + unit(4, "mm"),
              y = unit(0.5, "npc"),
              rot = 270,
              just = "left",
              gp = gpar(fontsize = 8, csx=1))
  })
})

xlabel_grob <- textGrob(
  "Position in HTLV-1 genome",
  x = unit(0.5, "npc"), y = unit(1, "lines"),
  just = "center",
  gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, csx=1)
)

combined_grob5 <- arrangeGrob(
  ht_grob,
  xlabel_grob,
  ncol = 1,
  heights = unit.c(unit(1, "npc") - unit(1.2, "lines"), unit(1.2, "lines"))
)

grob5D <- arrangeGrob(
  combined_grob5,
  top = textGrob("D", x = unit(0, "npc"), just = "left",
                 gp = gpar(fontface = "bold", fontsize = 12))
)


Fig5E$plot <- Fig5E$plot +
  guides(
    color = guide_legend(nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE),
    fill  = guide_legend(nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE)
  )  + 
  labs(title = "5' HTLV-1 genome deletion") +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.box = "vertical",
    legend.key.height = unit(0.3, "lines"),
    legend.spacing.y  = unit(0.1, "lines"),
    legend.text       = element_text(lineheight = 0.9, size = 8),
    legend.title       = element_text(size = 8),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 10, hjust = 0.5)
  )

Fig5E$table <- Fig5E$table + 
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        plot.title = element_text(size = 8),
        axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        axis.line.y = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank())

gt_plot_5E  <- ggplotGrob(ggplotify::as.ggplot(~ print(Fig5E$plot)))
gt_table_5E <- ggplotGrob(ggplotify::as.ggplot(~ print(Fig5E$table)))
sw <- sync_widths(gt_plot_5E, gt_table_5E)

grob5E <- arrangeGrob(
  arrangeGrob(sw$a, 
              top = textGrob("E", x = unit(0, "npc"), just = "left",
                             gp = gpar(fontface = "bold", fontsize = 12))),
  sw$b,
  heights = c(4, 1.2),
  ncol = 1
)

# Arrange rows
top_row <- arrangeGrob(grobBlank, grob5A, grobBlank, grob5B,grobBlank, grob5C, grobBlank, ncol = 7, widths = c(0.1,1.2,0.1,1.3,0.1,1.3,0.1))
middle_row <- arrangeGrob(grobBlank, grob5D, grobBlank, grob5E, grobBlank, ncol = 5, widths = c(0.1,2,0.1,1,0.1))
Figure5 <- arrangeGrob(HEADERFig5,top_row, middle_row, ncol = 1, heights = c(0.1,0.8,1.2))
grid.newpage()
grid.draw(Figure5)
ggsave("000Figure5.pdf", Figure5, width = 8.5, height = 6.5, dpi = 300)
```

#EPIC-Seq/RNA-Seq Read files
```{r}
#EPICinferredExp <- read.csv("0000TableS14.csv")

#TumorRNACSxLM22_WES <- read.delim("CIBERSORTxGEP_Fractions-Adjusted_LM22_tumor.txt") 
#TumorRNACSxTM4_WES <- read.delim("CIBERSORTxGEP_Fractions-Adjusted_TM4_tumor.txt")

TumorRNACSxTM4LM22_WES <- left_join(TumorRNACSxTM4_WES,TumorRNACSxLM22_WES,by="Mixture") 
cell_types <- colnames(TumorRNACSxLM22_WES[,2:(ncol(TumorRNACSxLM22_WES)-3)])
for (cell in cell_types) {
  TumorRNACSxTM4LM22_WES[[paste0(cell, "_norm")]] <- TumorRNACSxTM4LM22_WES[[cell]] * TumorRNACSxTM4LM22_WES$CD45
}
#WES_TMM_NONE <- read.delim("WES_TMM_NONE_gene_log2nx.txt")

###Find the samples with Low depth
#QCdata <- read.delim("SequenceQC.txt")
QCdataLowDepth <- QCdata %>% 
  filter(Deduplicated.depth < 1000)
QCdataNADepth <- QCdata %>% 
  filter(is.na(Deduplicated.depth))

OmitSample <- unique(c("TSTCL016-P1","TSTCL080-C1","TSTCL094-C2","TSTCL107-C1",QCdataLowDepth$Stanford_ID, QCdataNADepth$Stanford_ID),)
Omitcase <- unique(OmitSample)

#Omit the genes with Low variance
EPICinferredExp2 <- EPICinferredExp[,2:382]
gene_medians <- apply(EPICinferredExp2, 2, median, na.rm = TRUE)
gene_sds <- apply(EPICinferredExp2, 2, sd, na.rm = TRUE)
gene_median_sds <- cbind(gene_medians,gene_sds)
gene_median_sds_df <- as.data.frame(gene_median_sds)
gene_median_sds_omitgene <- gene_median_sds_df %>%
  mutate(gene=row.names(.)) %>% 
  filter(gene_medians > 8.5 | gene_sds < 1.0) %>% 
  pull(gene)

```

#Set Patients data
```{r}
QCdataLowDepth <- QCdata %>% 
  filter(Deduplicated.depth < 1000)
QCdataNADepth <- QCdata %>% 
  filter(is.na(Deduplicated.depth))

Sample4Analysis <- intersect(EPICinferredExp$Sample,c(Clininfo_AF_combined$Sample1))
Sample4Analysis <- setdiff(Sample4Analysis,c(Omitcase,QCdataNADepth,QCdataLowDepth))
rownames(EPICinferredExp) <- EPICinferredExp$Sample
#Only baseline samples
EPICinferredExp3 <- EPICinferredExp[Sample4Analysis,2:382]
#All samples
Sample4Allanalysis <- setdiff(rownames(EPICinferredExp),c(Omitcase,QCdataNADepth$Stanford_ID,QCdataLowDepth$Stanford_ID))
EPICinferredExpall <- EPICinferredExp[Sample4Allanalysis,2:382]

#concatenate baseline only and healthy
CTRDiseaseEPICTCLv5 <- EPICinferredExp3
#concatenate all samples and healthy
CTRDiseaseEPICTCLv5_all <- EPICinferredExpall

CTRDiseaseEPICTCLv5_join <- CTRDiseaseEPICTCLv5 %>%
  mutate(Sample1 = rownames(.)) %>% 
  left_join(Clininfo_AF_combined, by="Sample1") %>% 
  mutate(Disease = ifelse(is.na(Disease), "Healthy",Disease)) %>% 
  filter(!Sample1 %in% Omitcase)
rownames(CTRDiseaseEPICTCLv5_join) <- CTRDiseaseEPICTCLv5$Sample1
CTRDiseaseEPICTCLv5_t <- t(CTRDiseaseEPICTCLv5)

#Make annotation
cfDNA_SNVINDEL_select_join <- cfDNA_SNVINDEL_select %>% 
  mutate(SampleID = Sample) %>% 
  separate(Sample, c("PatientID","TypeTimepoint"), sep = "-") %>% 
  left_join(Clininfo_AF_combined, by = "PatientID")

#Add all sample (not only baseline) annotation
CTRDiseaseEPICTCLv5_all_join <- CTRDiseaseEPICTCLv5_all %>% 
  mutate(SampleID = rownames(CTRDiseaseEPICTCLv5_all)) %>% 
  mutate(SampleID2 = SampleID) %>% 
  separate(SampleID2, c("PatientID","TypeTimepoint"), sep = "-") %>% 
  left_join(cfDNA_SNVINDEL_select_join, by = "SampleID") %>% 
  mutate(Disease = ifelse(is.na(Disease),"Healthy",Disease))

rownames(CTRDiseaseEPICTCLv5_all_join) <- CTRDiseaseEPICTCLv5_all_join$SampleID

CTRDiseaseEPICTCLv5_all_join_t <- t(CTRDiseaseEPICTCLv5_all_join)

```

##Read Gene Sets
```{r}
Negativegenes <- c("AGMO","ALPP","ANKFN1","APOBEC4","MYL4","MYL4","MYL7","TNNT2","LCE3B","S100A7L2","OR10T2","OR10K2","OR10K1","OR10R2","OR6P1","OR10X1","OR10Z1","OR6N2","OR10J5","OR2L8","OR2M7","OR14C36","OR2T4","OR2T6","OR2T1","OR5H1","OR5H15","OR5K1","OR2Y1","DEFB113","DEFB112","TAAR8","TAAR6","TAAR5","OLIG3","NOX3","TAS2R16","TAS2R39","OR2A12","GAGE12D","SSX7","OR13H1","HHLA1","INSL4","IFNA4","OR13F1","OR13C4","OR13C8","OR1N2","OR1L1","MTRNR2L7","NPS","KRTAP5-2","OR2AG1","OR10A5","OR4B1","OR4X2","OR4S1","OR4C13","OR4A5","OR4C46","OR4A15","OR4C15","OR4C16","OR4C11","OR4P4","OR4S2","OR5L1","OR5D16","OR5W2","OR10AG1","OR5F1","OR5AS1","OR8H3","OR8K5","OR5J2","OR5T2","OR5T1","OR8H1","OR8K3","OR8K1","OR8J1","OR5M9","OR5M3","OR5M1","OR5AP2","OR9Q1","OR6Q1","OR9I1","OR1S2","OR1S1","OR10W1","OR5B3","OR5AN1","OR5A2","OR10V1","DEFB108B","OR10S1","OR10G8","OR10G7","TAS2R7","TAS2R8","TAS2R9","OR9K2","OR6C6","OR6C1","OR6C75","OR6C65","OR6C70","OR6C68","OR6C4","OR2AP1","DAOA","OR4K14","OR4K13","OR4F6","OR4F15","OR1D5","OR1A2","OR1A1","OR4D2","OTOR","DEFB115","DEFB116","OR2Z1","OR7G1","OR7A10","OR7A17","OR7C2","OR1I1","OR10H3","LEUTX","PSG11","PSG2","KRTAP5.2","KRTAP25.1","KRTAP27.1","KRTAP23.1","KRTAP13.3","KRTAP15.1","KRTAP19.4","KRTAP19.6","KRTAP6.2","KRTAP20.3","KRTAP21.3")
Treg <- c("CCR4","FOXP3","GPR171","PMCH","CTLA4","TYR")
OtherCD4 <- c("IL3","CD4","GATA3","TBX21","CXCR3","IL9")
TFH <- c("ICOS","PDCD1","CXCR5","CXCL13","SH2D1A","ST8SIA1","IL4")
Checkpoint <- c("CD274","IDO1")
PanTcell <- c("CD3D","CD3G","LCK","TCF7","TRAT1","ZAP70","LEF1","RPL3P7","UBASH3A","CD2","CD28")
Bcellgenes <- c("BANK1","CD19","CD22","MS4A1","BLK","CD72","TCL1A","GUSBP11","MZB1","TNFRSF17","CD79A","CD79B")
Bcellgenes2 <- c("CD19","CD22","BLK","CD72","TCL1A","GUSBP11","CD79B")
BcellNaiveorMemory <- c("BANK1","TCL1A","CD72","MS4A1","BLK","CD19","CD79B","CD79A","CD22")
PlasmaCell <- c("GUSBP11","MZB1","TNFRSF17")

CD8TcellNKgenes <- c("TRDC","CD8A","CD8B","KLRF1","PRF1","GNLY","GZMA","NKG7","CTSW","CD247","GZMK","KLRB1","KLRK1","GZMH","CCL5","KIR2DL1","KIR2DL2","KLRC2","KLRC3","KLRC4","GZMB")
CD8TcellNKgenes2 <- c("TRDC","KLRF1","PRF1","GNLY","GZMA","NKG7","CTSW","CD247","GZMK","KLRB1","KLRK1","GZMH","CCL5","KIR2DL1","KIR2DL2","KLRC2","KLRC3","KLRC4","GZMB")
CD8Tcellgenes <- c("CD8A","CD8B","GZMK","KLRB1","GZMH","CCL5")
NKgenes <- c("TRDC","KLRF1","GZMA","KIR2DL1","KIR2DL2","KLRC2","KLRC3","KLRC4","GZMB")
Mastcellgenes <- c("CCL20","CEACAM8","CPA3","HDC","PRG2","TPSAB1","RGS13","CXCL3","HPGDS")
Eosgenes <- c("CLC","P2RY14","EMR1","P2RY2","EMR3")
Monocyte <- c("FCN1","CFP","CD14")
M2genes <- c("CCL18","CCL23","CLEC10A","CD163","CD274","IDO1")
M1genes <- c("CCL19","EBI3","HESX1")
M0genes <- c("CHI3L1","CXCL5","MARCO","CYP27A1","CD68")
Macrophagegenes <- c(M2genes,M1genes,M0genes)
Granulocytegenes <- c("P2RY13","VNN2","FFAR2","FCGR3B","CXCR2","AQP9","MGAM")
DCactivatedgenes <- c("CCL17","CLIC2","LAMP3","CCL22")
DCrestinggenes <- c("ALOX15","CD1B","CD1C","CD1E","TREM2","CD1D")
DCgenes <- c(DCactivatedgenes,DCrestinggenes)

celltype_dict <- list(
  CD4 = OtherCD4,
  PanTcell = PanTcell,
  TFH = TFH,
  Bcell = Bcellgenes,
  CD8Tcell_NK = CD8TcellNKgenes,
  Mast = Mastcellgenes,
  Eosinophil = Eosgenes,
  Macrophage = Macrophagegenes,
  Granulocyte = Granulocytegenes,
  DC = DCgenes
)

celltype_dict2 <- list(
  CD4 = OtherCD4,
  PanTcell = PanTcell,
  TFH = TFH,
  Treg = Treg,
  Bcell = BcellNaiveorMemory,
  Plasma = PlasmaCell,
  CD8NK=CD8TcellNKgenes2,
  Mast = Mastcellgenes,
  Eosinophil = Eosgenes,
  Monocyte = Monocyte,
  Macrophage = Macrophagegenes,
  Granulocyte = Granulocytegenes,
  DC = DCgenes
)

gene_celltype <- bind_rows(lapply(names(celltype_dict2), function(ct) {
```

```{r}
#without this step pca will be error because of a lot of genes with 0 variance
gep_filtered <- gep[, apply(gep, 2, function(x) sd(x, na.rm = TRUE) > 0)]
pca <- prcomp(gep_filtered, center=TRUE, scale.=TRUE)
pca_df <- data.frame(pca$x, Disease=Annotation$Disease, Cohort=Annotation$Cohort)
```

#Tumor RNAseq vs EPIC
```{r}
#Set Tumor RNAseq, EPICSeq Data to compare
TumorRNAtoCompare <- WES_TMM_NONE
GenesInEPIC <- colnames(EPICinferredExp)

#Prep Tumor RNA-Seq data
TumorRNAtoCompare_filter <- TumorRNAtoCompare %>% 
  filter(gene_symbol %in% GenesInEPIC)

#Filter Tumor Data
#SampleForAnalysis <- unique(EPICparameters_Omit$Sample2)
SampleForAnalysis <- unique(EPICinferredExp$Sample)
TumorForAnalysis <- gsub("-P1",".TR",SampleForAnalysis)
TumorForAnalysis_filtered <- intersect(TumorForAnalysis, colnames(TumorRNAtoCompare))
TumorRNAtoCompare_subset <- TumorRNAtoCompare[, TumorForAnalysis_filtered]
row.names(TumorRNAtoCompare_subset) <- make.unique(as.character(TumorRNAtoCompare$gene_symbol))

#Filter cfRNA Data
cfRNAForAnalysis <- gsub("-P1",".R1",SampleForAnalysis)
cfRNAForAnalysis_filtered <- intersect(cfRNAForAnalysis, colnames(TumorRNAtoCompare))
cfRNAtoCompare_subset <- TumorRNAtoCompare[, cfRNAForAnalysis_filtered]
row.names(cfRNAtoCompare_subset) <- make.unique(as.character(TumorRNAtoCompare$gene_symbol))
###########################################################
#SET EPIC data to compare
EPICtoCompare <- EPICinferredExp
############################################################

#Calculate Correlation EPIC vs TumorRNASeq for each Gene
IntersectTumorEPIC <- intersect(gsub("-P1","",SampleForAnalysis),gsub(".TR","",colnames(TumorRNAtoCompare_subset)))

IntersectGenes <- intersect(colnames(EPICtoCompare),rownames(TumorRNAtoCompare_subset))

TumorSampleToCompare <- paste0(IntersectTumorEPIC,".TR")
EPICSampleToCompare <- paste0(IntersectTumorEPIC,"-P1")


TumorRNAtoCompare_subset_subset <- TumorRNAtoCompare_subset[IntersectGenes,TumorSampleToCompare]
EPICtoCompare_t <- t(EPICtoCompare)
EPICtoCompare_subset <- EPICtoCompare_t[IntersectGenes,EPICSampleToCompare]

Results <- {}
for (i in 1:length(IntersectGenes)){
  selected_gene <- IntersectGenes[i]
  a <- t(TumorRNAtoCompare_subset_subset)[,selected_gene, drop = FALSE]
  a <- as.numeric(a)
  b <- t(EPICtoCompare_subset)[,selected_gene, drop = FALSE]
  b <- as.numeric(b)
  correlation <- cor(a,b)
  testresult <- cor.test(a,b)
  pval <- testresult[3]$p.value
  Result <- c(selected_gene,correlation,pval)
  Results <- rbind(Results, Result)
}
Results_df <- as.data.frame(Results)
colnames(Results_df) <- c("genesymbol","corrcoef","pvalue")
Results_df$corrcoef <- as.numeric(Results_df$corrcoef)
Results_df$pvalue <- as.numeric(Results_df$pvalue)
Results_df_ordered <- Results_df[order(Results_df$corrcoef),]
```

# Calculate the BSS (Between-Cluster Sum of Squares) to WSS (Within-Cluster Sum of Squares) ratio
#to assess whether subset-specific genes are more strongly correlated with genes from the same cell type than with genes from other cell types.
```{r}
#Defined by LM22 of CIBERSORTx (Newmann et al. Nature Biotech 2019)
gene_sets <- list(
  Treg = c("FOXP3","GPR171","PMCH","CTLA4","TYR","CCR4"),
  CD4naiveandmemory = c("CD4","GATA3","TBX21","CXCR3","IL3"),
  TFH = c("ICOS","PDCD1","CXCR5","CXCL13","SH2D1A","ST8SIA1","IL4"),
  PanTcell = c("CD3D","CD3G","LCK","TCF7","TRAT1","ZAP70","LEF1","RPL3P7","UBASH3A","CD2","CD28"),
  Bcellgenes = c("CD19","CD22","MS4A1","BLK","CD72","GUSBP11","MZB1","TNFRSF17","CD79A","CD79B"),
  CD8NKgenes = c("GZMK","KLRB1","GZMH","CCL5","TRDC","KLRF1","GZMA","KIR2DL1","KIR2DL2","KLRC2","KLRC3","KLRC4","GZMB"),
  Macrophagegenes = c("CCL18","CCL23","CLEC10A","CCL19","EBI3","HESX1","CHI3L1","CXCL5","MARCO","CYP27A1","CD68"),
  Neutrophilgenes = c("P2RY13","VNN2","FFAR2","FCGR3B","CXCR2","AQP9","MGAM"),
  DCgenes = c(DCactivatedgenes,DCrestinggenes),
  Mastcellgenes = c("CCL20","CEACAM8","CPA3","HDC","PRG2","TPSAB1"),
  Eosgenes = c("CLC","P2RY14","EMR1","P2RY2","EMR3")
)

#Omit Sample with Low depth
QCdataLowDepth <- QCdata %>% filter(Deduplicated.depth < 1000)
QCdataNADepth <- QCdata %>% filter(is.na(Deduplicated.depth))
Omitcase <- c("LYM1142-P1","TCL219-C1","TCL246-C1",QCdataNADepth$Stanford_ID,QCdataLowDepth$Stanford_ID)

#Set Omit Genes
Omitgene <- c(Negativegenes,BlackList)
rownames(EPICinferredExp) <- EPICinferredExp$Sample
#Set up dataframe for G2G correlation
EPICinferredExp_select <- EPICinferredExp[setdiff(rownames(EPICinferredExp),Omitcase), setdiff(colnames(EPICinferredExp), c("Sample", Omitgene))]

EPICinferredExp_select2 <- EPICinferredExp_select %>% 
  #filter(row.names(.) %in% Clindat_omitATLL_select2$Sample) %>% 
  filter(!row.names(.) %in% Omitcase)

expr_mat <- EPICinferredExp_select2


ALL_Immunegenes <- unique(unlist(gene_sets))
gene_df <- stack(gene_sets)
colnames(gene_df) <- c("gene", "celltype")

#Function to calculate WSS, BSS by Correlation Coefficients
calculate_WSS_BSS <- function(gene_set, expr_mat) {
  gene_set <- intersect(gene_set, colnames(expr_mat))
  if (length(gene_set) < 2) return(NULL)

  in_expr <- expr_mat[, gene_set, drop = FALSE]
  out_expr <- expr_mat[, setdiff(colnames(expr_mat), gene_set), drop = FALSE]

  cor_within <- cor(in_expr, use = "pairwise.complete.obs")
  cor_vec_within <- cor_within[lower.tri(cor_within)]
  WSS <- sum((1 - cor_vec_within)^2)
  WSS_per_pair <- WSS / length(cor_vec_within)

  cor_between <- cor(in_expr, out_expr, use = "pairwise.complete.obs")
  BSS <- sum((1 - cor_between)^2)
  BSS_per_pair <- BSS / length(cor_between)

  BSS_WSS_ratio <-  BSS_per_pair / WSS_per_pair

  return(data.frame(
    NumGenes = length(gene_set),
    WSS = WSS,
    BSS = BSS,
    WSS_per_pair = WSS_per_pair,
    BSS_per_pair = BSS_per_pair,
    BSS_WSS_ratio = BSS_WSS_ratio
  ))
}

results <- lapply(names(gene_sets), function(name) {
  res <- calculate_WSS_BSS(gene_sets[[name]], expr_mat)
  if (!is.null(res)) res$GeneSet <- name
  return(res)
})

results_df <- bind_rows(results) %>% dplyr::select(GeneSet, everything())

#Take random pair and calculate it
set.seed(100)  # fix to get reproducibility

# use all genes in the matrix
all_genes <- colnames(expr_mat)

# use formula that I already defined

# set random data
random_results <- list()

for (i in 1:1000) {
  size <- sample(6:10, 1)  #take 3 to 10 genes at one time
  gene_set <- sample(all_genes, size)
  res <- calculate_WSS_BSS(gene_set, expr_mat)
  if (!is.null(res)) {
    res$GeneSet <- paste0("RandomSet_", i)
    res$Random <- TRUE
    random_results[[i]] <- res
  }
}

#adding Random = FALSE to original data
results_df$Random <- FALSE

# concatenate the results from random pairs
random_df <- bind_rows(random_results)
combined_df <- bind_rows(results_df, random_df)

mean_val <- mean(random_df$BSS_WSS_ratio)
sd_val <- sd(random_df$BSS_WSS_ratio)
lower_line <- mean_val-2*sd_val
upper_line <- mean_val+2*sd_val

#Random vs. withingroup
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(combined_df, aes(x = Random, y = BSS_WSS_ratio, fill = Random)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.5, size = 1) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "BSS/WSS ratio: Real vs Random Gene Sets",
       y = "WSS/BSS (correlation-based)", x = "Random Set?") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("gray", "lightblue"))


library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)  # For side-by-side plot layout


results_df <- results_df %>%
  arrange(BSS_WSS_ratio) %>%
  mutate(GeneSet = factor(GeneSet, levels = GeneSet))

# ---- Bar plot for Observed Gene Sets ----
p1 <- ggplot(results_df, aes(x = GeneSet, y = BSS_WSS_ratio)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "skyblue", color = "black", width = 0.7) +
  theme_minimal() +
  geom_hline(yintercept = mean_val, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = c(lower_line, upper_line), linetype = "dotted", color = "red") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 10)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(title = "Observed Gene Sets", y = "BSS/WSS Ratio")

# ---- Density Plot (Rotated) for Random Gene Sets ----
mean_val <- mean(random_df$BSS_WSS_ratio, na.rm = TRUE)
sd_val <- sd(random_df$BSS_WSS_ratio, na.rm = TRUE)
lower_line <- mean_val - 2 * sd_val
upper_line <- mean_val + 2 * sd_val

p2 <- ggplot(random_df, aes(x = BSS_WSS_ratio)) +
  geom_density(fill = "skyblue", alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = mean_val, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(lower_line, upper_line), linetype = "dotted", color = "red") +
  coord_flip(xlim = c(0, 10)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y  = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank()
  ) +
  labs(title = "BSS/WSS (Random Sets \n 1000 permutation)")

# ---- Combine plots with custom width (20:4 ratio = 5:1) ----
BSSWSS <- p1 + p2 + plot_layout(ncol = 2, widths = c(5, 1))

graphics.off()
pdf("BSSWSS.Enlarged.pdf")
BSSWSS
dev.off()

```

#Draw G2G Heatmap by using 104 immune-related genes FigS8A
```{r}
#EPICtoCompare_subset2 <- EPICinferredExp_select[,IntersectGenes2]
selectedgenes <- intersect(colnames(EPICinferredExp),ALL_Immunegenes)
omitgenes <- setdiff(ALL_Immunegenes,colnames(EPICinferredExp))
analyzedcase <- setdiff(rownames(EPICinferredExp),Omitcase)
EPICtoCompare_subset2 <- EPICinferredExp[analyzedcase,selectedgenes]

#EPICtoCompare_subset_df_omit_t_df <- EPICtoCompare_subset_df_omit_t_df %>% dplyr::select(-gene)

  
gene_correlation <- cor(EPICtoCompare_subset2, method = "pearson", use = "pairwise.complete.obs")
Annotation <- data.frame(gene = rownames(gene_correlation))
Annotation_joined <- left_join(Annotation, Results_df, by = c("gene"="genesymbol"))
Annotation_joined$V2 <- as.numeric(Annotation_joined$corrcoef)
#Annotation_full <- left_join(Annotation_joined, gene_celltype, by = "gene")
Annotation_full <- left_join(Annotation_joined, gene_df, by = "gene")
Annotation_full$V3 <- as.numeric(Annotation_full$pvalue)
Annotation_full$V2 <- as.numeric(Annotation_full$V2)
Annotation_full$celltype <- as.character(Annotation_full$celltype)
Annotation_full$celltype[is.na(Annotation_full$celltype)] <- "Unknown"

results_df <- results_df %>%
  mutate(GeneSet = case_when(
    GeneSet == "Granulocytegenes"      ~ "Neutrophil",
    GeneSet == "Eosgenes"              ~ "Eosinophil",
    GeneSet == "PanTcell"              ~ "Pan T-cell",
    GeneSet == "CD4naiveandmemory"     ~ "CD4+ T-cell",
    GeneSet == "Treg"                  ~ "Treg",
    GeneSet == "TFH"                   ~ "Tfh",
    GeneSet == "Bcellgenes"            ~ "B-cell/Plasma cell",
    GeneSet == "Macrophagegenes"       ~ "Macrophage",
    GeneSet == "DCgenes"               ~ "DC",
    GeneSet == "CD8NKgenes"            ~ "CD8orNK",
    GeneSet == "Mastcellgenes"         ~ "Mast cell",
    TRUE                               ~ GeneSet  # それ以外はそのまま
  ))

celltype_map <- c(
  Granulocytegenes    = "Neutrophil",
  Eosgenes            = "Eosinophil",
  PanTcell            = "Pan T-cell",
  CD4naiveandmemory   = "CD4+ T-cell",
  Treg                = "Treg",
  TFH                 = "Tfh",
  Bcellgenes          = "B-cell/Plasma cell",
  Macrophagegenes     = "Macrophage",
  DCgenes             = "DC",
  CD8NKgenes          = "CD8orNK",
  Mastcellgenes       = "Mast cell"
)

gene_df <- gene_df %>%
  mutate(celltype = recode(celltype, !!!celltype_map))

celltypes <- results_df %>%
  arrange(desc(BSS_WSS_ratio)) %>%
  pull(GeneSet)

palette_colors <- viridis(length(celltypes), option = "A")
celltypes_full <- c(as.character(celltypes), "Unknown")
#########################################################################
#set celltype colors by BSS/WSS
```

```{r}
mat <- as.matrix(EPICinferredExp_analysis_scale)

# Maximum K
k_max <- min(10, nrow(mat) - 1)
set.seed(123)

## ===== 1) Elbow Plot（k-meansのWSS） =====
wss <- sapply(1:k_max, function(k) {
  km <- kmeans(mat, centers = k, nstart = 25, iter.max = 100)
  km$tot.withinss
})
df_wss <- data.frame(k = 1:k_max, WSS = wss)


elbow <- ggplot(df_wss, aes(x = k, y = WSS)) +
  geom_point() + geom_line() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 3, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  labs(title = "Elbow plot (rows = genes)",
       x = "Number of clusters (k)", y = "Total within-cluster sum of squares") +
  theme_bw()
graphics.off()
pdf("00Fig6A_row_elbow_kmeans.pdf", width = 5.5, height = 4.2)
elbow 
dev.off()

## ===== 2) Silhouette plot=====
library(cluster)
d   <- dist(mat, method = "euclidean")
hcl <- hclust(d, method = "ward.D2")

sil_mean <- sapply(2:k_max, function(k) {
  cl <- cutree(hcl, k = k)
  mean(silhouette(cl, d)[, 3])
})
df_sil <- data.frame(k = 2:k_max, mean_sil = sil_mean)


silhouette <- ggplot(df_sil, aes(x = k, y = mean_sil)) +
  geom_point() + geom_line() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 3, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  labs(title = "Average silhouette width (Ward.D2, rows = genes)",
       x = "Number of clusters (k)", y = "Mean silhouette") +
  theme_bw()
graphics.off()
pdf("00Fig6A_row_silhouette_hclust.pdf", width = 5.5, height = 4.2)
```

#Get genes that correlate well with AF
```{r}
geo_mean <- function(x, na.rm = TRUE) {
  if (na.rm) {
    x <- x[!is.na(x)]
  }
  if (any(x <= 0)) {
    stop("Geometric mean is only defined for positive numbers.")
  }
  exp(mean(log(x)))
}

#Remaking geneset to project AF to EPIC-Seq space
library(dplyr)

val_all <- CTRDiseaseEPICTCLv5_all_join %>%
  filter(
    Disease %in% c("PTCLNOS","TFH","ALKposALCL","ALKnegALCL","ENKTL","Healthy"),
    )

drop_ids <- c("TSTCL107-C1", "TSTCL117-P2", "TSTCL080-C1")
val_all2 <- val_all %>% filter(!SampleID %in% drop_ids)

# --- 1) gene block (numeric) ---------------------------------
gene_cols <- colnames(val_all2)[1:381]
gmat <- as.data.frame(val_all2[, gene_cols, drop = FALSE])
gmat[] <- lapply(gmat, function(z) if (is.numeric(z)) z else suppressWarnings(as.numeric(z)))

# --- 2) drop columns that are all non-finite -----------------
all_bad <- sapply(gmat, function(v) sum(is.finite(v)) == 0)
gmat <- gmat[, !all_bad, drop = FALSE]

# --- 3) drop zero-variance columns among finite values -------
has_var <- sapply(gmat, function(v) {
  fv <- v[is.finite(v)]
  length(fv) >= 2 && sd(fv) > 0
})
gmat <- gmat[, has_var, drop = FALSE]

kept_gene_cols <- colnames(gmat)

cat("Removed all-NA/Inf genes:", sum(all_bad), "\n")
cat("Removed zero-variance genes:", sum(!has_var), "\n")
cat("Kept genes:", ncol(gmat), "\n")

# --- 4A)
row_ok <- apply(gmat, 1, function(r) all(is.finite(r)))
X <- as.matrix(gmat[row_ok, , drop = FALSE]) 
val_all2 <- val_all2 %>% 
  mutate(Combined_AF = ifelse(grepl("CTR",SampleID) & Disease == "Healthy",0,Combined_AF))
y <- val_all2$Combined_AF

# ---------- helpers ----------
# Select top-k by Spearman correlation on training ONLY
select_topk <- function(X_tr, y_tr, k){
  cors <- apply(X_tr, 2, function(v) suppressWarnings(cor(v, y_tr, method="spearman", use="complete.obs")))
  ord  <- order(cors, decreasing = TRUE)  # NA will go to the end automatically if any
  sel_idx <- ord[seq_len(min(k, sum(is.finite(cors))))]
  list(
    genes    = colnames(X_tr)[sel_idx],
    cor_vec  = cors,
    ord_full = sel_idx   # integer indices of decreasing-order
  )
}

# Log-geomean on log-space = rowMeans of selected columns
score_log_geomean <- function(X_mat, genes) {
  if (length(genes) == 0L) return(rep(NA_real_, nrow(X_mat)))
  rowMeans(as.matrix(X_mat[, genes, drop=FALSE]), na.rm = TRUE)
}

# ---------- outer 10-fold (stratify by y quantiles if fold_id not provided) ----------
set.seed(123)
K_outer <- 10
if (!exists("fold_id")) {
  # stratify by y deciles to keep distribution balanced across folds
  qs <- quantile(y, probs = seq(0, 1, length.out = 11), na.rm = TRUE)
  bucket <- cut(y, unique(qs), include.lowest = TRUE)
  # build approximately equal folds within buckets
  fold_id <- integer(length(y))
  for (lev in levels(bucket)) {
    idx <- which(bucket == lev)
    fold_id[idx] <- sample(rep_len(1:K_outer, length(idx)))
  }
}
#stopifnot(length(fold_id) == length(y))

k_grid <- 1:20

perf_rows <- list()   
sel_rows  <- list()   

ctr <- 1
for (kfold in seq_len(K_outer)) {
  te_idx <- which(fold_id == kfold)
  tr_idx <- setdiff(seq_len(nrow(X)), te_idx)

  X_tr <- X[tr_idx, , drop=FALSE]
  y_tr <- y[tr_idx]
  X_te <- X[te_idx, , drop=FALSE]
  y_te <- y[te_idx]

  # choose k inside training (simple inner selection: maximize train Spearman)
  cand <- lapply(k_grid, function(k) {
    sel  <- select_topk(X_tr, y_tr, k)
    s_tr <- score_log_geomean(X_tr, sel$genes)
    r_tr <- suppressWarnings(cor(s_tr, y_tr, method="spearman", use="complete.obs"))
    data.frame(k=k, spearman_tr=r_tr)
  }) %>% bind_rows()

  k_star <- cand$k[which.max(cand$spearman_tr)]
  sel    <- select_topk(X_tr, y_tr, k_star)

  # record selected genes with within-training rank & gene-wise corr (for Table S3)
  # ranks are positions in decreasing order (1 = strongest positive)
  # build a named rank vector
  full_order <- sel$ord_full
  ranks <- integer(length(sel$cor_vec)); ranks[full_order] <- seq_along(full_order)
  this_sel <- data.frame(
    fold_id = kfold,
    gene    = sel$genes,
    rank_in_fold = ranks[match(sel$genes, colnames(X_tr))],
    spearman_gene_train = sel$cor_vec[sel$genes],
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  sel_rows[[ctr]] <- this_sel

  # evaluate on test (Table S1 metrics)
  s_te <- score_log_geomean(X_te, sel$genes)
  keep <- is.finite(s_te) & is.finite(y_te)
  spearman <- suppressWarnings(cor(s_te[keep], y_te[keep], method = "spearman"))
  pearson  <- suppressWarnings(cor(s_te[keep], y_te[keep], method = "pearson"))
  rmse_v   <- if (any(keep)) rmse(y_te[keep], s_te[keep]) else NA_real_
  mae_v    <- if (any(keep)) mae (y_te[keep], s_te[keep]) else NA_real_

  perf_rows[[ctr]] <- data.frame(
    fold_id     = kfold,
    n_train     = length(tr_idx),
    n_test      = length(te_idx),
    k_selected  = k_star,
    spearman_test = spearman,
    pearson_test  = pearson,
    rmse_test     = rmse_v,
    mae_test      = mae_v,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  ctr <- ctr + 1
}

TableS17 <- bind_rows(perf_rows) %>% #TableS17
  arrange(fold_id)

# Aggregate for Table S3: frequency and rank summaries across folds
sel_long <- bind_rows(sel_rows)

TableS18 <- sel_long %>%
  group_by(gene) %>%
  summarise(
    freq_selected = n(),                              # times selected across folds
    median_rank_when_selected = median(rank_in_fold, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_rank_when_selected   = mean(rank_in_fold, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_genewise_corr      = median(spearman_gene_train, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(freq_selected), median_rank_when_selected, desc(median_genewise_corr)) %>%
  filter(freq_selected > 0)

# ---- write CSVs ----
write.csv(TableS17, "Table_S17_per_fold_performance.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(TableS18, "Table_S18_stable_genes_summary.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# ---- quick console summaries ----
cat("\n=== Table S17 (per-fold performance) ===\n")
print(TableS17)

cat("\nOverall (mean ± sd) across folds:\n")
summ <- function(v) c(mean=mean(v,na.rm=TRUE), sd=sd(v,na.rm=TRUE))
print(rbind(
  spearman_test = summ(TableS17$spearman_test),
  pearson_test  = summ(TableS17$pearson_test),
  rmse_test     = summ(TableS17$rmse_test),
  mae_test      = summ(TableS17$mae_test)
))

cat("\n=== Top of Table S18 (stable genes) ===\n")
print(head(TableS18, 20))
stable_genes <- TableS18 %>% 
  filter(freq_selected > 2) %>% 
  pull(gene)

Clindat_omitATLL2 <- Clininfo_AF_combined %>%
  filter(!is.na(cfDNA25pctMax_AF))

Clindat_omitATLL_select2 <- Clindat_omitATLL2 %>% 
  dplyr::select(Sample="Sample1",AF="cfDNA25pctMax_AF")

#Omit Sample with Low depth
QCdataLowDepth <- QCdata %>% filter(Deduplicated.depth < 1000)
QCdataNADepth <- QCdata %>% filter(is.na(Deduplicated.depth))
Omitcase <- c(QCdataNADepth$Stanford_ID,QCdataLowDepth$Stanford_ID)

#Set Omit Genes
Omitgene <- c(Negativegenes,BlackList)
rownames(EPICinferredExp) <- EPICinferredExp$Sample
#Set up dataframe for G2G correlation
EPICinferredExp_select <- EPICinferredExp[setdiff(rownames(EPICinferredExp),Omitcase), setdiff(colnames(EPICinferredExp), c("Sample", Omitgene))]

EPICinferredExp_select2 <- EPICinferredExp_select %>% 
  #filter(row.names(.) %in% Clindat_omitATLL_select2$Sample) %>% 
  filter(!row.names(.) %in% Omitcase)

expr_mat <- EPICinferredExp_select2
expr_mat_t <- t(expr_mat)

score_vec <- colSums(expr_mat_t[stable_genes, ])
score_vec_norm <- score_vec/length(stable_genes)


#Normalization Factor
#only baseline
expr_sub <- CTRDiseaseEPICTCLv5_t[stable_genes, ]
expr_sub <- as.data.frame(expr_sub)
expr_sub <- mutate_all(expr_sub, as.numeric)
score_vec <- apply(expr_sub, 2, function(v) mean(v[is.finite(v)], na.rm = TRUE))

#all samples
expr_all_sub <- CTRDiseaseEPICTCLv5_all_join_t[stable_genes, ]
expr_all_sub <- as.data.frame(expr_all_sub)
expr_all_sub <- mutate_all(expr_all_sub, as.numeric)
score_vec_all <- apply(expr_all_sub, 2, function(v) mean(v[is.finite(v)], na.rm = TRUE))

#score_vec <- apply(expr_sub, 2, function(x) sum(x * weights/10))
score_vec_df <- as.data.frame(score_vec)
Clininfo_AF_combined_AFannotation <- Clininfo_AF_combined %>% 
  dplyr::select(Sample1,cfDNA25pctMax_AF,Disease)
score_vec_df_join <- score_vec_df %>% 
  mutate(Sample1 = rownames(.)) %>% 
  left_join(Clininfo_AF_combined_AFannotation, by="Sample1") %>% 
  filter(!Disease %in% c("PCGDTCL","NA","SS")) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(Disease))

score_vec_df_join2 <- score_vec_df_join %>% 
  mutate(Disease = ifelse(Disease %in% c("MEITL","EATL","Unknown"),"Others",Disease)) %>% 
  mutate(Disease = ifelse(Disease %in% c("ATLLlymphoma","ATLLacutetype"),"ATLL",Disease)) %>% 
  filter(Disease != "Others")

desired_levels <- c("ATLL","TFH","PTCLNOS","ALKposALCL","ALKnegALCL","ENKTL")

score_vec_df_join2 <- score_vec_df_join2 %>%
  mutate(Disease = factor(Disease, levels = desired_levels)) %>% 
  filter(!Sample1 %in% drop_ids) 

#Plot Correlation with AF (show if the geomean of these genes are correlated with AF in all subtypes)

FigS8C <- ggplot(score_vec_df_join2, aes(x = score_vec, y = cfDNA25pctMax_AF, color = Disease)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.5) +
  facet_wrap(~ Disease, ncol = 3, drop = FALSE) + 

  stat_cor(
    method = "pearson",
    size = 2.5,
    label.x.npc = "left",
    label.y.npc = 0.98
  ) +
  stat_cor(
    method = "spearman",
    size = 2.5,
    label.x.npc = "left",
    label.y.npc = 0.88
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = disease2_colors[desired_levels],
    breaks = desired_levels,
    drop = FALSE,
    guide = "none"
  )+
  labs(title="cfDNA AF vs. EPIC-Seq Geomean of Tumor-rel genes",
       x = "EPIC-Seq Geomean of Tumor-rel genes",
       y = "Mean AF in cfDNA")

FigS8C2 <- ggplot(score_vec_df_join2, aes(x = score_vec, y = cfDNA25pctMax_AF)) +
  geom_point() +
  #facet_wrap(~ Disease, ncol = 3, drop = FALSE) + 
  stat_cor(method = "pearson") +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = disease2_colors[desired_levels],
    breaks = desired_levels,
    drop = FALSE,
    guide = "none"
  )+
  labs(title="cfDNA AF vs. EPIC-Seq Geomean of Tumor-rel genes",
       x = "EPIC-Seq Geomean of Tumor-rel genes",
       y = "Mean AF in cfDNA")

fit <- lm(cfDNA25pctMax_AF/100 ~ score_vec, data = score_vec_df_join2)

summary(fit)
coef(fit) # AF = 0.02203(score_vec + 6.5)
estimated_offset <- coef(fit)[1]/coef(fit)[2]

#Normalize
expr_mat <- CTRDiseaseEPICTCLv5[,1:381]
expr_norm <- sweep(expr_mat, 1, score_vec, FUN = "-")
expr_norm_join <- expr_norm %>% 
  mutate(Sample1 = rownames(expr_norm)) %>% 
  left_join(Clininfo_AF_combined, by = "Sample1")
```
