#TME analsysis EPIC 
```{r}
##############################################################################
# Helper functions
##############################################################################

geo_mean <- function(x, na.rm = TRUE) {
  if (na.rm) x <- x[!is.na(x)]
  x <- x[is.finite(x)]
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  if (any(x <= 0)) return(NA_real_)
  exp(mean(log(x)))
}

calc_geom_mean <- function(expr_mat, genes) {
  genes_use <- intersect(genes, colnames(expr_mat))
  if (length(genes_use) == 0) {
    warning("No genes found in expression matrix.")
    return(rep(NA_real_, nrow(expr_mat)))
  }
  apply(expr_mat[, genes_use, drop = FALSE], 1, geo_mean)
}

make_epic_ratio <- function(
    df,
    geom_col,
    global_df,
    tumor_log_col = "tcell_geom_mean_log",
    offset = estimated_offset
){
  
  x <- log2(df[[geom_col]])
  
  xmin <- min(
    log2(global_df[[geom_col]]),
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
  
  (x - xmin) /
    (df[[tumor_log_col]] + offset)
}

make_cor_result <- function(df, x, y, method = "spearman") {
  ct <- cor.test(df[[x]], df[[y]], method = method)
  tibble(
    x = x,
    y = y,
    R = unname(ct$estimate),
    p.value = ct$p.value,
    label = paste0("R=", round(unname(ct$estimate), 3),
                   ", p.value=", round(ct$p.value, 3))
  )
}

make_ratio_plot <- function(df, x, y, title, xlab, ylab) {
  ggplot(df, aes(x = .data[[x]], y = .data[[y]])) +
    geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.85) +
    labs(
      title = title,
      x = xlab,
      y = ylab
    ) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) +
    stat_cor(method = "pearson", size = 2.5, 
             label.x.npc = "left",label.y.npc = 0.98)
}

fit_cox_one <- function(df, var) {
  fit <- coxph(
    as.formula(paste0("Surv(Days_EFS, EFS) ~ ", var)),
    data = df
  )
  
  broom::tidy(fit, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE) %>%
    mutate(variable = var)
}

##############################################################################
# 1. Prepare tumor RNA CIBERSORTx data
##############################################################################

TumorRNACSxTM4LM22_WES_Tumor_omit_WJHS <-
  TumorRNACSxTM4LM22_WES %>%
  filter(grepl("\\.TR", Mixture)) %>%
  mutate(
    PatientID = gsub("\\.TR", "", Mixture),
    nonBlood = 1 - CD45
  ) %>%
  filter(Correlation.y > 0.5)

##############################################################################
# 2. Join EPIC-Seq, tumor RNA CIBERSORTx, and clinical data
##############################################################################

EPICinferredExp_join <- EPICinferredExp %>%
  mutate(SampleID = Sample) %>%
  separate(SampleID, c("PatientID", "Timepoint"), sep = "-") %>%
  filter(Sample %in% cfDNAannotation_atDxlist) %>%
  left_join(TumorRNACSxTM4LM22_WES_Tumor_omit_WJHS, by = "PatientID") %>%
  left_join(Clininfo_AF_combined, by = "PatientID")

##############################################################################
# 3. Make non-log EPIC expression
##############################################################################

EPICinferredExp_select2_nonlog <- 2^EPICinferredExp_select2

##############################################################################
# 4. Define gene sets
##############################################################################

gene_sets <- list(
  B_geom_mean = c("CD19", "CD79B", "CD22", "CD72", "MS4A1", "CD79A", "MZB1", "BANK1"),
  TFH_geom_mean = TFH,
  DC_geom_mean = DCgenes,
  M2_geom_mean = M2genes,
  Mpahge_geom_mean = c(M0genes, M1genes, M2genes),
  Treg_geom_mean = Treg,
  Eosino_geom_mean = Eosgenes,
  CD8NK_geom_mean = CD8TcellNKgenes,
  Granulo_geom_mean = Granulocytegenes,
  PanT_geom_mean = PanTcell,
  Monocyte_geom_mean = Monocyte,
  Mast_geom_mean = c("TPSAB1", "PRG2", "HDC", "CPA3", "CEACAM8", "CXCL3"),
  nonGranuloMono_Myeloid_geom_mean = c(DCgenes, M2genes, M0genes, M1genes),
  tumor_geom_mean = stable_genes
)

##############################################################################
# 5. Calculate geometric means
##############################################################################

geom_df <- map_dfc(
  gene_sets,
  ~ calc_geom_mean(EPICinferredExp_select2_nonlog, .x)
)

geom_df <- as.data.frame(geom_df)
geom_df$Sample1 <- rownames(EPICinferredExp_select2_nonlog)

geom_df <- geom_df %>%
  mutate(
    tcell_geom_mean = tumor_geom_mean,
    tcell_geom_mean_log = log2(tumor_geom_mean),
    PanT_geom_mean_log = log2(PanT_geom_mean)
  )

Merged.df <- geom_df

##############################################################################
# 6. Join with clinical / CIBERSORTx data
##############################################################################

Merged.df.join <- Merged.df %>%
  left_join(EPICinferredExp_join, by = "Sample1")

##############################################################################
# 7. Create RNA-Seq CSx / Tumor AF ratios and EPIC ratios
##############################################################################

ratio_specs <- tribble(
  ~cell,        ~rna_ratio_expr,                                                ~epic_geom_col,
  "Bcell",     "(B.cells.naive + B.cells.memory + Plasma.cells)",              "B_geom_mean",
  "Macrophage","(Macrophages.M1 + Macrophages.M2)",                            "Mpahge_geom_mean",
  "DC",        "(Dendritic.cells.activated + Dendritic.cells.resting)",        "DC_geom_mean",
  "Eos",       "Eosinophils",                                                  "Eosino_geom_mean",
  "Mast",      "(Mast.cells.activated + Mast.cells.resting)",                  "Mast_geom_mean",
  "Neu",       "Neutrophils",                                                  "Granulo_geom_mean"
)

Merged.df.join_filter_forcox <- Merged.df.join

for (i in seq_len(nrow(ratio_specs))) {
  
  cell <- ratio_specs$cell[i]
  rna_expr <- ratio_specs$rna_ratio_expr[i]
  epic_geom_col <- ratio_specs$epic_geom_col[i]
  
  rna_ratio_col <- paste0(cell, "TumorRatio")
  epic_ratio_col <- paste0("EPIC_", cell, "TumorRatio")
  
  Merged.df.join_filter_forcox[[rna_ratio_col]] <-
    eval(parse(text = rna_expr), envir = Merged.df.join_filter_forcox) /
    Merged.df.join_filter_forcox$Tumor25pctMax_AF1_T *2 * 100
  
  Merged.df.join_filter_forcox[[epic_ratio_col]] <-
    make_epic_ratio(
      Merged.df.join_filter_forcox,
      geom_col = epic_geom_col,
      global_df = Merged.df.join
    )
}


##############################################################################
# 8. Filter for fraction correlation analysis
##############################################################################

Merged.df.join_filterFrac <- Merged.df.join_filter_forcox %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(Mixture),
    Tumor25pctMax_AF1_T > 1,
    cfDNA25pctMax_AF > 0.5
  )

##############################################################################
# 9. Correlation analysis
##############################################################################

corTumorEPIC_Tumor <- cor.test(
  Merged.df.join_filterFrac$Tumor25pctMax_AF1_T,
  Merged.df.join_filterFrac$tcell_geom_mean_log,
  method = "spearman"
)

corTumorEPIC_Tumor_label <- paste0(
  "R=", round(unname(corTumorEPIC_Tumor$estimate), 3),
  ", p.value=", round(corTumorEPIC_Tumor$p.value, 3)
)

cor_tbl <- map_dfr(ratio_specs$cell, function(cell) {
  make_cor_result(
    Merged.df.join_filterFrac,
    x = paste0(cell, "TumorRatio"),
    y = paste0("EPIC_", cell, "TumorRatio"),
    method = "spearman"
  ) %>%
    mutate(cell = cell)
}) %>%
  dplyr::select(cell, x, y, R, p.value, label)

corTumorEPIC_merged_TMETumorRatio <- c(
  corTumorEPIC_Tumor_label,
  cor_tbl$label
)

print(cor_tbl)

##############################################################################
# 10. Plots
##############################################################################

plot_specs <- tribble(
  ~fig_name, ~cell, ~title, ~xlab, ~ylab,
  "FigS8E1", "Bcell",
  "B cell / Tumor ratio",
  "B-cell / Tumor Ratio in Tumor",
  "B-cell / Tumor Ratio in cfDNA",
  
  "FigS8E2", "Macrophage",
  "Macrophage (Mø) / Tumor ratio",
  "Mø / Tumor Ratio in Tumor",
  "Mø / Tumor Ratio in cfDNA",
  
  "DCTfrac", "DC",
  "Dendritic cell (DC) / Tumor ratio",
  "DC fraction RNA-Seq CSx / mut AF in Tumor",
  "DC / Tumor-rel inferred GEP in cfDNA",
  
  "FigS8E3", "Eos",
  "Eosinophil (Eos) / Tumor ratio",
  "Eos / Tumor Ratio in Tumor",
  "Eos / Tumor Ratio in cfDNA",
  
  "FigS8E4", "Mast",
  "Mast cell / Tumor ratio",
  "Mast / Tumor Ratio in Tumor",
  "Mast / Tumor Ratio in cfDNA"
)

plot_list <- map(seq_len(nrow(plot_specs)), function(i) {
  
  cell <- plot_specs$cell[i]
  
  make_ratio_plot(
    df = Merged.df.join_filterFrac,
    x = paste0(cell, "TumorRatio"),
    y = paste0("EPIC_", cell, "TumorRatio"),
    title = plot_specs$title[i],
    xlab = plot_specs$xlab[i],
    ylab = plot_specs$ylab[i]
  )
})

names(plot_list) <- plot_specs$fig_name

FigS8E1 <- plot_list$FigS8E1
FigS8E2 <- plot_list$FigS8E2
DCTfrac <- plot_list$DCTfrac
FigS8E3 <- plot_list$FigS8E3
FigS8E4 <- plot_list$FigS8E4

plot(FigS8E1)
plot(FigS8E2)
plot(FigS8E3)
plot(FigS8E4)

##############################################################################
# 11. Cox model dataset
##############################################################################

Merged.df.join_filter_forcox2 <- Merged.df.join_filter_forcox %>%
  filter(!Disease %in% c("MEITL", "ENKTL", "SS", "ATLLacutetype", "ATLLlymphoma")) %>%
  filter(Cohort %in% c("CZECH biobank","Stanford","NCT03297697")) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(Disease)) %>% 
  dplyr::select(
    PatientID,
    Days_EFS,
    EFS,
    Disease,
    cfDNA25pctMax_AF,
    tcell_geom_mean_log,
    EPIC_BcellTumorRatio,
    EPIC_MacrophageTumorRatio,
    EPIC_DCTumorRatio,
    EPIC_MastTumorRatio,
    EPIC_EosTumorRatio,
    EPIC_NeuTumorRatio,
    Treatment,
    B_geom_mean,
    Mpahge_geom_mean,
    DC_geom_mean,
    Eosino_geom_mean,
    Mast_geom_mean,
    nonGranuloMono_Myeloid_geom_mean,
    CD8NK_geom_mean,
    Granulo_geom_mean
  )

Clininfo_AF_combined_annotation_EPIC <- Clininfo_AF_combined %>%
  dplyr::select(PatientID, IPI, Disease) %>%
  mutate(
    IPI2 = case_when(
      IPI %in% c("Low", "Low int") ~ "Low",
      IPI %in% c("High", "High int") ~ "High",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    IPI = factor(IPI, levels = c("Low", "Low int", "High int", "High")),
    Disease = factor(Disease, levels = c("PTCLNOS", "TFH", "ALKnegALCL", "ALKposALCL"))
  )

Merged.df.join_filter_forcox2 <- Merged.df.join_filter_forcox2 %>%
  left_join(Clininfo_AF_combined_annotation_EPIC, by = "PatientID") %>%
  mutate(B_geom_mean_log = log2(B_geom_mean))

##############################################################################
# 12. Univariate Cox models
##############################################################################

cox_vars <- c(
  Tumor = "tcell_geom_mean_log",
  `B-cell` = "EPIC_BcellTumorRatio",
  `Mø` = "EPIC_MacrophageTumorRatio",
  DC = "EPIC_DCTumorRatio",
  Mast = "EPIC_MastTumorRatio",
  Eos = "EPIC_EosTumorRatio",
  Neu = "EPIC_NeuTumorRatio"
)

cox_tbl <- imap_dfr(cox_vars, function(var, label) {
  fit_cox_one(Merged.df.join_filter_forcox2, var) %>%
    mutate(NAME = label)
})

cox_tbl_select <- cox_tbl %>%
  dplyr::select(
    NAME,
    HR = estimate,
    LR = conf.low,
    UR = conf.high,
    P = p.value
  )

##############################################################################
# 13. Multivariate Cox
##############################################################################

cox_multi <- coxph(
  Surv(Days_EFS, EFS) ~ tcell_geom_mean_log + IPI2,
  data = Merged.df.join_filter_forcox2
)

multicox_tbl <- broom::tidy(
  cox_multi,
  exponentiate = TRUE,
  conf.int = TRUE
) %>%
  mutate(
    NAME = c("Tumor", "IPI Low")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    NAME,
    HR = estimate,
    LR = conf.low,
    UR = conf.high,
    P = p.value
  )

EPICresultcox_select <- bind_rows(
  cox_tbl_select %>% filter(NAME != "Neu"),
  multicox_tbl
) %>%
  mutate(
    UR = ifelse(is.infinite(UR), 10, UR),
    HR = as.numeric(HR),
    LR = as.numeric(LR),
    UR = as.numeric(UR),
    P = as.numeric(P)
  )

print(EPICresultcox_select)

##############################################################################
# 14. Stepwise multivariate + AIC
##############################################################################

vars <- c(
  "Days_EFS",
  "EFS",
  "tcell_geom_mean_log",
  "IPI2",
  "PatientID",
  "EPIC_BcellTumorRatio",
  "EPIC_DCTumorRatio",
  "EPIC_EosTumorRatio",
  "EPIC_MacrophageTumorRatio",
  "EPIC_NeuTumorRatio",
  "EPIC_MastTumorRatio"
)

dat_cc <- Merged.df.join_filter_forcox2 %>%
  dplyr::select(all_of(vars)) %>%
  filter(complete.cases(.)) %>%
  tidyr::drop_na()

full_fit <- coxph(
  Surv(Days_EFS, EFS) ~
    tcell_geom_mean_log +
    IPI2 +
    EPIC_EosTumorRatio +
    EPIC_MacrophageTumorRatio +
    EPIC_MastTumorRatio,
  data = dat_cc,
  ties = "efron",
  na.action = na.fail
)

step_fit <- stepAIC(full_fit, direction = "both", trace = TRUE)
multicox2 <- summary(step_fit)

##############################################################################
# 15. Nonlinearity check by spline AIC
##############################################################################
library(splines)
vars_in_model <- attr(terms(full_fit), "term.labels")

cont_candidates <- names(dat_cc)[sapply(dat_cc, is.numeric)]
cont_candidates <- setdiff(cont_candidates, c("Days_EFS", "EFS"))
cont_in_model <- intersect(vars_in_model, cont_candidates)

nonlinear_check <- map_df(cont_in_model, function(v) {
  
  f_lin <- reformulate(
    vars_in_model,
    response = "Surv(Days_EFS, EFS)"
  )
  
  f_spl <- reformulate(
    replace(vars_in_model, vars_in_model == v, paste0("ns(", v, ", 3)")),
    response = "Surv(Days_EFS, EFS)"
  )
  
  fit_lin <- coxph(f_lin, data = dat_cc, ties = "efron", na.action = na.fail)
  fit_spl <- coxph(f_spl, data = dat_cc, ties = "efron", na.action = na.fail)
  
  tibble(
    var = v,
    AIC_linear = AIC(fit_lin),
    AIC_spline = AIC(fit_spl),
    dAIC = AIC(fit_spl) - AIC(fit_lin)
  )
})

print(nonlinear_check)

##############################################################################
# 16. Martingale residual check
##############################################################################

fit_lin <- step_fit
mr <- residuals(fit_lin, type = "martingale")

pdf("00martingale_Tumor.pdf")
plot(dat_cc$tcell_geom_mean_log, mr)
lines(lowess(dat_cc$tcell_geom_mean_log, mr))
dev.off()

##############################################################################
# 17. VIF-like collinearity check
##############################################################################

dat_cc_vif <- Merged.df.join_filter_forcox2

mm <- model.matrix(delete.response(terms(cox_multi)), data = dat_cc_vif)
mm <- mm[, colnames(mm) != "(Intercept)", drop = FALSE]

C <- cor(mm)
VIF_like <- diag(solve(C))

vif_tbl <- tibble(
  term = colnames(mm),
  VIF_like = as.numeric(VIF_like)
) %>%
  arrange(desc(VIF_like))

print(vif_tbl)
print(round(cor(mm), 2))

##############################################################################
# 18. Forest plot
##############################################################################

plothead <- cbind(
  EPICresultcox_select$NAME,
  format(EPICresultcox_select$P, digits = 2)
)

FigS8D <- forestplot(
  labeltext = plothead,
  boxsize = 0.25,
  graphwidth = unit(25, "mm"),
  colgap = unit(2, "mm"),
  mean = EPICresultcox_select$HR,
  lower = EPICresultcox_select$LR,
  upper = EPICresultcox_select$UR,
  clip = c(0.2, 5),
  xlog = TRUE,
  col = fpColors(
    box = "royalblue",
    line = "darkblue",
    summary = "royalblue"
  ),
  grid = c(0.2, 1.0, 5),
  xticks = c(0.2, 1, 5),
  title = "Event = Relapse & Death",
  txt_gp = fpTxtGp(
    label = gpar(fontsize = 8),
    xlab  = gpar(fontsize = 8),
    ticks = gpar(fontsize = 12),
    title = gpar(fontsize = 10))
)

pdf("FigS8D.pdf")
FigS8D
dev.off()
```

#Make Pan-PTCL Lasso/ElasticNet model
#Nested CV (outer 10-fold × inner 10-fold), repeated 10 times
```{r}
# ==========================
# Nested CV (outer 10-fold × inner 10-fold), repeated 10 times
# ==========================
library(glmnet)
library(Metrics)     # for rmse(), mae()
library(caret)       # for createFolds()
library(dplyr)
library(stats)

# --------------------------
# Inputs (assumed prepared)
# X: samples x genes (numeric matrix or data.frame)
# --- 0) subset & sample drop ---------------------------------
val_all <- CTRDiseaseEPICTCLv5_all_join %>%
  #filter(Disease %in% c("ATLLacutetype","PTCLNOS","TFH","ALKposALCL","ALKnegALCL","ENKTL")) %>% 
  filter(!SampleID %in% unique(CTRDiseaseEPICTCLv5_all_join$Sample3)) %>% 
  filter(!grepl("CTR",SampleID)) %>% 
  filter(Disease %in% c("PTCLNOS","TFH","ALKposALCL","ALKnegALCL"))

drop_ids <- c("TSTCL107-C1", "TSTCL080-C1", Omitcase)
val_all2 <- val_all %>% filter(!SampleID %in% drop_ids)

# --- 1) gene block (numeric) ---------------------------------
gene_cols <- colnames(val_all2)[1:381]
gmat <- as.data.frame(val_all2[, gene_cols, drop = FALSE])
gmat[] <- lapply(gmat, function(z) if (is.numeric(z)) z else suppressWarnings(as.numeric(z)))

# --- 2) drop columns that are all non-finite -----------------
all_bad <- sapply(gmat, function(v) sum(is.finite(v)) == 0)
gmat <- gmat[, !all_bad, drop = FALSE]

# --- 3) drop zero-variance columns among finite values -------
has_var <- sapply(gmat, function(v) {
  fv <- v[is.finite(v)]
  length(fv) >= 2 && sd(fv) > 0
})
gmat <- gmat[, has_var, drop = FALSE]

kept_gene_cols <- colnames(gmat)

cat("Removed all-NA/Inf genes:", sum(all_bad), "\n")
cat("Removed zero-variance genes:", sum(!has_var), "\n")
cat("Kept genes:", ncol(gmat), "\n")

# --- 4A)
row_ok <- apply(gmat, 1, function(r) all(is.finite(r)))
X <- as.matrix(gmat[row_ok, , drop = FALSE])
y <- val_all2$Combined_AF[row_ok]

meta <- val_all2[row_ok, setdiff(colnames(val_all2), gene_cols), drop = FALSE]

cat("Dropped rows (any NA/Inf in genes):", sum(!row_ok), "\n")
cat("Remaining samples:", nrow(X), "\n")
# Optional stratification label (e.g., disease). If not available, we will stratify by y quantiles.
# --------------------------
# ----------------------------
# Sanity check & basic cleanup
# ----------------------------
stopifnot(nrow(X) == length(y))
X <- as.matrix(X)

# ----------------------------
# Settings
# ----------------------------
K_outer    <- 10          # outer folds
R_repeats  <- 10           # repeats of outer CV
K_inner    <- 5          # inner folds for cv.glmnet
alphas     <- 0.5         # e.g., c(1.0, 0.75, 0.5, 0.25) for Elastic Net search
use_lambda <- "lambda.1se"  # "lambda.1se" (robust/sparse) or "lambda.min"

# Optional stratification labels (e.g., disease). If NULL, stratify by y-quantiles.
strata <- NULL

# ----------------------------
# Utilities
# ----------------------------

# Build stratified folds for outer CV
make_outer_folds <- function(y, K=10, repeats=1, strata=NULL) {
  if (!is.null(strata)) {
    if (!is.factor(strata)) strata <- factor(strata)
    replicate(repeats, createFolds(strata, k=K, list=TRUE, returnTrain=FALSE), simplify=FALSE)
  } else {
    # Stratify by y quantiles to stabilize distribution across folds
    qs <- quantile(y, probs = seq(0, 1, length.out = min(11, max(3, floor(length(y)/10)))), na.rm = TRUE)
    y_bucket <- cut(y, unique(qs), include.lowest = TRUE, dig.lab = 8)
    replicate(repeats, createFolds(y_bucket, k=K, list=TRUE, returnTrain=FALSE), simplify=FALSE)
  }
}

# Clean training chunk inside a fold: remove non-finite rows, remove zero-variance columns,
# and ensure y has variance.
clean_train <- function(X_tr, y_tr) {
  # 1) drop rows with any non-finite; keep y finite
  row_ok <- is.finite(y_tr) & apply(X_tr, 1, function(r) all(is.finite(r)))
  X_tr <- X_tr[row_ok, , drop = FALSE]
  y_tr <- y_tr[row_ok]

  # guard: need >= 2 rows
  if (nrow(X_tr) < 2L) return(list(ok=FALSE, reason="too few rows after row filter"))

  # 2) drop columns that are all NA/Inf or zero-variance (compute sd safely)
  #    sd(...)=NA when column is all NA → treat as FALSE (drop)
  sds <- apply(X_tr, 2, function(v) sd(v, na.rm = TRUE))
  nzv <- (sds > 0)
  nzv[is.na(nzv)] <- FALSE   # <— columns with all NA → drop
  if (!any(nzv, na.rm = TRUE))
    return(list(ok=FALSE, reason="no informative predictors (all zero-variance/NA)"))

  X_tr <- X_tr[, nzv, drop = FALSE]

  # 3) y must have variance (at least 2 unique values)
  if (length(unique(y_tr)) < 2 || !is.finite(sd(y_tr))) {
    return(list(ok=FALSE, reason="y constant or invalid after filtering"))
  }

  list(ok=TRUE, X_tr=X_tr, y_tr=y_tr, kept_cols=colnames(X_tr))
}

# Inner CV: pick best (alpha, lambda) using only the outer-train data
tune_inner <- function(X_tr_raw, y_tr_raw, alphas, K_inner=10,
                       use_lambda=c("lambda.1se","lambda.min")) {
  use_lambda <- match.arg(use_lambda)

  cln <- clean_train(X_tr_raw, y_tr_raw)
  if (!cln$ok) return(list(ok=FALSE, reason=cln$reason))
  X_tr <- cln$X_tr; y_tr <- cln$y_tr

  inner_list <- lapply(alphas, function(a) {
    set.seed(123)  # deterministic inner CV
    cv_in <- tryCatch(
      cv.glmnet(X_tr, y_tr, family="gaussian",
                alpha=a, nfolds=K_inner, standardize=TRUE),
      error = function(e) e
    )
    if (inherits(cv_in, "error")) {
      return(list(alpha=a, cvfit=NULL, lambda=NA_real_, cv_error=Inf))
    }
    lam <- if (use_lambda == "lambda.1se") cv_in$lambda.1se else cv_in$lambda.min
    # Representative CV error to compare across alphas
    cv_err <- min(cv_in$cvm[cv_in$index])
    list(alpha=a, cvfit=cv_in, lambda=lam, cv_error=cv_err)
  })

  best_idx <- which.min(sapply(inner_list, function(z) z$cv_error))
  best <- inner_list[[best_idx]]

  if (!is.null(best$cvfit)) {
    c(best, ok=TRUE, kept_cols=colnames(X_tr))
  } else {
    list(ok=FALSE, reason="inner CV failed for all alphas")
  }
}

# Force newx to match EXACT columns the model expects
align_to_model <- function(X_te, cvfit, s) {
  model_cols <- rownames(coef(cvfit, s = s))[-1]  # drop "(Intercept)"
  # add missing columns as zeros
  miss <- setdiff(model_cols, colnames(X_te))
  if (length(miss)) {
    X_te <- cbind(
      X_te,
      matrix(0, nrow(X_te), length(miss),
             dimnames = list(rownames(X_te), miss))
    )
  }
  # drop extras and reorder to model order
  X_te <- X_te[, model_cols, drop = FALSE]
  X_te
}


# ----------------------------
# Outer CV (repeated)
# ----------------------------
set.seed(42)
outer_folds_repeated <- make_outer_folds(y, K=K_outer, repeats=R_repeats, strata=strata)

perf_list  <- list()
hyper_list <- list()
ctr <- 1

for (rep_i in seq_len(R_repeats)) {
  folds_rep <- outer_folds_repeated[[rep_i]]
  for (k in seq_len(K_outer)) {
    te_idx <- folds_rep[[k]]
    tr_idx <- setdiff(seq_len(nrow(X)), te_idx)

    X_tr_raw <- X[tr_idx, , drop=FALSE]
    y_tr_raw <- y[tr_idx]
    X_te_raw <- X[te_idx, , drop=FALSE]
    y_te_raw <- y[te_idx]

    # Inner CV to choose (alpha, lambda) on training only
    best <- tune_inner(X_tr_raw, y_tr_raw, alphas=alphas,
                       K_inner=K_inner, use_lambda=use_lambda)
    if (!isTRUE(best$ok)) {
      message(sprintf("[outer rep %d fold %d] skipped: %s", rep_i, k, best$reason))
      next
    }
    a_star    <- best$alpha
    lam_star  <- best$lambda
    cv_star   <- best$cvfit
    kept_cols <- best$kept_cols

    # Align test columns to training columns
　　X_te <- align_to_model(X_te_raw, cv_star, lam_star)
　　pred_te <- as.numeric(predict(cv_star, newx = X_te, s = lam_star))
    y_te <- y_te_raw

    # Keep finite pairs only
    keep <- is.finite(pred_te) & is.finite(y_te)
    if (!any(keep)) {
      message(sprintf("[outer rep %d fold %d] no finite pairs; skipping", rep_i, k))
      next
    }
    pred_te <- pred_te[keep]
    y_te    <- y_te[keep]

    # Metrics on outer test
    spearman <- suppressWarnings(cor(pred_te, y_te, method="spearman"))
    pearson  <- suppressWarnings(cor(pred_te, y_te, method="pearson"))
    rmse_v   <- rmse(y_te, pred_te)
    mae_v    <- mae (y_te, pred_te)

    # Store performance (use data.frame to avoid name issues)
    perf_list[[ctr]] <- data.frame(
      rep_id = rep_i, fold = k,
      alpha = a_star, lambda = lam_star,
      spearman = spearman, pearson = pearson,
      rmse = rmse_v, mae = mae_v
    )

    # Store selected complexity (non-zero coeff count)
    cf  <- coef(cv_star, s = lam_star)
    nnz <- sum(as.numeric(cf) != 0) - 1  # exclude intercept
    hyper_list[[ctr]] <- data.frame(
      rep_id = rep_i, fold = k,
      alpha = a_star, lambda = lam_star, n_nonzero = nnz
    )

    ctr <- ctr + 1
  }
}

perf_df  <- dplyr::bind_rows(perf_list)
hyper_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(hyper_list)

# ----------------------------
# Summary: mean ± SD and 95% CI across all outer evaluations
# ----------------------------
n_eval <- nrow(perf_df)
tcrit  <- qt(0.975, df = n_eval - 1)

summarize_metric <- function(v) {
  v <- v[is.finite(v)]
  m  <- mean(v)
  sdv<- sd(v)
  se <- sdv / sqrt(length(v))
  ci_low  <- m - tcrit * se
  ci_high <- m + tcrit * se
  c(mean=m, sd=sdv, ci95_low=ci_low, ci95_high=ci_high, n=length(v))
}

summary_table <- rbind(
  spearman = summarize_metric(perf_df$spearman),
  pearson  = summarize_metric(perf_df$pearson),
  rmse     = summarize_metric(perf_df$rmse),
  mae      = summarize_metric(perf_df$mae)
)
print(round(summary_table, 3))

# (Optional) alpha preference if you searched multiple alphas
if (length(alphas) > 1) {
  alpha_pref <- perf_df %>%
    group_by(alpha) %>%
    summarise(count = n(),
              spearman_mean = mean(spearman, na.rm=TRUE),
              rmse_mean     = mean(rmse, na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
    arrange(desc(count))
  print(alpha_pref)
}

# Aggregate lambda across outer folds (e.g., median)
lambda_star <- median(perf_df$lambda, na.rm=TRUE)
alpha_star  <- if (length(alphas) > 1) {
  perf_df %>%
    group_by(alpha) %>%
    summarise(spearman_mean = mean(spearman, na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
    arrange(desc(spearman_mean)) %>%
    slice(1) %>% pull(alpha)
} else {
  alphas
}

cat(sprintf("\nChosen hyper-parameters for final model:\n  alpha* = %.3f, lambda* (median of selected) = %.6f\n",
            alpha_star, lambda_star))

# ----------------------------
# Final model on ALL data (with alpha*, lambda*)
# ----------------------------
set.seed(123)
cv_all <- cv.glmnet(X, y, family="gaussian", alpha=alpha_star,
                    nfolds=K_inner, standardize=TRUE)

# Use aggregated lambda_star if it exists on the fitted path; otherwise fallback
lam_path <- cv_all$lambda
lam_use  <- lam_path[which.min(abs(lam_path - lambda_star))]
if (length(lam_use) == 0 || is.na(lam_use)) {
  lam_use <- if (use_lambda == "lambda.1se") cv_all$lambda.1se else cv_all$lambda.min
}

final_coef <- coef(cv_all, s = lam_use)

# Report final non-zero features
final_genes <- setdiff(rownames(final_coef)[as.numeric(final_coef) != 0], "(Intercept)")
cat(sprintf("Final model non-zero features: %d\n", length(final_genes)))
print(head(final_genes, 20))

final_coef_table <- data.frame(
  gene = rownames(final_coef),
  coef = as.numeric(final_coef)
) %>%
  filter(gene != "(Intercept)", coef != 0) %>%
  arrange(desc(abs(coef)))

# Save outputs if needed
write.csv(perf_df,          "nestedcv_outer_perf.csv", row.names=FALSE)
write.csv(hyper_df,         "nestedcv_selected_hyperparams.csv", row.names=FALSE)
write.csv(final_coef_table, "PanPTCL_Epigenetic_monitoring.model_coefficients.csv",   row.names=FALSE)

## --- 1) 係数一式を取得（既に作っている cv_all / lam_use を使用） ---
cf <- coef(cv_all, s = lam_use)

# 切片と非ゼロ係数だけ抽出
b0 <- as.numeric(cf[1, 1])                     # intercept
beta <- as.numeric(cf[-1, 1])
genes <- rownames(cf)[-1]
keep  <- beta != 0
beta  <- beta[keep]
genes <- genes[keep]

# 係数表（CSVで保存も）
coef_table <- data.frame(gene = genes, coef = beta) |>
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(abs(coef)))
write.csv(coef_table, "lasso_coefficients.csv", row.names = FALSE)

cat(sprintf("Non-zero features: %d\n", nrow(coef_table)))
print(head(coef_table, 15))

## --- 2) Export formula
term_str <- paste(sprintf("(%0.6g) * `%s`", coef_table$coef, coef_table$gene),
                  collapse = " + ")
formula_str <- sprintf("TF_hat = %0.6f + %s", b0, term_str)

# save to the txt file
cat(substr(formula_str, 1, 500), " ...\n")  # 長いので先頭だけ出す
writeLines(formula_str, "lasso_formula.txt")

predict_lasso_linear <- function(newdata) {
  miss <- setdiff(genes, colnames(newdata))
  if (length(miss)) {
    newdata[, miss] <- 0
  }
  X_use <- as.matrix(newdata[, genes, drop = FALSE])
  as.numeric(b0 + X_use %*% beta)
}

```

#Make report of Lasso/ElasticNet model generation
```{r}
stopifnot(exists("perf_df"), exists("hyper_df"))

s1_detail <- perf_df %>%
  left_join(hyper_df, by = c("rep_id","fold","alpha","lambda")) %>%
  mutate(
    lambda = signif(lambda, 6),
    spearman = round(spearman, 3),
    pearson  = round(pearson, 3),
    rmse     = round(rmse, 3),
    mae      = round(mae, 3)
  ) %>%
  arrange(rep_id, fold)

# 2) mean±SD and 95%CI
summarize_metric <- function(v) {
  v <- v[is.finite(v)]
  n  <- length(v)
  m  <- mean(v); sdv <- sd(v); se <- sdv / sqrt(n)
  tcrit <- qt(0.975, df = max(1, n - 1))
  data.frame(
    mean = round(m, 3),
    sd   = round(sdv, 3),
    ci95_low  = round(m - tcrit * se, 3),
    ci95_high = round(m + tcrit * se, 3),
    n = n
  )
}

s1_summary_perf <- bind_rows(
  data.frame(metric="Spearman", summarize_metric(perf_df$spearman)),
  data.frame(metric="Pearson",  summarize_metric(perf_df$pearson)),
  data.frame(metric="RMSE",     summarize_metric(perf_df$rmse)),
  data.frame(metric="MAE",      summarize_metric(perf_df$mae))
)

# 3)summarize
s1_summary_model <- hyper_df %>%
  transmute(lambda = lambda, n_nonzero = n_nonzero) %>%
  summarize(
    n = n(),
    lambda_median = signif(median(lambda, na.rm=TRUE), 6),
    lambda_iqr_lo = signif(quantile(lambda, 0.25, na.rm=TRUE), 6),
    lambda_iqr_hi = signif(quantile(lambda, 0.75, na.rm=TRUE), 6),
    n_nonzero_mean = round(mean(n_nonzero, na.rm=TRUE), 2),
    n_nonzero_sd   = round(sd(n_nonzero, na.rm=TRUE), 2)
  )

# 4)output
write_csv(s1_detail, "PanPTCLmodel_nestedCV_performance_detail.csv")
write_csv(s1_summary_perf, "PanPTCLmodelperformance_summary.csv")
write_csv(s1_summary_model, "PanPTCLmodel_model_hyperparam_summary.csv")

# ===== Final PanPTCL epigenetic model coefficients (non-zero only) =====
stopifnot(exists("final_coef_table"))

s2 <- final_coef_table %>%
  mutate(abs_coef = abs(coef)) %>%
  arrange(desc(abs_coef)) %>%
  mutate(rank_by_abs_coef = row_number()) %>%
  dplyr::select(rank_by_abs_coef, gene, coef, abs_coef)

write_csv(s2, "Supp_Table_PanPTCLmodel_final_model_coefficients.csv")

cat("\n--- Suggested captions ---\n")
cat("PanPTCL model. Nested CV outer-fold performance (Spearman, Pearson, RMSE, MAE) with selected alpha, lambda, and number of non-zero coefficients for each fold; summary rows provide mean ± SD and 95% CI across all outer evaluations.\n")
cat("PanPTCL model. Final elastic-net model non-zero coefficients learned on the full dataset (standardized features), sorted by absolute coefficient magnitude.\n")
```

#EOT performance of Pan-PTCL Model #Not shown in Figures
```{r}
# ==== packages ====
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)

# ==== helper: match newx to model columns ====
align_to_model <- function(X_te, cvfit, s) {
  model_cols <- rownames(coef(cvfit, s = s))[-1]  # drop "(Intercept)"
  # add missing columns as zeros
  miss <- setdiff(model_cols, colnames(X_te))
  if (length(miss)) {
    X_te <- cbind(
      X_te,
      matrix(0, nrow(X_te), length(miss),
             dimnames = list(rownames(X_te), miss))
    )
  }
  # drop extras and reorder
  X_te <- X_te[, model_cols, drop = FALSE]
  X_te
}

# ==== 1)
gene_cols <- colnames(CTRDiseaseEPICTCLv5_all_join)[1:381]
rownames(CTRDiseaseEPICTCLv5_all_join) <- CTRDiseaseEPICTCLv5_all_join$SampleID

gmat_all <- as.data.frame(CTRDiseaseEPICTCLv5_all_join[, gene_cols, drop = FALSE])
gmat_all[] <- lapply(gmat_all, function(z) if (is.numeric(z)) z else suppressWarnings(as.numeric(z)))

if (is.null(rownames(gmat_all)) && "SampleID" %in% colnames(CTRDiseaseEPICTCLv5_all_join)) {
  rownames(gmat_all) <- CTRDiseaseEPICTCLv5_all_join$SampleID
}

col_med <- apply(gmat_all, 2, function(v) median(v[is.finite(v)], na.rm = TRUE))
for (j in seq_len(ncol(gmat_all))) {
  bad <- !is.finite(gmat_all[[j]])
  if (any(bad)) gmat_all[bad, j] <- col_med[j]
}

row_ok <- apply(gmat_all, 1, function(r) all(is.finite(r)))
gmat_all <- gmat_all[row_ok, , drop = FALSE]

meta_all <- CTRDiseaseEPICTCLv5_all_join[row_ok, , drop = FALSE]

# ==== 2)
X_plot <- as.matrix(gmat_all)
X_plot <- align_to_model(X_plot, cv_all, lam_use)

score_all <- as.numeric(predict(cv_all, newx = X_plot, s = lam_use))
score_df <- tibble(
  SampleID    = rownames(X_plot),
  LASSO_Score = as.numeric(score_all)
)
meta_clean <- meta_all %>%
  filter(Disease != "Others") %>%
  mutate(
    Disease = ifelse(Disease %in% c("ATLLacutetype","ATLLlymphoma"), "ATLL", Disease),
    SampleID = dplyr::coalesce(SampleID, rownames(.))
  )
known_lv <- intersect(names(disease2_colors), unique(meta_clean$Disease))
disease_levels <- c("ATLL","TFH","PTCLNOS","ALKnegALCL","ALKposALCL","ENKTL","MEITL","SS","PCGDTCL","Healthy")

# Calculation of LOB
score_df_CTR <- score_df %>% 
  filter(grepl("CTR",SampleID))

MOB_LassoEPIC <- mean(score_df_CTR$LASSO_Score)
SdOB_LassoEPIC <- sd(score_df_CTR$LASSO_Score)
LOB_LassoEPIC <- MOB_LassoEPIC + 1.3*SdOB_LassoEPIC

# ==== 3) data frame for plot ====
plot_df <- score_df %>%
  left_join(meta_clean, by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(!Disease %in% c("PCGDTCL","Healthy")) %>% 
  mutate(
    Disease = ifelse(grepl("CTR",SampleID),"Healthy",Disease),
    Combined_AF = ifelse(grepl("CTR",SampleID),0,Combined_AF)) %>%
  transmute(
    SampleID,
    Disease = factor(Disease, levels = disease_levels),
    AF = Combined_AF,
    LASSO_Score
  ) %>%
  filter(is.finite(AF), 
         is.finite(LASSO_Score),
         !is.na(Disease))
  

# Plot
p_cor_EPICLASSO <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(y = LASSO_Score, x = AF)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = Disease), size = 1.2, alpha = 0.75, stroke = 0, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.4, color = "black") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = LOB_LassoEPIC, linetype = "dashed", color = "red", linewidth = 0.4) +
  facet_wrap(~ Disease, scales = "free", ncol = 4) +
  stat_cor()+
  scale_color_manual(values = disease2_colors, na.value = "grey80") +
  ylim(0,15)+
  xlim(0,40)+
  labs(
    title = "Association between LASSO-derived Score and AF by Disease",
    y = "LASSO-derived score",
    x = "Allele Frequency (AF)"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 8) +
  theme(
    plot.title      = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    strip.background= element_rect(fill = "grey90", color = NA),
    strip.text      = element_text(size = 8, face = "bold"),
    panel.grid      = element_blank(),
    axis.title      = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text       = element_text(size = 7),
    plot.margin     = margin(2, 2, 2, 2, "mm")
  )
# 表示
print(p_cor_EPICLASSO)

#save
ggsave("00PanPTCL_Epigeneticmodel_LASSOscore_vs_AF_byDisease.pdf", p_cor_EPICLASSO,
       width = 150, height = 120, units = "mm", dpi = 600, useDingbats = FALSE)

CTRDiseaseEPICTCLv5_all_join_lasso <- CTRDiseaseEPICTCLv5_all_join %>%
  left_join(score_df, by = "SampleID")
CTRDiseaseEPICTCLv5_all_join_lasso <- CTRDiseaseEPICTCLv5_all_join_lasso %>%
  mutate(EPICpos = ifelse(LASSO_Score > LOB_LassoEPIC,"Positive","Negative"))

CTRDiseaseEPICTCLv5_all_join_select <- CTRDiseaseEPICTCLv5_all_join_lasso %>% 
  dplyr::select(SampleID,LASSO_Score,EPICpos)

Clininfo_AF_combined_EPIC <- Clininfo_AF_combined %>% 
  left_join(CTRDiseaseEPICTCLv5_all_join_select, by = c("Sample3"="SampleID"))

fit_EPIC_lasso <- survfit(Surv(Days_EFS, EFS) ~ EPICpos, data = Clininfo_AF_combined_EPIC)

cox_model_EPIC_lasso <- coxph(
  Surv(time = Clininfo_AF_combined_EPIC$Days_EFS, 
       event = Clininfo_AF_combined_EPIC$EFS) ~ EPICpos,
  data = Clininfo_AF_combined_EPIC
)

check_df <- Clininfo_AF_combined_EPIC %>% 
  dplyr::select(PatientID,EPICpos,Days_EFS,EFS)

  fit_EPIC_lasso,
  data = Clininfo_AF_combined_EPIC,
  palette = c("#5B9BD5","#FFA500"),

  conf.int = FALSE,

  font.risk.table = c(10, "plain"),
  #legend = "right",
  legend = "top",
  #legend = "none",
  risk.table.legend = FALSE
)

PlotEPIClassoSurv$plot <- PlotEPIClassoSurv$plot + labs(title = "TCL score by Lasso at EOT") 
PlotEPIClassoSurv$table <- PlotEPIClassoSurv$table + 
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        axis.line.y = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank())

cutoff_lasso <- maxstat.test(Surv(Days_EFS, EFS) ~ LASSO_Score, data=Clininfo_AF_combined_EPIC,smethod="LogRank",
pmethod="Lau94", alpha=0.05)

cutoff_lassovalue <- cutoff_lasso$estimate[1]
plot(cutoff_lasso)
Clininfo_AF_combined_EPIC <- Clininfo_AF_combined_EPIC %>% 
  mutate(LassoScoreHiLo=ifelse(LASSO_Score > cutoff_lassovalue,1,0))
surv_obj_lasso <- Surv(time = Clininfo_AF_combined_EPIC$Days_EFS, 
                         event = Clininfo_AF_combined_EPIC$EFS)

cox_model_lassoEPIC <- coxph(
  Surv(time =Clininfo_AF_combined_EPIC$Days_EFS, 
       event = Clininfo_AF_combined_EPIC$EFS) ~ LASSO_Score,
  data = Clininfo_AF_combined_EPIC)

PlotEPIClassoSurv2 <- ggsurvplot(
  fit_lassoEPIC2,

  risk.table.y.text = FALSE,
  ggtheme = theme_bw(base_size = 10),

  risk.table.col = "strata",
  pval.size = 3,
  fontsize = 2.5,

)

PlotEPIClassoSurv2$plot <- PlotEPIClassoSurv2$plot +
  guides(
    color = guide_legend(nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE),

pdf("00PanPTCL_ElasticNet_epigeneticmodel_EOT.pdf", width=7, height=7)
print(PlotEPIClassoSurv2)
dev.off()

```

#Make Subtype-specific Lasso/ElasticNet model
```{r}
subset_list <- list(
  ALCL   = c("ALKposALCL", "ALKnegALCL"),
  PTCLNOS = "PTCLNOS",
  TFH     = "TFH"
)

results_list <- list()
run_lasso_for_subset <- function(sub_name, disease_vec) {
  
  cat("\n============================\n")
  cat("Running LASSO for:", sub_name, "(", paste(disease_vec, collapse=", "), ")\n")
  cat("============================\n")
  
  # --- 0) subset & sample drop ---------------------------------
  val_all <- CTRDiseaseEPICTCLv5_all_join %>%
    filter(
      !SampleID %in% unique(Sample3),
      #!str_detect(coalesce(SampleID, ""), "TCL6"),
      !str_detect(coalesce(SampleID, ""), "CTR"),
      Disease %in% disease_vec)
  
  drop_ids <- c("TSTCL107-C1", "TSTCL117-P2", "TSTCL080-C1")
  val_all2 <- val_all %>% filter(!SampleID %in% drop_ids)
  
  # --- 1) gene block (numeric) ---------------------------------
  gene_cols <- colnames(val_all2)[1:381]
  gene_cols2 <- setdiff(gene_cols,c(Negativegenes,HKgenes))
  gmat <- as.data.frame(val_all2[, gene_cols2, drop = FALSE])
  gmat[] <- lapply(gmat, function(z) if (is.numeric(z)) z else suppressWarnings(as.numeric(z)))
  
  # --- 2) drop columns that are all non-finite -----------------
  all_bad <- sapply(gmat, function(v) sum(is.finite(v)) == 0)
  gmat <- gmat[, !all_bad, drop = FALSE]
  
  # --- 3) drop zero-variance columns among finite values -------
  has_var <- sapply(gmat, function(v) {
    fv <- v[is.finite(v)]
    length(fv) >= 2 && sd(fv) > 0
  })
  gmat <- gmat[, has_var, drop = FALSE]
  
  kept_gene_cols <- colnames(gmat)
  
  cat("Removed all-NA/Inf genes:", sum(all_bad), "\n")
  cat("Removed zero-variance genes:", sum(!has_var), "\n")
  cat("Kept genes:", ncol(gmat), "\n")
  
  # --- 4A)
  row_ok <- apply(gmat, 1, function(r) all(is.finite(r)))
  X <- as.matrix(gmat[row_ok, , drop = FALSE])
  y <- val_all2$Combined_AF[row_ok]
  
  meta <- val_all2[row_ok, setdiff(colnames(val_all2), gene_cols), drop = FALSE]
  
  cat("Dropped rows (any NA/Inf in genes):", sum(!row_ok), "\n")
  cat("Remaining samples:", nrow(X), "\n")
  
  stopifnot(nrow(X) == length(y))
  X <- as.matrix(X)
  
  # ----------------------------
  # Settings
  # ----------------------------
  K_outer    <- 5
  R_repeats  <- 10
  K_inner    <- 5
  alphas     <- c(0.2, 0.5, 0.8)
  use_lambda <- "lambda.1se"
  strata     <- NULL
  
  # ----------------------------
  # Outer CV (repeated)
  # ----------------------------
  set.seed(42)
  outer_folds_repeated <- make_outer_folds(y, K=K_outer, repeats=R_repeats, strata=strata)
  
  perf_list  <- list()
  hyper_list <- list()
  ctr <- 1
  
  for (rep_i in seq_len(R_repeats)) {
    folds_rep <- outer_folds_repeated[[rep_i]]
    for (k in seq_len(K_outer)) {
      te_idx <- folds_rep[[k]]
      tr_idx <- setdiff(seq_len(nrow(X)), te_idx)
      
      X_tr_raw <- X[tr_idx, , drop=FALSE]
      y_tr_raw <- y[tr_idx]
      X_te_raw <- X[te_idx, , drop=FALSE]
      y_te_raw <- y[te_idx]
      
      best <- tune_inner(X_tr_raw, y_tr_raw, alphas=alphas,
                         K_inner=K_inner, use_lambda=use_lambda)
      if (!isTRUE(best$ok)) {
        message(sprintf("[outer rep %d fold %d] skipped: %s", rep_i, k, best$reason))
        next
      }
      a_star    <- best$alpha
      lam_star  <- best$lambda
      cv_star   <- best$cvfit
      kept_cols <- best$kept_cols
      
      X_te <- align_to_model(X_te_raw, cv_star, lam_star)
      pred_te <- as.numeric(predict(cv_star, newx = X_te, s = lam_star))
      y_te <- y_te_raw
      
      keep <- is.finite(pred_te) & is.finite(y_te)
      if (!any(keep)) {
        message(sprintf("[outer rep %d fold %d] no finite pairs; skipping", rep_i, k))
        next
      }
      pred_te <- pred_te[keep]
      y_te    <- y_te[keep]
      
      spearman <- suppressWarnings(cor(pred_te, y_te, method="spearman"))
      pearson  <- suppressWarnings(cor(pred_te, y_te, method="pearson"))
      rmse_v   <- rmse(y_te, pred_te)
      mae_v    <- mae (y_te, pred_te)
      
      perf_list[[ctr]] <- data.frame(
        rep_id = rep_i, fold = k,
        alpha = a_star, lambda = lam_star,
        spearman = spearman, pearson = pearson,
        rmse = rmse_v, mae = mae_v
      )
      
      cf  <- coef(cv_star, s = lam_star)
      nnz <- sum(as.numeric(cf) != 0) - 1
      hyper_list[[ctr]] <- data.frame(
        rep_id = rep_i, fold = k,
        alpha = a_star, lambda = lam_star, n_nonzero = nnz
      )
      
      ctr <- ctr + 1
    }
  }
  
  perf_df  <- dplyr::bind_rows(perf_list)
  hyper_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(hyper_list)
  
  # ---- Summary table ----
  n_eval <- nrow(perf_df)
  tcrit  <- qt(0.975, df = n_eval - 1)
  
  summarize_metric <- function(v) {
    v <- v[is.finite(v)]
    m  <- mean(v)
    sdv<- sd(v)
    se <- sdv / sqrt(length(v))
    ci_low  <- m - tcrit * se
    ci_high <- m + tcrit * se
    c(mean=m, sd=sdv, ci95_low=ci_low, ci95_high=ci_high, n=length(v))
  }
  
  summary_table <- rbind(
    spearman = summarize_metric(perf_df$spearman),
    pearson  = summarize_metric(perf_df$pearson),
    rmse     = summarize_metric(perf_df$rmse),
    mae      = summarize_metric(perf_df$mae)
  )
  print(round(summary_table, 3))
  
  lambda_star <- median(perf_df$lambda, na.rm=TRUE)
  alpha_star  <- if (length(alphas) > 1) {
    perf_df %>%
      group_by(alpha) %>%
      summarise(spearman_mean = mean(spearman, na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
      arrange(desc(spearman_mean)) %>%
      slice(1) %>% pull(alpha)
  } else {
    alphas
  }
  
  cat(sprintf("\n[%s] alpha* = %.3f, lambda* (median) = %.6f\n",
              sub_name, alpha_star, lambda_star))
  
  # ----------------------------
  # Final model on ALL data
  # ----------------------------
  set.seed(123)
  cv_all <- cv.glmnet(X, y, family = "gaussian", alpha = alpha_star,
                      nfolds = K_inner, standardize = TRUE)
  
  lam_path <- cv_all$lambda
  lam_use  <- lam_path[which.min(abs(lam_path - lambda_star))]
  if (length(lam_use) == 0 || is.na(lam_use)) {
    lam_use <- if (use_lambda == "lambda.1se") cv_all$lambda.1se else cv_all$lambda.min
  }
  
  final_coef <- coef(cv_all, s = lam_use)
  
  # ----fallback----
  nz <- sum(as.numeric(final_coef) != 0) - 1
  if (nz <= 1) {
    message(sprintf(
      "[%s] only %d non-zero features at lam_use=%.4g; fallback to lambda.min",
      sub_name, nz, lam_use
    ))
    lam_use <- cv_all$lambda.min
    final_coef <- coef(cv_all, s = lam_use)
    nz <- sum(as.numeric(final_coef) != 0) - 1
  }
  
  final_genes <- setdiff(rownames(final_coef)[as.numeric(final_coef) != 0], "(Intercept)")
  cat(sprintf("[%s] Final model non-zero features: %d\n", sub_name, length(final_genes)))
  print(head(final_genes, 20))
  
  final_coef_table <- data.frame(
    gene = rownames(final_coef),
    coef = as.numeric(final_coef)
  ) %>%
    dplyr::filter(gene != "(Intercept)", coef != 0) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(abs(coef)))
  
  stopifnot(exists("perf_df"), exists("hyper_df"))
  
  s1_detail <- perf_df %>%
    left_join(hyper_df, by = c("rep_id","fold","alpha","lambda")) %>%
    mutate(
      lambda  = signif(lambda, 6),
      spearman= round(spearman, 3),
      pearson = round(pearson, 3),
      rmse    = round(rmse, 3),
      mae     = round(mae, 3)
    ) %>%
    arrange(rep_id, fold)
  
  summarize_metric2 <- function(v) {
    v <- v[is.finite(v)]
    n  <- length(v)
    m  <- mean(v); sdv <- sd(v); se <- sdv / sqrt(n)
    tcrit <- qt(0.975, df = max(1, n - 1))
    data.frame(
      mean = round(m, 3),
      sd   = round(sdv, 3),
      ci95_low  = round(m - tcrit * se, 3),
      ci95_high = round(m + tcrit * se, 3),
      n = n
    )
  }
  
  s1_summary_perf <- bind_rows(
    data.frame(metric="Spearman", summarize_metric2(perf_df$spearman)),
    data.frame(metric="Pearson",  summarize_metric2(perf_df$pearson)),
    data.frame(metric="RMSE",     summarize_metric2(perf_df$rmse)),
    data.frame(metric="MAE",      summarize_metric2(perf_df$mae))
  )
  
  # 3)
  s1_summary_model <- hyper_df %>%
    transmute(lambda = lambda, n_nonzero = n_nonzero) %>%
    summarize(
      n = n(),
      lambda_median = signif(median(lambda, na.rm=TRUE), 6),
      lambda_iqr_lo = signif(quantile(lambda, 0.25, na.rm=TRUE), 6),
      lambda_iqr_hi = signif(quantile(lambda, 0.75, na.rm=TRUE), 6),
      n_nonzero_mean = round(mean(n_nonzero, na.rm=TRUE), 2),
      n_nonzero_sd   = round(sd(n_nonzero, na.rm=TRUE), 2)
    )
  
  # ★ サブタイプ名をファイル名に付ける
  write_csv(s1_detail,       paste0("Supp_Table_S19_", sub_name, "_Epigenetic_model_nestedCV_detail.csv"))
  write_csv(s1_summary_perf, paste0("Supp_Table_S19_", sub_name, "_Epigenetic_model_perf_summary.csv"))
  write_csv(s1_summary_model,paste0("Supp_Table_S19_", sub_name, "_Epigenetic_model_summary.csv"))
  
  # ===== S2: final model coefficients =====
  s2 <- final_coef_table %>%
    mutate(abs_coef = abs(coef)) %>%
    arrange(desc(abs_coef)) %>%
    mutate(rank_by_abs_coef = row_number()) %>%
    dplyr::select(rank_by_abs_coef, gene, coef, abs_coef)
  
  write_csv(s2, paste0("Supp_Table_S20_", sub_name, "_final_Epigenetic_model_coefficients.csv"))
  
  cf <- coef(cv_all, s = lam_use)
  b0 <- as.numeric(cf[1, 1])
  beta <- as.numeric(cf[-1, 1])
  genes <- rownames(cf)[-1]
  keep  <- beta != 0
  beta  <- beta[keep]
  genes <- genes[keep]
  
  coef_table <- data.frame(gene = genes, coef = beta) |>
    dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(abs(coef)))
  write.csv(coef_table, paste0("lasso_coefficients_", sub_name, ".csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  
  term_str <- paste(sprintf("(%0.6g) * `%s`", coef_table$coef, coef_table$gene),
                    collapse = " + ")
  formula_str <- sprintf("TF_hat = %0.6f + %s", b0, term_str)
  writeLines(formula_str, paste0("EN_formula_", sub_name, ".txt"))
  
  
  list(
    X = X,
    y = y,
    perf_df = perf_df,
    hyper_df = hyper_df,
    final_coef_table = final_coef_table,
    cv_all = cv_all,
    lam_use = lam_use
  )
}

for (nm in names(subset_list)) {
  log_file <- paste0("EN_log_", nm, ".txt")
  
  sink(log_file)
  cat("==== Start:", nm, "====\n")
  res <- run_lasso_for_subset(nm, subset_list[[nm]])
  results_list[[nm]] <- res
  cat("==== End:", nm, "====\n")
  sink()
}

gene_cols <- colnames(CTRDiseaseEPICTCLv5_all_join)[1:381]
rownames(CTRDiseaseEPICTCLv5_all_join) <- CTRDiseaseEPICTCLv5_all_join$SampleID
gmat_all <- as.data.frame(CTRDiseaseEPICTCLv5_all_join[, gene_cols, drop = FALSE])
gmat_all[] <- lapply(gmat_all, function(z) if (is.numeric(z)) z else suppressWarnings(as.numeric(z)))

row_ok <- apply(gmat_all, 1, function(r) all(is.finite(r)))
gmat_all <- gmat_all[row_ok, , drop = FALSE]

meta_all <- CTRDiseaseEPICTCLv5_all_join[row_ok, , drop = FALSE]
meta_clean <- meta_all %>%
  filter(Disease != "Others") %>%
  mutate(
    Disease = ifelse(Disease %in% c("ATLLacutetype","ATLLlymphoma"), "ATLL", Disease),
    SampleID = dplyr::coalesce(SampleID, rownames(.))
  )
known_lv <- intersect(names(disease2_colors), unique(meta_clean$Disease))
disease_levels <- c("ATLL","TFH","PTCLNOS","ALKnegALCL","ALKposALCL","ENKTL","MEITL","SS","PCGDTCL","Healthy")


X_valid <- as.matrix(gmat_all)

mod_ALCL   <- results_list$ALCL

score_PTCL <- as.numeric(predict(cvfit_PTCL, newx = Xv_PTCL, s = s_PTCL))

```

#Create subtype specific formula in Supplemental Material
```{r}
extract_lasso_formula <- function(res, digits_intercept = 3, digits_beta = 2) {
  cv_all  <- res$cv_all
  lam_use <- res$lam_use
  
  cf <- coef(cv_all, s = lam_use)
  cf_vec <- as.numeric(cf)
  names(cf_vec) <- rownames(cf)
  
  b0 <- cf_vec["(Intercept)"]
  beta <- cf_vec[names(cf_vec) != "(Intercept)"]
  beta <- beta[beta != 0]

  coef_table <- data.frame(
    gene = names(beta),
    coef = beta,
    abs_coef = abs(beta)
  ) %>% 
    arrange(desc(abs_coef))

  term_str <- paste0(
    sprintf("(%s)×%s",
            format(round(coef_table$coef, digits_beta), nsmall = digits_beta),
            coef_table$gene),
    collapse = " + "
  )
  
  formula_str <- sprintf(
    "(TF)^ = %s + %s",
    format(round(b0, digits_intercept), nsmall = digits_intercept),
    term_str
  )
  
  list(
    intercept = b0,
    coef_table = coef_table,
    formula_str = formula_str
  )
}

formulas_list <- lapply(results_list, extract_lasso_formula)

for (nm in names(formulas_list)) {
  cat("\n---", nm, "---\n")
  cat(formulas_list[[nm]]$formula_str, "\n")
}
```

#Calculation of LOB by Healthy, EOT positivity x PFS
```{r}

score_df_ALCL <- tibble(
  SampleID    = rownames(X_valid),
  LASSO_Score = as.numeric(score_ALCL)
)
score_df_TFH <- tibble(
  SampleID    = rownames(X_valid),
  LASSO_Score = as.numeric(score_TFH)
)
score_df_PTCL <- tibble(
  SampleID    = rownames(X_valid),
  LASSO_Score = as.numeric(score_PTCL)
)

Scale <- 1.645
OmitControl <- NULL
score_df_ALCL_CTR <- score_df_ALCL %>% 
  filter(grepl("CTR",SampleID))
score_df_TFH_CTR <- score_df_TFH %>% 
  filter(grepl("CTR",SampleID)) 
score_df_PTCL_CTR <- score_df_PTCL %>% 
  filter(grepl("CTR",SampleID))

MOB_LassoEPIC_ALCL <- mean(score_df_ALCL_CTR$LASSO_Score)
SdOB_LassoEPIC_ALCL <- sd(score_df_ALCL_CTR$LASSO_Score)
LOB_LassoEPIC_ALCL <- MOB_LassoEPIC_ALCL + Scale*SdOB_LassoEPIC_ALCL

MOB_LassoEPIC_TFH <- mean(score_df_TFH_CTR$LASSO_Score)
SdOB_LassoEPIC_TFH <- sd(score_df_TFH_CTR$LASSO_Score)
LOB_LassoEPIC_TFH <- MOB_LassoEPIC_TFH + Scale*SdOB_LassoEPIC_TFH

MOB_LassoEPIC_PTCL <- mean(score_df_PTCL_CTR$LASSO_Score)
SdOB_LassoEPIC_PTCL <- sd(score_df_PTCL_CTR$LASSO_Score)
LOB_LassoEPIC_PTCL <- MOB_LassoEPIC_PTCL + Scale*SdOB_LassoEPIC_PTCL


score_df_ALCL <- score_df_ALCL %>% 
  mutate(PositiveALCL = ifelse(LASSO_Score > LOB_LassoEPIC_ALCL,"Positive","Negative"),
         ZscoreALCL = (LASSO_Score - MOB_LassoEPIC_ALCL)/SdOB_LassoEPIC_ALCL)
colnames(score_df_ALCL) <- c("SampleID","ALCL_score","PositiveALCL","ZscoreALCL")
score_df_TFH <- score_df_TFH %>% 
  mutate(PositiveTFH = ifelse(LASSO_Score > LOB_LassoEPIC_TFH,"Positive","Negative"),
         ZscoreTFH = (LASSO_Score - MOB_LassoEPIC_TFH)/SdOB_LassoEPIC_TFH)
colnames(score_df_TFH) <- c("SampleID","TFH_score","PositiveTFH","ZscoreTFH")
score_df_PTCL <- score_df_PTCL %>% 
  mutate(PositivePTCL = ifelse(LASSO_Score > LOB_LassoEPIC_PTCL,"Positive","Negative"),
         ZscoreNOS = (LASSO_Score - MOB_LassoEPIC_PTCL)/SdOB_LassoEPIC_PTCL)
colnames(score_df_PTCL) <- c("SampleID","NOS_score","PositiveNOS","ZscoreNOS")

plot_df_cor <- score_df_TFH %>%
  left_join(score_df_ALCL, by = "SampleID") %>% 
  left_join(score_df_PTCL, by = "SampleID") %>%
  left_join(meta_all, by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(!Disease %in% c("PCGDTCL","Healthy")) %>% 
  mutate(
    Disease = ifelse(grepl("CTR",SampleID),"Healthy",Disease),
    Combined_AF = ifelse(grepl("CTR",SampleID),0,Combined_AF)) %>% 
  mutate(
    LASSO_STS_score = 
      ifelse(Disease == "TFH",ZscoreTFH,
             ifelse(Disease == "PTCLNOS",ZscoreNOS,
                    ifelse((Disease %in% c("ALKnegALCL","ALKposALCL")),ZscoreALCL,NA)))) %>% 
  filter(Disease %in% c("ALKposALCL","ALKnegALCL","TFH","PTCLNOS"))

write.csv(plot_df_cor, "TableS19.csv")


EPICScoreCor <- ggplot(plot_df_cor, aes(x=Combined_AF,LASSO_STS_score, color = Disease))+
  geom_point()+
  facet_wrap(~Disease, labeller = labeller(Disease = c(
    "ALKposALCL" = "ALK(+)ALCL",
    "ALKnegALCL" = "ALK(-)ALCL")))+
  stat_cor(
    aes(color = NULL),
    #color = "black",
    size  = 2.5  
  )+
　scale_color_manual(
  values = disease2_colors,
  labels = c(
    ALKposALCL = "ALK(+)ALCL",
    ALKnegALCL = "ALK(-)ALCL"
  ))+
  labs(
    title = "Subtype-specific Epigenetic Score vs. AF",
    y = "Epigenetic score",
    x = "Mean AF"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 8) +
  theme(
    plot.title      = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    strip.background= element_rect(fill = "grey90", color = NA),
    strip.text      = element_text(size = 8, face = "bold"),
    #panel.grid      = element_blank(),
    axis.title      = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text       = element_text(size = 7),
    plot.margin     = margin(2, 2, 2, 2, "mm")
  )

Fig6C <- EPICScoreCor

plot_df_combo <- score_df_TFH %>%
  left_join(score_df_ALCL, by = "SampleID") %>% 
  left_join(score_df_PTCL, by = "SampleID") %>%
  mutate(SampleID2 = SampleID) %>% 
  separate(SampleID2, c("PatientID","TypeTimepoint",sep="-")) %>% 
  left_join(Clininfo_AF_combined, by = "PatientID") %>%
  filter(!Disease %in% c("PCGDTCL","Healthy")) %>% 
  transmute(
    SampleID,
    Disease = factor(Disease, levels = disease_levels),
    ALCL_score,
    TFH_score,
    NOS_score,
    PositiveALCL,
    PositiveTFH,
    PositiveNOS,
    ZscoreALCL,
    ZscoreTFH,
    ZscoreNOS,
    Days_EFS,
    EFS
  ) %>%
  filter(
         is.finite(ALCL_score),
         is.finite(TFH_score),
         is.finite(NOS_score),
         !is.na(Disease)) %>% 
  mutate(
    LASSO_STS_positivity = 
      ifelse(Disease == "TFH",PositiveTFH,
             ifelse(Disease == "PTCLNOS",PositiveNOS,
                    ifelse((Disease %in% c("ALKnegALCL","ALKposALCL")),PositiveALCL,NA)))) %>% 
  mutate(
    LASSO_STS_score = 
      ifelse(Disease == "TFH",ZscoreTFH,
             ifelse(Disease == "PTCLNOS",ZscoreNOS,
                    ifelse((Disease %in% c("ALKnegALCL","ALKposALCL")),ZscoreALCL,NA))))  

plot_df_combo_EOT <- plot_df_combo %>% 
  filter(grepl("P3",SampleID))

surv_obj_ElasticNet <- Surv(time = plot_df_combo_EOT$Days_EFS, 
                         event = plot_df_combo_EOT$EFS)
fit_lassoElasticNet <- survfit(surv_obj_ElasticNet ~ LASSO_STS_positivity, data = plot_df_combo_EOT)

cox_model_lassoEPIC <- coxph(
  Surv(time = plot_df_combo_EOT$Days_EFS, 
       event = plot_df_combo_EOT$EFS) ~ LASSO_STS_score,
  data = plot_df_combo_EOT)

s_EPICEN <- summary(cox_model_lassoEPIC)
HR  <- s_EPICEN$coefficients["LASSO_STS_score", "exp(coef)"]
HR_low  <- s_EPICEN$conf.int["LASSO_STS_score", "lower .95"]
HR_high <- s_EPICEN$conf.int["LASSO_STS_score", "upper .95"]
pval <- s_EPICEN$coefficients["LASSO_STS_score", "Pr(>|z|)"]

resultEPICEN <- c(HR,HR_low,HR_high,pval)

cox_model_lassoEPICPOS <- coxph(
  Surv(time = plot_df_combo_EOT$Days_EFS, 
       event = plot_df_combo_EOT$EFS) ~ LASSO_STS_positivity,
  data = plot_df_combo_EOT)

s_EPICENPOS <- summary(cox_model_lassoEPICPOS)
HR  <- s_EPICENPOS$coefficients["LASSO_STS_positivityPositive", "exp(coef)"]
HR_low  <- s_EPICENPOS$conf.int["LASSO_STS_positivityPositive", "lower .95"]
HR_high <- s_EPICENPOS$conf.int["LASSO_STS_positivityPositive", "upper .95"]
pval <- s_EPICENPOS$coefficients["LASSO_STS_positivityPositive", "Pr(>|z|)"]
resultEPICENPOS <- c(HR,HR_low,HR_high,pval)

PlotEPIClassoSurv2 <- ggsurvplot(
  fit_lassoElasticNet,
  data = plot_df_combo_EOT,
  palette = c("#5B9BD5","#FFA500"),
  pval = TRUE,
  conf.int = FALSE,
  risk.table = TRUE,
  #legend.labs = names(cluster_colors),
  xlab = "Time (years)",
  ylab = "PFS (%)", fun = function(y) y * 100,
  xscale = "d_y",
  break.time.by = 365,
  xlim = c(0, 5 * 365),
  risk.table.y.text = FALSE,
  ggtheme = theme_bw(base_size = 10),
  tables.theme = theme_classic(base_size = 8),
  tables.col = "black",
  risk.table.col = "strata",
  pval.size = 3,
  fontsize = 2.5,
  font.risk.table = c(10, "plain"),
  #legend = "right",
  legend = "top",
  #legend = "none",
  risk.table.legend = FALSE
)

PlotEPIClassoSurv2$plot <- PlotEPIClassoSurv2$plot +
  labs(title = "Positivity of Epigenetic Score at EOT") +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.box = "vertical",
    legend.key.height = unit(0.3, "lines"),
    legend.spacing.y  = unit(0.1, "lines"),
    legend.text       = element_text(lineheight = 0.9, size = 8),
    legend.title       = element_text(size = 8),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 10, hjust = 0.5)
  )

PlotEPIClassoSurv2$table <- PlotEPIClassoSurv2$table + 
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        plot.title = element_text(size = 8),
        axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        axis.line.y = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank())

graphics.off()
pdf("00Fig6D.pdf", width=7, height=7)
print(PlotEPIClassoSurv2)
dev.off()

Fig6D <- PlotEPIClassoSurv2
```

#Validation of scoring systems from Amador et al, JCO 2022 (Nebraska genesets) by RNAseq data from Huang et al, Cell Report Medicine 2024 (YHPTCL)
```{r}
#YHPTCL <- read.delim("TMM_NONE_gene_log2nx_YHPTCL.txt")
#AnnotationChina <- read.delim("AnnotationChina2.txt")

#data organize
YHPTCL_select <- YHPTCL[,4:154]
YHPTCL_select_t <- t(YHPTCL_select)
YHPTCL_select_t_scale <- scale(YHPTCL_select_t)
colnames(YHPTCL_select_t_scale) <- make.unique(YHPTCL$gene_symbol)

#Nebraska genes
#NebraskaGeneSet <- read.delim("Nebraska_LargerGenesets.txt")
NebraskaGeneSetrmHK <- NebraskaGeneSet %>% 
  filter(Category == "Endogenous")
NebraskaGeneSetGenes <- NebraskaGeneSetrmHK$gene_symbol
ALLPTCL <- c(TFHgenes,NOSgenes,ALKposALCLgenes,ALKnegALCLgenes,ENKTLgenes,ATLLgenes)
Targetgenes <- c(TFHgenes,NOSgenes,ALKposALCLgenes,ALKnegALCLgenes)
common_genes <- intersect(YHPTCL$gene_symbol, ALLPTCL)
common_genes <- as.character(unlist(common_genes))
YHPTCL_select_t_scale_t <- t(YHPTCL_select_t_scale)
YHPTCL_subset <- YHPTCL_select_t_scale_t[common_genes, ]

#annotation organize
rownames(AnnotationChina) <- AnnotationChina$SampleID
annotation_df_filtered <- AnnotationChina[colnames(YHPTCL_select), c("Sex", "Disease2")]

sex_levels <- unique(annotation_df_filtered$Sex)
disease_levels <- unique(annotation_df_filtered$Disease2)

annotation_colors <- list(
  Sex = c(male = "#1f78b4", female = "#e31a1c"),
  Disease = c(`anaplastic large cell lymphoma` = "yellow", `angioimmunoblastic T-cell lymphoma` = "blue",
              `peripheral T-cell lymphoma`="orange"))

annotation_colors <- list(
  Sex = c(male = "#1f78b4", female = "#e31a1c"),
  Disease2 = c(`ALKnegALCL` = "yellow", `ALKposALCL` = "lightgreen", TFH = "blue", `PTCLNOS`="orange"))

YHPTCL_Nebraska <- pheatmap(YHPTCL_subset,
         cluster_rows = TRUE,
         cluster_cols = TRUE,
         show_rownames = TRUE,
         show_colnames = TRUE,
         annotation_col = annotation_df_filtered,
         annotation_colors = annotation_colors,
         fontsize = 6,
         main = "Clustering by Nebraska genes",
         color = colorRampPalette(c("blue", "white", "red"))(100),
         breaks = seq(-5, 5, length.out = 101)) 

#PTCLCZECH <- read.delim("WES_TMM_NONE_gene_log2nx.txt")
PTCLCZECH_select <- PTCLCZECH[,grepl("\\.TR",colnames(PTCLCZECH))]
rownames(PTCLCZECH_select) <- make.unique(PTCLCZECH$gene_symbol)
PTCLCZECH_select_t <- t(PTCLCZECH_select)
PTCLCZECH_select_t_scale <- scale(PTCLCZECH_select_t)
PTCLCZECH_select_t_scale_t <- t(PTCLCZECH_select_t_scale)

Clininfo_AF_combined_select_annotation <- Clininfo_AF_combined %>% 
  filter(Cohort %in% c("CZECH biobank","NCT05006664")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(Tumor="PatientID",Disease="Disease",Cohort="Cohort") %>% 
  mutate(Tumor=paste0(Tumor,".TR"))
rownames(Clininfo_AF_combined_select_annotation) <-Clininfo_AF_combined_select_annotation$Tumor
  
check <- intersect(colnames(PTCLCZECH_select),Clininfo_AF_combined_select_annotation$Tumor)
annotation_df_filtered <- Clininfo_AF_combined_select_annotation[check, c("Disease","Cohort")]

```

expr_new_Sex <- YHPTCL %>%

expr_new_Sex2 <- expr_new_Sex[,4:ncol(expr_new_Sex)]
rownames(expr_new_Sex2) <- expr_new_Sex$gene_symbol
expr_new_Sex2_t <- t(expr_new_Sex2)
expr_new_Sex2_t <- as.data.frame(expr_new_Sex2_t)
expr_new_Sex2_t$SampleID <- rownames(expr_new_Sex2_t)
expr_new_Sex2_t_join <- expr_new_Sex2_t %>%

expr_new_Sex2_t_join_filter <- expr_new_Sex2_t_join[!grepl("CTR",expr_new_Sex2_t_join$SampleID),]

expr_new_Sex2_t_join_filter2_mislabeled_as_male <- expr_new_Sex2_t_join_filter2 %>%

OmitSexCheck <- expr_new_Sex2_t_join_filter2_mislabeled$SampleID
