#Check QC RSeQC, within group correlation
```{r}
#QC <- read.delim("TMM_NONE_sample_QC_metrics.txt")
#RSeQC_read.distribution <- read.csv("read_distribution_summary.csv")
#RSEMcount <- read.csv("RSEM_total_counts_per_sample.csv")

RSeQC_read.distribution <- RSeQC_read.distribution %>% 
  mutate(UTR3_5_ratio = X3.UTR_Exons/X5.UTR_Exons) %>% 
  mutate(IntronperExon = Introns/CDS_Exons)

QC_YHPTCLwithingroupCor <- ggplot(QC, aes(x=withinGroupR))+
  geom_density()+
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0.9, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.6)+
  labs(title="Correlation to the other samples",
       x="Correlation coefficient",
       y="Density")

QC_YHPTCLRSEM <- ggplot(RSEMcount, aes(x=Total_Count))+
  geom_density() +
  xlim(1000000,50000000)+
  geom_vline(xintercept = 10000000, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.6)+
  labs(title="Total read count",
       x="Count",
       y="Density")

QC_YHPTCLUTR3_5_ratio <- ggplot(RSeQC_read.distribution, aes(x=UTR3_5_ratio))+
  geom_density()+
  geom_vline(xintercept = 10, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.6)+
  labs(title="Ratio of 3'UTR to 5'UTR",
       x="Ratio",
       y="Density")

QC_YHPTCLIntronExon <- ggplot(RSeQC_read.distribution, aes(x=IntronperExon))+
  geom_density()+
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1.5, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.6)+
  labs(title="Ratio of Intron to Exon",
       x="Ratio",
       y="Density")

IntronHighSample <- RSeQC_read.distribution %>% 
  filter(IntronperExon > 1.5) %>% 
  pull(Sample)

Hi3per5Sample <- RSeQC_read.distribution %>% 
  filter(UTR3_5_ratio > median(UTR3_5_ratio)+2*sd(UTR3_5_ratio)) %>%
  filter(UTR3_5_ratio > 10) %>%
  pull(Sample)

LowRSEMcountSample <- RSEMcount %>% 
  filter(Total_Count < 10000000) %>% 
  pull(Sample)

LowCorr <- QC %>% 
  #filter(withinGroupR < median(withinGroupR)-3*sd(withinGroupR)) %>%
  filter(withinGroupR < 0.95) %>%
  pull(ID)

LowQCtotal <- c(LowCorr,LowRSEMcountSample,Hi3per5Sample,IntronHighSample)
LowQCtotal_unique <- unique(LowQCtotal)
LowCorrChina <- LowCorr[grepl("HRR",LowCorr)]

QCfailure <- unique(c(LowCorrChina,IntronHighSample,Hi3per5Sample,LowRSEMcountSample,OmitSexCheck))

library(VennDiagram)

venn_list <- list(
  IntronHigh = IntronHighSample,
  Hi3per5 = Hi3per5Sample,
  LowRSEM = LowRSEMcountSample,
  LowCorr = LowCorrChina
)

venn.plot <- venn.diagram(
  x = venn_list,
  filename = NULL,
  fill = c("red", "blue", "green", "purple"),
  alpha = 0.5,
  cex = 2,
  fontface = "bold",
  cat.cex = 2
)

grid::grid.newpage()
grid::grid.draw(venn.plot)

```

# Calculate gene-specific weights from the Amador et al. nCounter dataset(GSE225759_series_matrix.txt) by Nebraska JCO rep.Rmd
# and save them as:
# TFHvsNOS_weights.csv # AITLvsNOS_weights.csv # ALKnegvsNOS_weights.csv
# ALKposvsNOS_weights.csv # ATLLvsNOS_weights.csv # ENKTLvsNOS_weights.csv
```{r}
###############################################################################
# Nebraska scoring system
# Output-matched refactored version
###############################################################################

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(tibble)
library(ggplot2)
library(purrr)

###############################################################################
# 0. Read dataset
###############################################################################

#YHPTCL <- read.delim("TPM_NONE_gene_log2nx_YHPTCL2.txt")
#weights_ALKneg <- read.csv("ALKnegvsNOS_weights.csv")
#weights_ALKpos <- read.csv("ALKposvsNOS_weights.csv")
#weights_ATLL <- read.csv("ATLLvsNOS_weights.csv")
#weights_TFH <- read.csv("TFHvsNOS_weights.csv")
#weights_ENKTL <- read.csv("ENKTLvsNOS_weights.csv")

AnnotationChina <- AnnotationChina %>%
  mutate(
    Disease = ifelse(
      Disease == "peripheral T-cell lymphoma", "NOS",
      ifelse(
        Disease == "anaplastic large cell lymphoma", "ALCL",
        ifelse(
          Disease == "angioimmunoblastic T-cell lymphoma", "TFH", "NA"
        )
      )
    )
  )

###############################################################################
# 1. Color settings
###############################################################################

disease2_colors <- c(
  "TFH" = "darkblue",
  "PTCLNOS" = "#ff7f0e",
  "MFLCT" = "darkgreen",
  "Others" = "gray",
  "SS" = "#d62728",
  "ATLL" = "cyan",
  "EATL" = "purple",
  "MEITL" = "#8b008b",
  "ALKnegALCL" = "yellow",
  "ENKTL" = "#e377c2",
  "PCGDTCL" = "black",
  "ALKposALCL" = "lightgreen",
  "PBMC" = "steelblue"
)

lvl <- names(disease2_colors)
desired_order <- c(
  "TFH","PTCLNOS","ALKnegALCL","ALKposALCL",
  "PBMC")

###############################################################################
# 2. Common functions
###############################################################################

make_expr_matrix <- function(raw_df) {
  expr <- raw_df[, 4:ncol(raw_df)]
  rownames(expr) <- make.unique(raw_df$gene_symbol)
  expr
}

calc_score_original_style <- function(expr_mat,
                                      weight_file,
                                      positive_only = FALSE,
                                      use_common = TRUE) {
  
  weights_df0 <- weight_file
  
  if (positive_only) {
    weights_df <- weights_df0 %>% filter(Weight > 0)
  } else {
    weights_df <- weights_df0
  }
  
  gene_set <- as.character(weights_df$Gene)
  w <- weights_df$Weight
  names(w) <- gene_set
  
  if (use_common) {
    genes_use <- intersect(rownames(expr_mat), names(w))
  } else {
    genes_use <- gene_set
  }
  
  x_norm_new <- t(
    scale(
      t(expr_mat[genes_use, , drop = FALSE]),
      center = TRUE,
      scale = TRUE
    )
  )
  
  w_sub <- w[rownames(x_norm_new)]
  
  scores_new <- colSums(
    x_norm_new * w_sub[names(w_sub) %in% rownames(x_norm_new)],
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
  
  scores_new
}

make_china_score_df <- function(scores_new, AnnotationChina, omit_samples = OmitSexCheck) {
  
  enframe(scores_new, name = "SampleID", value = "scores_new") %>%
    mutate(SampleID = as.character(SampleID)) %>%
    left_join(
      AnnotationChina %>% mutate(SampleID = as.character(SampleID)),
      by = "SampleID"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      Disease = case_when(
        grepl("CTR", SampleID, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Healthy cfRNA",
        grepl("GTEX", SampleID, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "PBMC",
        TRUE ~ Disease2
      )
    ) %>%
    filter(!SampleID %in% omit_samples)
}

plot_box_front <- function(df, title_text, palette) {
  
  lvl <- names(palette)
  
  df <- df %>%
    mutate(Disease = factor(Disease, levels = lvl))
  
  ggplot(df, aes(x = Disease, y = scores_new)) +
    geom_jitter(
      width = 0.15,
      height = 0,
      color = "grey35",
      alpha = 0.35,
      size = 0.5,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ) +
    geom_boxplot(
      aes(fill = Disease),
      colour = "grey25",
      outlier.shape = NA,
      alpha = 0.75,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      legend.position = "none"
    ) +
    labs(
      title = title_text,
      x = "Disease",
      y = "Score"
    ) +
    scale_x_discrete(limits = desired_order, drop = TRUE,
                     labels = c("ALKnegALCL" = "ALK(-)ALCL","ALKposALCL" = "ALK(+)ALCL")) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = palette, limits = lvl, drop = FALSE, guide = "none")
}

###############################################################################
# 3. China expression matrix
###############################################################################

YHPTCL2 <- make_expr_matrix(YHPTCL)

###############################################################################
# 4. China: positive & negative weights
# Matched to original:
# TFH: no common filtering
# ALKpos / ALKneg: use common genes
###############################################################################

scores_TFH_posneg <- calc_score_original_style(
  expr_mat = YHPTCL2,
  weight_file = weights_TFH,
  positive_only = FALSE,
  use_common = FALSE
)

scores_ALKpos_posneg <- calc_score_original_style(
  expr_mat = YHPTCL2,
  weight_file = weights_ALKpos,
  positive_only = FALSE,
  use_common = TRUE
)

scores_ALKneg_posneg <- calc_score_original_style(
  expr_mat = YHPTCL2,
  weight_file = weights_ALKneg,
  positive_only = FALSE,
  use_common = TRUE
)

scores_new_df_TFH_posneg <- make_china_score_df(scores_TFH_posneg, AnnotationChina)
scores_new_df_ALKpos_posneg <- make_china_score_df(scores_ALKpos_posneg, AnnotationChina)
scores_new_df_ALKneg_posneg <- make_china_score_df(scores_ALKneg_posneg, AnnotationChina)

Neb_TFH_posneg <- plot_box_front(
  scores_new_df_TFH_posneg,
  "TFH score \n(positive & negative weights)",
  disease2_colors
)

Neb_ALKpos_posneg <- plot_box_front(
  scores_new_df_ALKpos_posneg,
  "ALK(+)ALCL score \n(positive & negative weights)",
  disease2_colors
)

Neb_ALKneg_posneg <- plot_box_front(
  scores_new_df_ALKneg_posneg,
  "ALK(-)ALCL score \n(positive & negative weights)",
  disease2_colors
)

###############################################################################
# 5. China: positive weights only
# Matched to original:
# TFH / ALKpos / ALKneg all use gene_set directly
###############################################################################

scores_TFH_posonly <- calc_score_original_style(
  expr_mat = YHPTCL2,
  weight_file = weights_TFH,
  positive_only = TRUE,
  use_common = FALSE
)

scores_ALKpos_posonly <- calc_score_original_style(
  expr_mat = YHPTCL2,
  weight_file = weights_ALKpos,
  positive_only = TRUE,
  use_common = FALSE
)

scores_ALKneg_posonly <- calc_score_original_style(
  expr_mat = YHPTCL2,
  weight_file = weights_ALKneg,
  positive_only = TRUE,
  use_common = FALSE
)

scores_new_df_TFH <- make_china_score_df(scores_TFH_posonly, AnnotationChina)
scores_new_df_ALKpos <- make_china_score_df(scores_ALKpos_posonly, AnnotationChina)
scores_new_df_ALKneg <- make_china_score_df(scores_ALKneg_posonly, AnnotationChina)

scores_new_df_TFH$TFH_score <- scores_new_df_TFH$scores_new
scores_new_df_ALKpos$ALKpos_score <- scores_new_df_ALKpos$scores_new
scores_new_df_ALKneg$ALKneg_score <- scores_new_df_ALKneg$scores_new

ALKposHigh <- scores_new_df_ALKpos %>%
  filter(scores_new > 15) %>%
  filter(Disease == "ALCL") %>%
  pull(SampleID)

scores_new_df_ALKneg <- scores_new_df_ALKneg %>%
  mutate(
    ALKposHigh = ifelse(SampleID %in% ALKposHigh, "ALKpos", "ALKneg")
  )

AnnotationUpdated <- scores_new_df_ALKneg %>%
  mutate(
    Disease2 = ifelse(
      Disease == "ALCL",
      ifelse(ALKposHigh == "ALKpos", "ALKposALCL", "ALKnegALCL"),
      Disease
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(SampleID, Disease2)

write.csv(AnnotationUpdated, "AnnotationUpdatedChina.csv")

scores_new_df_combined <- scores_new_df_TFH %>%
  left_join(scores_new_df_ALKpos, by = "SampleID") %>%
  left_join(scores_new_df_ALKneg, by = "SampleID") %>%
  dplyr::select(
    "SampleID",
    "Disease",
    "TFH_score",
    "ALKpos_score",
    "ALKneg_score"
  )

###############################################################################
# 6. Filter by Nebraska gene set
###############################################################################

#Subtypeinfo <- read.delim("PTCLmerge6.txt")

Subtypeinfo_w_Nebraska_score <- Subtypeinfo %>%
  left_join(scores_new_df_combined, by = c("ID" = "SampleID"))

TFHmedian_inTFH <- median(
  Subtypeinfo_w_Nebraska_score$TFH_score[
    Subtypeinfo_w_Nebraska_score$group == "TFH"
  ],
  na.rm = TRUE
)

TFHmedian_inNOS <- median(
  Subtypeinfo_w_Nebraska_score$TFH_score[
    Subtypeinfo_w_Nebraska_score$group == "NOS"
  ],
  na.rm = TRUE
)

Subtypeinfo_w_Nebraska_score <- Subtypeinfo_w_Nebraska_score %>%
  mutate(
    TFHhigh = ifelse(TFH_score > TFHmedian_inTFH, "High", "Low"),
    TFHhighinNOS = ifelse(TFH_score > TFHmedian_inNOS, "High", "Low")
  )

Subtypeinfo_w_Nebraska_score_TFHomit <- Subtypeinfo_w_Nebraska_score %>%
  filter(group == "TFH" & TFHhigh == "Low") %>%
  pull(ID)

Subtypeinfo_w_Nebraska_score_NOSomit <- Subtypeinfo_w_Nebraska_score %>%
  filter(group == "NOS" & TFHhighinNOS == "High") %>%
  pull(ID)

Subtypeinfo_w_Nebraska_score_ALCL <- Subtypeinfo_w_Nebraska_score %>%
  filter(Condition %in% c("ALKposALCL", "ALKnegALCL"))

ALKpos_score_median_in_ALCL <- median(
  Subtypeinfo_w_Nebraska_score_ALCL$ALKpos_score,
  na.rm = TRUE
)

Subtypeinfo_w_Nebraska_score <- Subtypeinfo_w_Nebraska_score %>%
  mutate(
    ALKposhigh = ifelse(
      ALKpos_score > ALKpos_score_median_in_ALCL,
      "High",
      "Low"
    )
  )

Subtypeinfo_w_Nebraska_score_ALKposomit <- Subtypeinfo_w_Nebraska_score %>%
  filter(group == "ALKposALCL" & ALKposhigh == "Low") %>%
  pull(ID)

ALKnegmedian_inNOS <- median(
  Subtypeinfo_w_Nebraska_score$ALKneg_score[
    Subtypeinfo_w_Nebraska_score$group == "NOS"
  ],
  na.rm = TRUE
)

Subtypeinfo_w_Nebraska_score <- Subtypeinfo_w_Nebraska_score %>%
  mutate(
    ALKneghigh = ifelse(ALKneg_score > ALKnegmedian_inNOS, "High", "Low")
  )

Subtypeinfo_w_Nebraska_score_ALKnegomit <- Subtypeinfo_w_Nebraska_score %>%
  filter(group == "ALKnegALCL" & ALKposhigh == "High") %>%
  pull(ID)

scores_new_df_combined2 <- scores_new_df_combined %>%
  mutate(
    TFH_NOS_omit = ifelse(
      SampleID %in% c(
        Subtypeinfo_w_Nebraska_score_TFHomit,
        Subtypeinfo_w_Nebraska_score_NOSomit
      ),
      1,
      0
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    ALKpos_omit = ifelse(
      SampleID %in% c(
        Subtypeinfo_w_Nebraska_score_ALKposomit,
        Subtypeinfo_w_Nebraska_score_ALKnegomit
      ),
      1,
      0
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    ALKneg_omit = ifelse(
      SampleID %in% c(Subtypeinfo_w_Nebraska_score_ALKnegomit),
      1,
      0
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!SampleID %in% QCfailure)

scores_new_df_combined2 <- scores_new_df_combined2 %>%
  mutate(
    TFH_NOS_omit = factor(TFH_NOS_omit),
    ALKpos_omit = factor(ALKpos_omit),
    ALKneg_omit = factor(ALKneg_omit)
  )

###############################################################################
# 7. Positive-only plots
###############################################################################

plot_positive_score <- function(df, score_col, omit_col, title_text) {  
  ggplot(
    df %>% mutate(Disease = factor(Disease, levels = desired_order)),
    aes(x = Disease, y = .data[[score_col]])) +
    geom_jitter(
      width = 0.15,
      height = 0,
      alpha = 0.5,
      size = 0.5,
      na.rm = TRUE) +
    geom_boxplot(
      aes(fill = Disease),
      outlier.shape = NA,
      alpha = 0.75,
      colour = "grey25",
      na.rm = TRUE
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(
      values = disease2_colors,
      limits = desired_order,
      drop = TRUE,
      guide = "none"
    ) +
    scale_x_discrete(limits = desired_order, drop = TRUE,
                     labels = c("ALKnegALCL" = "ALK(-)ALCL","ALKposALCL" = "ALK(+)ALCL")) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
    labs(
      title = title_text,
      x = "Disease",
      y = "Score"
    )
}

Neb_TFH_posonly <- plot_positive_score(
  scores_new_df_combined2,
  "TFH_score",
  "TFH_NOS_omit",
  "TFH score \n(only with positive weights)"
)
Fig9A1 <- Neb_TFH_posonly

Neb_ALKpos_posonly <- plot_positive_score(
  scores_new_df_combined2,
  "ALKpos_score",
  "ALKpos_omit",
  "ALK(+)ALCL score \n(only with positive weights)"
)
Fig9A2 <- Neb_ALKpos_posonly

Neb_ALKneg_posonly <- plot_positive_score(
  scores_new_df_combined2,
  "ALKneg_score",
  "ALKneg_omit",
  "ALK(-)ALCL score \n(only with positive weights)"
)
Fig9A3 <- Neb_ALKneg_posonly

###############################################################################
# 8. Omitted samples
###############################################################################

Omitsamples_Lowtumorcontentsuspected <- c(
  Subtypeinfo_w_Nebraska_score_TFHomit,
  Subtypeinfo_w_Nebraska_score_NOSomit,
  Subtypeinfo_w_Nebraska_score_ALKposomit,
  Subtypeinfo_w_Nebraska_score_ALKnegomit
)

Omitsamples_Lowtumorcontentsuspected_unique <-
  unique(Omitsamples_Lowtumorcontentsuspected)

Subtypeinfo_w_Nebraska_score_clean <- Subtypeinfo_w_Nebraska_score %>%
  filter(!ID %in% Omitsamples_Lowtumorcontentsuspected_unique)

write.table(
  Subtypeinfo_w_Nebraska_score_clean,
  "PTCLmerge9.txt",
  sep = "\t"
)

###############################################################################
# 9. CIBERSORTx check
###############################################################################

#PTCL_China_CSX_LM22 <- read.delim("CIBERSORTxGEP_Fractions-Adjusted_LM22_PTCL_China.txt")

PTCL_China_CSX_LM22 <- PTCL_China_CSX_LM22 %>%
  mutate(
    Omitted = ifelse(
      Mixture %in% Omitsamples_Lowtumorcontentsuspected_unique,
      "Omit",
      "Used"
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Tcell =
      T.cells.CD4.naive +
      T.cells.CD4.memory.resting +
      T.cells.CD4.memory.activated +
      T.cells.follicular.helper +
      T.cells.regulatory..Tregs. +
      T.cells.CD8 +
      T.cells.gamma.delta
  )

```

#Check if we can distinguish pathological subtypes by cfDNA-EPICseq
```{r}
###Read dataset
EPICdata <- EPICinferredExp[2:ncol(EPICinferredExp)]
rownames(EPICdata) <- EPICinferredExp$Sample
AnalyzeSample <- setdiff(rownames(EPICdata),Omitcase)
EPICdata <- EPICdata[AnalyzeSample,]
###AnnotationChina
AnnotationEPICdata <- Clininfo_AF_combined %>% 
  dplyr::select(PatientID,Disease)
AnnotationEPICdata2 <- data.frame(
  AF <- BaselinecfDNA_informed$cfDNA25pctMax_AF,
  SampleID <- BaselinecfDNA_informed$Sample
                                  )
colnames(AnnotationEPICdata2) <- c("AF","SampleID")
AnnotationEPICdata2 <- AnnotationEPICdata2 %>% 
  mutate(SampleID2 = SampleID) %>% 
  separate(SampleID2, c("PatientID","TypeTimepoint"),sep="-") %>% 
  filter(AF > 0.5) %>% 
  filter(!TypeTimepoint %in% c("T1","T0","T01","T2","BS1","N1","N01","N02","N03"))
AnnotationEPICdata2 <- AnnotationEPICdata2 %>% 
  left_join(AnnotationEPICdata, by = "PatientID")

#Set sample to analyze and order
AnalyzingSample <- intersect(rownames(EPICdata),AnnotationEPICdata2$SampleID)

EPICdata_selected <- EPICdata[AnalyzingSample,]
#DE log version
EPICdata_selected_delog <- 2^EPICdata_selected
#Scale version
EPICdata_selected_scale <- scale(EPICdata_selected, center=TRUE, scale=TRUE)
AnnotationEPICdata2 <- AnnotationEPICdata2[match(AnalyzingSample, AnnotationEPICdata2$SampleID), ]

stable_use <- intersect(stable_genes, colnames(EPICdata_selected))

geo_mean <- apply(
  EPICdata_selected_delog[, stable_use, drop = FALSE],
  1,
  function(x) exp(mean(log(x + 1e-6), na.rm = TRUE))
)
log2_geo_mean <- log2(geo_mean + 1e-6)
min_geo <- min(log2_geo_mean, na.rm = TRUE)
EPICdata_norm <- sweep(
  log2(EPICdata_selected_delog + 1e-6),
  1,
  log2_geo_mean - min_geo,
  "/"
)

###TFH Score
weights_df0 <- weights_TFH
weights_df <- weights_df0 %>% 
  filter(Weight > 0)
weights_df <- weights_df0 
gene_set <- as.character(weights_df$Gene)
w <- weights_df$Weight
names(w) <- gene_set
expr_new <- EPICdata_selected
#expr_new <- EPICdata_selected_scale
#expr_new <- EPICdata_selected_delog
x_norm_new <- t(expr_new[,gene_set])
scores_new <- colSums(x_norm_new * w[names(w) %in% rownames(x_norm_new)], na.rm=TRUE)
scores_new_df <- as.data.frame(scores_new)
scores_new_df <- scores_new_df %>%
  mutate(SampleID = row.names(.)) %>% 
  left_join(AnnotationEPICdata2, by = "SampleID") %>%
  mutate(Disease = case_when(
    grepl("CTR", SampleID) ~ "Healthy",
    grepl("GTEX", SampleID) ~ "PBMC",
    TRUE ~ Disease
  )) %>% 
  filter(!SampleID %in% OmitSexCheck)

expr_new_plot <- as.data.frame(expr_new)
expr_new_plot <- expr_new_plot %>% 
  mutate(SampleID = rownames(.)) %>% 
  left_join(AnnotationEPICdata2, by = "SampleID")
ggplot(scores_new_df, aes(x=Disease, y=))

plot20001 <- ggplot(scores_new_df, aes(x = Disease, y = scores_new, fill = Disease)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, height = 0, alpha = 0.5, size = 0.5) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.8) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(title = "TFH score", x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = disease4_colors, breaks = names(disease2_colors), drop = FALSE, guide = "none") +
  scale_color_manual(values = disease4_colors, breaks = names(disease2_colors), drop = FALSE, guide = "none") +
```

#Combined Baseline Analysis
```{r}
Age <- Clininfo_AF_combined
Age <- Age %>% 
  dplyr::select(PatientID,Age)

Clininfo_AF_combined2_select <- Clininfo_AF_combined2 %>%
  dplyr::select(Days_EFS,EFS,Disease,CTCpos,TF.in.Germline.combined,TF.in.Germline.mut)
Clininfo_AF_combined2_omitKyushuATLL <- Clininfo_AF_combined2_omitKyushu %>%
  left_join(TableS16, by = "PatientID") %>%
  left_join(Age,by="PatientID") %>% 
  filter(Cohort!="ATLL") %>% 
  mutate(AnnArborStageCorrected = ifelse(CTC=="Positive","IV",AnnArborStage),
         Age60 = ifelse(Age.y>60,"Yes","No"),
         PS2 = PS.1,
         LDHelevation = LDH.elevation,
         BMinvasion = BM.invasion,
         AnnArborStageHigh = ifelse(AnnArborStage %in% c("III","IV"),"Yes","No"))

cox_model_CirculatingTumor <- coxph(
  Surv(time =Clininfo_AF_combined2_omitKyushuATLL$Days_EFS, 
       event = Clininfo_AF_combined2_omitKyushuATLL$EFS) ~ Disease + AnnArborStageCorrected + PS2 + LDHelevation + ExtranodalLesion + CTC + Age60 + AnnArborStage + ctDNA_cfDNAinformed_baseline + clusters_tme,
  data = Clininfo_AF_combined2_omitKyushuATLL)

d <- Clininfo_AF_combined2_omitKyushuATLL %>% 
  mutate(log10ctDNAbaseline = log10(ctDNA_cfDNAinformed_baseline_log))

#limit the sample with full annotation
vars <- c("AnnArborStageCorrected","PS2","LDHelevation","ExtranodalLesion","CTC","Age60","AnnArborStage","AnnArborStageHigh","ctDNA_cfDNAinformed_baseline","clusters_tme","BMinvasion")
d_selected <- d %>% 
  dplyr::select(PatientID,AnnArborStageCorrected,PS2,LDHelevation,ExtranodalLesion,CTC,Age60,AnnArborStage,AnnArborStageHigh,ctDNA_cfDNAinformed_baseline,clusters_tme,BMinvasion,EFS,Days_EFS,Disease,BMinvasion,log10ctDNAbaseline)
d_cc <- d[complete.cases(d[, c("Days_EFS","EFS", vars)]), ]
d_cc <- d_cc %>% 
  filter(!Disease %in% c("ENKTL"))
d_selected <- d_cc %>% 
  dplyr::select(PatientID,AnnArborStageCorrected,PS2,LDHelevation,ExtranodalLesion,CTC,Age60,AnnArborStage,AnnArborStageHigh,ctDNA_cfDNAinformed_baseline,clusters_tme,BMinvasion,EFS,Days_EFS,Disease,BMinvasion,Age.y)
  
fit_full <- coxph(Surv(Days_EFS, EFS) ~ PS2 + LDHelevation + CTC + Age60 + ExtranodalLesion + AnnArborStageHigh + BMinvasion + log10ctDNAbaseline, data = d_cc, ties = "efron")

fit_stage <- coxph(Surv(Days_EFS, EFS) ~ AnnArborStage, data = d_cc, ties = "efron")

# biorientation AIC（backward/forward）
fit_step <- stepAIC(fit_full,
                    direction = "both",
                    trace = TRUE) 

summary(fit_step)
AIC(fit_full); AIC(fit_step)
fit_step$call
cox.zph(fit_step)

library(survival)

d_cc$cox_score <- predict(fit_step, type = "lp")

# 2) set t0
t0 <- 730
base <- survfit(fit_step, newdata = d_cc[1, , drop = FALSE])
# function to get baseline survival
get_S0 <- function(fit, t) {
  sf <- survfit(fit)
  # most nearest time as S0
  idx <- max(which(sf$time <= t))
  if (length(idx) == 0) return(1)
  sf$surv[idx]
}
S0_t0 <- get_S0(fit_step, t0)

# PFS rate at t0
d_cc$S_t0  <- S0_t0 ^ exp(d_cc$cox_score)
d_cc$Risk_t0 <- 1 - d_cc$S_t0

# 3) Low/Int/High）
qs <- quantile(d_cc$cox_score, probs = c(1/3, 2/3), na.rm = TRUE)
d_cc$risk_group <- cut(d_cc$cox_score,
                       breaks = c(-Inf, qs[1], qs[2], Inf),
                       labels = c("Low","Intermediate","High"))

d_cc_select <- d_cc %>% 
  dplyr::select(PatientID,Days_EFS,EFS,ExtranodalLesion,CTC,Age60,cox_score)

# 4) Validation KM
selected_vars <- c("CTC","Age60","ExtranodalLesion")
d_cccc <- d[complete.cases(d[, c("Days_EFS","EFS", selected_vars)]), ]
d_cccc <- d_cccc %>%
  mutate(
    risk_score =
      (CTC == "Positive") * 1 +
      (Age60 == "Yes") * 1 +
      (ExtranodalLesion == "Yes") * 2,
    
    risk_group = case_when(
      risk_score == 0 ~ "Low",
      risk_score %in% c(1,2) ~ "Intermediate",
      risk_score %in% c(3,4) ~ "High",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    risk_group = factor(
      risk_group,
      levels = c("Low", "Intermediate", "High")
    )
  )

table(d_cccc$risk_group)

fit_km <- survfit(Surv(Days_EFS, EFS) ~ risk_group, data = d_cccc)
graphics.off()
pdf("00Fig7B.pdf")
plot(fit_km, col = 1:3, lwd = 2, xlab = "Days", ylab = "EFS")
legend("bottomleft", legend = levels(d_cc$risk_group), col = 1:3, lwd = 2)
dev.off()

d_cc2 <- d_cccc |>
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(risk_group), !is.na(Days_EFS), !is.na(EFS))

pw <- pairwise_survdiff(
  Surv(Days_EFS, EFS) ~ risk_group,
  data = d_cc2,
  p.adjust.method = "BH"
)

Low_vs_Int <- pw$p.value["Intermediate", "Low", drop=FALSE]
High_vs_Int <- pw$p.value["High", "Intermediate", drop=FALSE] 

d2 <- d_cc
vars <- c("PS2","LDHelevation","ExtranodalLesion","CTC","Age60",
          "AnnArborStageHigh","BMinvasion","clusters_tme",
          "log10ctDNAbaseline")
fit_uni_one <- function(var, data) {
  fml <- as.formula(paste0("Surv(Days_EFS, EFS) ~ ", var))
  fit <- coxph(fml, data = data, ties = "efron")
  s   <- summary(fit)
  co  <- as.data.frame(s$coefficients)
  ci  <- as.data.frame(s$conf.int)
  out <- data.frame(
    term_raw = rownames(co),                 
    var      = var,
    HR       = ci$`exp(coef)`,
    lower    = ci$`lower .95`,
    upper    = ci$`upper .95`,
    p        = co$`Pr(>|z|)`,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  out$level <- sub(paste0("^", var), "", out$term_raw)
  out$label <- ifelse(out$level == "", var, paste0(var, ": ", out$level))
  out
}

uni_df <- do.call(rbind, lapply(vars, fit_uni_one, data = d2))

uni_df <- uni_df[order(uni_df$p, abs(log(uni_df$HR)), decreasing = FALSE), ]
uni_df$label <- factor(uni_df$label, levels = rev(uni_df$label))

s_mv <- summary(fit_step)
co2  <- as.data.frame(s_mv$coefficients)
ci2  <- as.data.frame(s_mv$conf.int)

uni_df_sorted <- uni_df %>%
  arrange(var, p)
uni_df_sorted_selected <- uni_df_sorted %>% 
  dplyr::select(term_raw,HR,lower,upper,p)

mv_df <- data.frame(
  term_raw = rownames(co2),
  HR       = ci2$`exp(coef)`,
  lower    = ci2$`lower .95`,
  upper    = ci2$`upper .95`,
  p        = co2$`Pr(>|z|)`,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
mv_df_selected <- mv_df %>% 
  dplyr::select(term_raw,HR,lower,upper,p)

selected_vars <- c("ExtranodalLesion","CTC","Age60")

uni_df_sorted_selected$label <- uni_df_sorted_selected$term_raw
mv_df_selected$label <- mv_df_selected$term_raw
mv_df$label <- mv_df$term_raw

mv_df$label <- factor(mv_df$label, levels = rev(mv_df$label))

forest_plot <- function(df, title){
  ggplot(df, aes(y = label, x = HR)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") +
    geom_pointrange(aes(xmin = lower, xmax = upper), size = 0.4) +
    scale_x_log10(
      breaks = c(0.25, 0.5, 1, 2, 4, 8),
      limits = c(min(0.25, min(df$lower, na.rm=TRUE)*0.9),
                 max(8, max(df$upper, na.rm=TRUE)*1.1))
    ) +
    labs(x = "Hazard Ratio (log scale)", y = NULL, title = title) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0, face = "bold"),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9)
    )
}

p_uni <- forest_plot(uni_df_sorted, "Univariable Cox (all candidate factors)")
p_mv  <- forest_plot(mv_df,  "Multivariable Cox after AIC selection")

blank <- grid.rect(gp=gpar(col=NA))  # スペーサ
graphics.off()
pdf("forest_combined.pdf", width = 7, height = 10)
grid.arrange(p_uni, blank, p_mv, heights = c(0.62, 0.06, 0.32))
dev.off()

combined_df <- rbind(uni_df_sorted_selected,mv_df_selected)

plothead <- cbind(combined_df$label, format(combined_df$p, digits = 2))
xticks <- log(c(0.05, 0.4, 0.1, 1, 2, 10, 20))
Plotcombinedforest <- forestplot(labeltext = plothead,
           graphwidth = unit(50, 'mm'),
           colgap = unit(2, 'mm'),
           mean = combined_df$HR,
           lower = combined_df$lower,
           upper = combined_df$upper,
           clip=c(0.05, 0.4, 0.1, 1, 2, 10, 20),
           xlog=TRUE, 
           col=fpColors(box="royalblue",line="darkblue", summary="royalblue"),
           grid = c(0.05, 0.4, 0.1, 1, 2, 10, 20),
           xticks = c(0.05, 0.4, 0.1, 1, 2, 10, 20),
           title = "All baseline info",
           txt_gp = fpTxtGp(
             xlab = gpar(fontsize = 8),  # x軸ラベルフォントサイズ
             label = gpar(fontsize = 8), # 項目ラベルのサイズ（任意）
             ticks = gpar(fontsize = 8)))

graphics.off()
pdf("00Fig7A.pdf")
Plotcombinedforest
dev.off()

anova(fit_step)  # Likelihood ratio test
cox.zph(fit_step)$global  # Schoenfeld PH test
AIC(fit_full)
AIC(fit_step)
summary(fit_step)
```

#Merge all EOT analysis
```{r}
library(magick)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)
library(grid)

# ============================================================
# 1. Prepare data
# ============================================================

plot_df_combo_EOT <- plot_df_combo_EOT %>%
  mutate(SampleID2 = SampleID) %>%
  separate(SampleID2, c("PatientID", "TypeTimepoint"), remove = FALSE)

Clininfo_AF_combined_WashUMaster_EOT_TIandTN_EPIC <-
  Clininfo_AF_combined_WashUMaster_EOT_TIandTN %>%
  left_join(plot_df_combo_EOT, by = "PatientID") %>%
  mutate(Lasso_EOT = LASSO_STS_positivity)

Clininfo_AF_combined_WashUMaster_EOT_TIandTN_EPIC_select <-
  Clininfo_AF_combined_WashUMaster_EOT_TIandTN_EPIC %>%
  dplyr::select(
    PatientID,
    cfDNAinformed_mutMRD,
    TN_MRD_TCR,
    MRD_TCR,
    Lasso_EOT
  )

Clininfo_AF_combined_forheatmap3 <-
  Clininfo_AF_combined2_omitKyushu %>%
  left_join(
    Clininfo_AF_combined_WashUMaster_EOT_TIandTN_EPIC_select,
    by = "PatientID"
  ) %>%
  filter(Disease %in% c("PTCLNOS","TFH","ALKnegALCL","ALKposALCL")) %>% 
  filter(Cohort == "NCT03297697") %>%
  filter(!(EFS == 0 & Days_EFS < 730)) %>%
  filter(EOT.Sample != "")

heatmap_data3 <- Clininfo_AF_combined_forheatmap3 %>%
  dplyr::select(
    PatientID, Disease, IPI, AnnArborStage,
    Paired_with_Tumor,
    CTC, EFS, Days_EFS,
    Baseline_ctDNA,
    cfDNAinformed_mutMRD,
    PETCT_EOT,
    ctDNA_cfDNAinformed_EOT,
    TN_MRD_TCR,
    ctDNA_Tumorinformed_EOT,
    MRD_TCR,
    Lasso_EOT
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    OutcomeGroup = ifelse(EFS == 1, "Relapse", "PFS > 2 years"),
    OutcomeGroup = factor(OutcomeGroup, levels = c("Relapse", "PFS > 2 years"))
  ) %>%
  arrange(OutcomeGroup, Days_EFS)

rownames(heatmap_data3) <- heatmap_data3$PatientID


# ============================================================
# 2. Binary status
# ============================================================

PETCT_EOT_bin <- ifelse(
  is.na(heatmap_data3$PETCT_EOT),
  NA,
  ifelse(heatmap_data3$PETCT_EOT == "CR", "Negative", "Positive")
)

TN_Mut_EOT_bin <- ifelse(
  is.na(heatmap_data3$cfDNAinformed_mutMRD),
  NA,
  ifelse(heatmap_data3$cfDNAinformed_mutMRD == "cMRDpos", "Positive", "Negative")
)

TN_TCR_EOT_bin <- ifelse(
  is.na(heatmap_data3$TN_MRD_TCR),
  NA,
  ifelse(heatmap_data3$TN_MRD_TCR == "MRDpos", "Positive", "Negative")
)

EPICSeq_EOT_bin <- ifelse(
  is.na(heatmap_data3$Lasso_EOT),
  NA,
  heatmap_data3$Lasso_EOT
)

TI_Mut_EOT_bin <- ifelse(
  heatmap_data3$Paired_with_Tumor == "NO",
  "Tumor not available",
  ifelse(
    is.na(heatmap_data3$ctDNA_Tumorinformed_EOT),
    NA,
    ifelse(heatmap_data3$ctDNA_Tumorinformed_EOT > 0, "Positive", "Negative")
  )
)

TI_TCR_EOT_bin <- ifelse(
  heatmap_data3$Paired_with_Tumor == "NO",
  "Tumor not available",
  ifelse(
    is.na(heatmap_data3$MRD_TCR),
    NA,
    ifelse(heatmap_data3$MRD_TCR == "MRDpos", "Positive", "Negative")
  )
)


# ============================================================
# 3. Combo calls
# ============================================================
heatmap_data3 <- heatmap_data3 %>%
  mutate(
    TN.Combo.EOT = case_when(
      # 1) Negative cfTCR MRD is classified as integrated negative
      TN_MRD_TCR == "MRDneg" ~ "Negative",
      
      # 2) Positive cfTCR MRD is classified as integrated positive if either
      # mutation MRD or the elastic-net score is positive
      TN_MRD_TCR == "MRDpos" &
        (cfDNAinformed_mutMRD == "cMRDpos" | Lasso_EOT == "Positive") ~ "Positive",
      
      # 3) Positive cfTCR MRD is also classified as integrated positive when
      # one of the other assays is unavailable and the remaining assay is negative
      TN_MRD_TCR == "MRDpos" &
        (
          (is.na(cfDNAinformed_mutMRD) & Lasso_EOT == "Negative") |
          (cfDNAinformed_mutMRD == "cMRDneg" & is.na(Lasso_EOT))
        ) ~ "Positive",
      
      # 4) Positive cfTCR MRD is classified as integrated negative only when
      # both mutation MRD and the elastic-net score are negative
      TN_MRD_TCR == "MRDpos" &
        cfDNAinformed_mutMRD == "cMRDneg" &
        Lasso_EOT == "Negative" ~ "Negative",
      
      # 5) If cfTCR MRD is unavailable, concordant mutation MRD and elastic-net
      # results determine the integrated classification
      is.na(TN_MRD_TCR) &
        cfDNAinformed_mutMRD == "cMRDpos" &
        Lasso_EOT == "Positive" ~ "Positive",
      
      is.na(TN_MRD_TCR) &
        cfDNAinformed_mutMRD == "cMRDneg" &
        Lasso_EOT == "Negative" ~ "Negative",
      
      # 6) If cfTCR MRD is unavailable and mutation MRD and elastic-net
      # results are discordant, the integrated classification is indeterminate
      is.na(TN_MRD_TCR) &
        cfDNAinformed_mutMRD == "cMRDpos" &
        Lasso_EOT == "Negative" ~ NA_character_,
      
      is.na(TN_MRD_TCR) &
        cfDNAinformed_mutMRD == "cMRDneg" &
        Lasso_EOT == "Positive" ~ NA_character_,
      
      # 7) If cfTCR MRD is unavailable and only one of the remaining assays
      # is available, the available result is used
      is.na(TN_MRD_TCR) &
        cfDNAinformed_mutMRD == "cMRDpos" &
        is.na(Lasso_EOT) ~ "Positive",
      
      is.na(TN_MRD_TCR) &
        cfDNAinformed_mutMRD == "cMRDneg" &
        is.na(Lasso_EOT) ~ "Negative",
      
      is.na(TN_MRD_TCR) &
        is.na(cfDNAinformed_mutMRD) &
        Lasso_EOT == "Positive" ~ "Positive",
      
      is.na(TN_MRD_TCR) &
        is.na(cfDNAinformed_mutMRD) &
        Lasso_EOT == "Negative" ~ "Negative",
      
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )
heatmap_data3 <- heatmap_data3 %>%
  mutate(
    TI.Combo.EOT = case_when(
      Paired_with_Tumor == "NO" ~ "Tumor not available",

      ctDNA_Tumorinformed_EOT > 0 |
        MRD_TCR == "MRDpos" |
        Lasso_EOT == "Positive" ~ "Positive",

      ctDNA_Tumorinformed_EOT == 0 |
        MRD_TCR == "MRDneg" |
        Lasso_EOT == "Negative" ~ "Negative",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

All_Available_Info_bin <- case_when(

  TI_Mut_EOT_bin == "Positive" &
    TI_TCR_EOT_bin == "Positive" ~ "Positive",

  TI_Mut_EOT_bin == "Negative" &
    TI_TCR_EOT_bin == "Negative" ~ "Negative",

  (is.na(TI_Mut_EOT_bin) | TI_Mut_EOT_bin == "Tumor not available") &
    (is.na(TI_TCR_EOT_bin) | TI_TCR_EOT_bin == "Tumor not available") ~
      heatmap_data3$TN.Combo.EOT,

  !(is.na(TI_Mut_EOT_bin) | TI_Mut_EOT_bin == "Tumor not available") &
    (is.na(TI_TCR_EOT_bin) | TI_TCR_EOT_bin == "Tumor not available") ~
      TI_Mut_EOT_bin,

  (is.na(TI_Mut_EOT_bin) | TI_Mut_EOT_bin == "Tumor not available") &
    !(is.na(TI_TCR_EOT_bin) | TI_TCR_EOT_bin == "Tumor not available") ~
      TI_TCR_EOT_bin,

  TI_Mut_EOT_bin != TI_TCR_EOT_bin ~
      heatmap_data3$TN.Combo.EOT,

  TRUE ~ NA_character_
)

# ============================================================
# 4. Heatmap matrix
# ============================================================

mat_cat <- data.frame(
  `PET-CT` = PETCT_EOT_bin,
  `Mutation` = TN_Mut_EOT_bin,
  `TCR` = TN_TCR_EOT_bin,
  `Epigenetic` = EPICSeq_EOT_bin,
  `Tumor Naive Combo` = heatmap_data3$TN.Combo.EOT,
  `Mutation ` = TI_Mut_EOT_bin,
  `TCR ` = TI_TCR_EOT_bin,
  `All Available Info` = All_Available_Info_bin,
  row.names = heatmap_data3$PatientID,
  check.names = FALSE
)

mat_cat_mt_t <- t(as.matrix(mat_cat))

row_split <- factor(
  c(
    rep("Tissue Biopsy\nNaive", 5),
    rep("Tissue Biopsy\nInformed", 2),
    rep("Combo")
  ),
  levels = c(
    "Tissue Biopsy\nNaive",
    "Tissue Biopsy\nInformed",
    "Combo"
  )
)


# ============================================================
# 5. Colors
# ============================================================

cat_col <- c(
  "Markers were not defined" = "gray90",
  "Tumor not available" = "gray40",
  "Positive" = "red",
  "Negative" = "blue",
  "Discordant (2 positive)" = "#ff3333",
  "Discordant (1 positive)" = "#ff9999"
)

ipi_col <- c(
  "Low" = "#1e50a2",
  "Low int" = "lightblue",
  "High int" = "lightcoral",
  "High" = "#c53d43"
)

stage_col <- c(
  "I" = "#1e50a2",
  "II" = "lightblue",
  "III" = "lightcoral",
  "IV" = "#c53d43"
)

CTC_col <- c(
  "Negative" = "#1e50a2",
  "Positive" = "#c53d43"
)

basectdna_col <- c(
  "Low" = "#1e50a2",
  "High" = "#c53d43"
)

metric_cols <- c(
  Sensitivity = "#000080",
  Specificity = "#66cdaa",
  PPV = "#ffd700",
  NPV = "#db7093"
)


# ============================================================
# 6. Top annotation
# ============================================================

days_vals <- heatmap_data3$Days_EFS
days_vals[is.na(days_vals)] <- 0

top_ha <- HeatmapAnnotation(
  `Time (Days)` = anno_barplot(
    days_vals,
    gp = gpar(fill = "grey40", col = "black"),
    border = FALSE,
    height = unit(1.2, "cm"),
    axis_param = list(
      side = "left",
      gp = gpar(fontsize = 8)
    )
  ),
  Disease = heatmap_data3$Disease,
  IPI = heatmap_data3$IPI,
  AnnArborStage = heatmap_data3$AnnArborStage,
  CTC = heatmap_data3$CTC,
  Baseline_ctDNA = heatmap_data3$Baseline_ctDNA,
  col = list(
    Disease = disease2_colors,
    IPI = ipi_col,
    AnnArborStage = stage_col,
    CTC = CTC_col,
    Baseline_ctDNA = basectdna_col
  ),
  annotation_name_side = "right",
  annotation_name_gp = gpar(fontsize = 6, fontface = "bold"),
  annotation_legend_param = list(
    title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 6, fontface = "bold"),
    labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 6),
    grid_height = unit(2.5, "mm"),
    grid_width  = unit(2.5, "mm")
  )
)


# ============================================================
# 7. Metrics calculation
# ============================================================

pred_df <- mat_cat %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), ~ ifelse(.x %in% c("Positive", "Negative"), .x, NA)))

truth_vec <- ifelse(
  heatmap_data3$EFS == 1,
  "Positive",
  ifelse(heatmap_data3$EFS == 0, "Negative", NA)
)

calc_metrics <- function(pred, truth) {
  ok <- !is.na(pred) & !is.na(truth)

  p <- pred[ok]
  t <- truth[ok]

  TP <- sum(p == "Positive" & t == "Positive")
  TN <- sum(p == "Negative" & t == "Negative")
  FP <- sum(p == "Positive" & t == "Negative")
  FN <- sum(p == "Negative" & t == "Positive")

  c(
    Sensitivity = ifelse(TP + FN > 0, TP / (TP + FN), NA),
    Specificity = ifelse(TN + FP > 0, TN / (TN + FP), NA),
    PPV = ifelse(TP + FP > 0, TP / (TP + FP), NA),
    NPV = ifelse(TN + FN > 0, TN / (TN + FN), NA)
  )
}

metrics_df <- do.call(
  rbind,
  lapply(colnames(pred_df), function(x) calc_metrics(pred_df[[x]], truth_vec))
)

rownames(metrics_df) <- colnames(pred_df)
metrics_mat <- as.matrix(metrics_df[rownames(mat_cat_mt_t), ])


# ============================================================
# 8. Right metrics bar annotation
# ============================================================

af_metrics_hbar <- AnnotationFunction(
  which = "row",
  n = nrow(metrics_mat),
  width = unit(2.0, "cm"),
  fun = function(index) {

    n_slice <- length(index)
    h_row <- 1 / n_slice
    y_center <- (n_slice - seq_len(n_slice) + 0.5) / n_slice

    sub_y <- c(0.30, 0.10, -0.10, -0.30) * h_row
    sub_h <- 0.13 * h_row

    left_margin <- 0.05
    scale_w <- 0.90
    ticks <- seq(0, 1, 0.25)

    for (ii in seq_len(n_slice)) {
      vals <- metrics_mat[index[ii], ]

      for (k in seq_along(vals)) {
        yk <- y_center[ii] + sub_y[k]
        val <- vals[k]

        for (tk in ticks) {
          xk <- left_margin + scale_w * tk
          grid.lines(
            x = unit(c(xk, xk), "npc"),
            y = unit(c(yk - sub_h / 2, yk - sub_h / 2 - 0.01), "npc"),
            gp = gpar(col = "#00000060", lwd = 0.5)
          )
        }

        if (!is.na(val)) {
          grid.rect(
            x = unit(left_margin + scale_w * val / 2, "npc"),
            y = unit(yk, "npc"),
            width = unit(scale_w * val, "npc"),
            height = unit(sub_h, "npc"),
            gp = gpar(fill = metric_cols[k], col = NA)
          )
        }
      }

      for (tk in ticks) {
        xk <- left_margin + scale_w * tk
        grid.text(
          label = tk,
          x = unit(xk, "npc"),
          y = unit(y_center[ii] - 0.48 * h_row, "npc"),
          gp = gpar(fontsize = 6, col = "gray40")
        )
      }
    }
  }
)

row_ha_metrics <- rowAnnotation(
  Metrics = af_metrics_hbar,
  annotation_name_side = "top",
  annotation_name_rot = 90,
  annotation_name_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold")
)


# ============================================================
# 9. Legends
# ============================================================

lg_metrics <- Legend(
  title = "Metrics",
  labels = c("Sensitivity", "Specificity", "PPV", "NPV"),
  legend_gp = gpar(fill = metric_cols),
  title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 6, fontface = "bold"),
  labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 6),
  grid_height = unit(2.5, "mm"),
  grid_width  = unit(2.5, "mm")
)


# ============================================================
# 10. Draw heatmap
# ============================================================

ht_main <- Heatmap(
  mat_cat_mt_t,
  name = "status",
  col = cat_col,
  na_col = "gray90",
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  column_split = heatmap_data3$OutcomeGroup,
  column_gap = unit(2, "mm"),
  row_split = row_split,
  row_title_gp = gpar(
    fontsize = 8,
    ontface = "bold"
  ),
  row_gap = unit(c(1, 2), "mm"),
  top_annotation = top_ha,
  right_annotation = row_ha_metrics,
  show_row_names = TRUE,
  show_column_names = FALSE,
  row_names_side = "right",
  row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8),
  #column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 9),
  #column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 12),
  heatmap_legend_param = list(
    title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 6, fontface = "bold"),
    labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 6),
    grid_height = unit(2.5, "mm"),
    grid_width  = unit(2.5, "mm")
  ),
  rect_gp = gpar(col = NA)
)

graphics.off()

pdf("Figure_EOT_heatmap_revised.pdf", width = 11, height = 7)

draw(
  ht_main,
  heatmap_legend_side = "right",
  annotation_legend_side = "right",
  heatmap_legend_list = list(lg_metrics),
  merge_legends = FALSE
)

footnote <- grid.text(
  "*All Available Info = 1. Tissue Biopsy Informed Mutation > 2. Tumor Naive Combo",
  x = unit(0.08, "npc"),
  y = unit(0.03, "npc"),
  just = "left",
  gp = gpar(fontsize = 10)
)

dev.off()

PlotHeatmap <- grid.grabExpr({
  draw(
    ht_main,
    heatmap_legend_side = "right",
    annotation_legend_side = "right",
    heatmap_legend_list = list(lg_metrics),
    merge_legends = FALSE
  )}, wrap = TRUE)

```

#00Figure6
```{r}
grab_plot  <- function(p) wrap_one(grid::grid.grabExpr(print(p)))
grab_table <- function(t) wrap_one(grid::grid.grabExpr(print(t)))
grab_draw  <- function(expr) wrap_one(grid::grid.grabExpr(expr))

sync_widths <- function(gt1, gt2){
  if (!is.null(gt1$widths) && !is.null(gt2$widths)) {
    mw <- grid::unit.pmax(gt1$widths, gt2$widths)
    gt1$widths <- mw; gt2$widths <- mw
  }
  list(a = gt1, b = gt2)
}

HEADER <- ggplot() + theme_void()
HEADERFig6 <- arrangeGrob(ggplotGrob(HEADER), 
                     top = textGrob("Figure 6", x = unit(0, "npc"), just = "left",
                                    gp = gpar(fontface = "bold", fontsize = 12)))
HEADER6 <- arrangeGrob(HEADERFig6, ncol = 1, widths = c(3))

Figure4Blank <- ggplot() + theme_void()

grob_EPICHeatmap <- grid.grabExpr(draw(Fig6A))
grob6A <- arrangeGrob(grob_EPICHeatmap,top = textGrob("A", x = unit(0, "npc"), just = "left",gp = gpar(fontface = "bold", fontsize = 12)))

Fig6B$plot <- Fig6B$plot + theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.5))
gt_plot_6B  <- ggplotGrob(ggplotify::as.ggplot(~ print(Fig6B$plot)))
gt_table_6B <- ggplotGrob(ggplotify::as.ggplot(~ print(Fig6B$table)))
sw <- sync_widths(gt_plot_6B, gt_table_6B)
grob6B <- arrangeGrob(
  arrangeGrob(sw$a,
              top = textGrob("B", x = unit(0, "npc"), just = "left",
                             gp = gpar(fontface = "bold", fontsize = 12))),
  sw$b, heights = c(4, 1), ncol = 1
)

grob6C <- arrangeGrob(ggplotGrob(Fig6C),top = textGrob("C", x = unit(0, "npc"), just = "left",gp = gpar(fontface = "bold", fontsize = 12)))

Fig6D$plot <- Fig6D$plot + theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.5))
gt_plot_6D  <- ggplotGrob(ggplotify::as.ggplot(~ print(Fig6D$plot)))
gt_table_6D <- ggplotGrob(ggplotify::as.ggplot(~ print(Fig6D$table)))
sw <- sync_widths(gt_plot_6D, gt_table_6D)
grob6D <- arrangeGrob(
  arrangeGrob(sw$a,
              top = textGrob("D", x = unit(0, "npc"), just = "left",
                             gp = gpar(fontface = "bold", fontsize = 12))),
  sw$b, heights = c(4, 1), ncol = 1
)


top_row6 <- arrangeGrob(grobBlank, grob6A, grobBlank, grob6B, grobBlank, ncol = 5, widths = c(0.1,1.6,0.1,1,0.1))
bottom_row6 <- arrangeGrob(grobBlank, grob6C, grobBlank, grob6D, grobBlank, ncol = 5, widths = c(0.1,2.4,0.1,1.4,0.1))

graphics.off()
pdf("00Figure6New.pdf", width = 8.5, height = 9)
grid.arrange(HEADERFig6, top_row6, bottom_row6, ncol = 1, heights=c(0.1,1,1))
dev.off()
```

```{r}
HEADER <- ggplot() + theme_void()
```

#00Figure7
```{r}
HEADER <- ggplot() + theme_void()
HEADERFigX <- arrangeGrob(ggplotGrob(HEADER),
                          top = textGrob("Figure 7", x = unit(0, "npc"), just = "left",gp = gpar(fontface = "bold", fontsize = 12)))
Figure1Blank <- ggplot() + theme_void()
grobBlank <- arrangeGrob(ggplotGrob(Figure1Blank))

combined_df_uni <- combined_df[1:10,]
combined_df_mv <- combined_df[11:nrow(combined_df),]
combined_df_blank <- data.frame(
  term_raw = " ",
  HR = NA,
  lower = NA,
  upper = NA,
  p = NA,
  label = NA
)

combined_df_new <- rbind(combined_df_blank,combined_df_uni,combined_df_blank,combined_df_blank,combined_df_mv)
combined_df_new$label2 <- c("Univariate Analysis",
                            "Age >60 (vs. ≤60)",
                            "AnnArborStage III/IV (vs. I/II)",
                            "BM invasion YES (vs. NO)",
                            "CTC Positive (vs. Negative)",
                            "Extranodal ≥ 2 (vs. 1 or 0)",
                            #"Epigenetic Tumor Score",
                            "LDH Elevation",
                            "PS ≥ 2 (vs. 0 or 1)",
                            "TME Cold Tumor (vs. Tumor Low)",
                            "TME Hot Tumor (vs. Tumor Low)",
                            "Baseline ctDNA (hGE/ml plasma, log[10])",
                            "",
                            "Multivariate Analysis",
                            "CTC Positive (vs. Negative)",
                            "Age >60 (vs. ≤60)",
                            "Extranodal ≥ 2 (vs. 1 or 0)")

plothead <- cbind(combined_df_new$label2, format(combined_df_new$p, digits = 2))
xticks <- log(c(0.02, 0.1, 0.5, 1, 2, 10, 50))
forestplot(labeltext = plothead,
           graphwidth = unit(35, 'mm'),
           colgap = unit(3, 'mm'),
           rowgap = unit(20, 'mm'),
           mean = combined_df_new$HR,
           lower = combined_df_new$lower,
           upper = combined_df_new$upper,
           clip=c(0.02, 0.1, 0.5, 1, 2, 10, 50),
           xlog=TRUE, 
           col=fpColors(box="royalblue",line="darkblue", summary="royalblue"),
           grid   = c(0.02, 0.1, 0.5, 1, 2, 10, 50),
           zero = 1,
           xticks = c(0.02, 0.1, 0.5, 1, 2, 10, 50),
           title = "All baseline info",
           txt_gp = fpTxtGp(
             title = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "plain",cex = 1.0),
             xlab = gpar(fontsize = 8,cex = 1.0),
             label = gpar(fontsize = 8,cex = 1.0),
             ticks = gpar(fontsize = 8,cex = 1.0)),
           xlab = "EFS Hazard Ratio")

grid.force()
PlotForest <- grid.grab()

grobXB <- arrangeGrob(
  PlotForest,
  top = textGrob("A", x = unit(0, "npc"), just = "left", 
                 gp = gpar(fontface = "bold", fontsize = 12))
)

d_cc2 <- d_cccc %>%
  filter(!is.na(risk_group), !is.na(Days_EFS), !is.na(EFS))

# KM fit
fit_km <- survfit(Surv(Days_EFS, EFS) ~ risk_group, data = d_cc2)

# pairwise log-rank
pw <- pairwise_survdiff(
  Surv(Days_EFS, EFS) ~ risk_group,
  data = d_cc2,
  p.adjust.method = "BH"
)

get_pw_p <- function(pmat, g1, g2) {
  if (g1 %in% rownames(pmat) && g2 %in% colnames(pmat)) {
    return(pmat[g1, g2])
  } else if (g2 %in% rownames(pmat) && g1 %in% colnames(pmat)) {
    return(pmat[g2, g1])
  } else {
    return(NA_real_)
  }
}

Low_vs_Int  <- get_pw_p(pw$p.value, "Low", "Intermediate")
High_vs_Int <- get_pw_p(pw$p.value, "High", "Intermediate")

# palette
pal_all <- c("#5B9BD5", "#A5A5A5", "#FFA500", "#70AD47", "#ED7D31")
n_grp   <- nlevels(d_cc2$risk_group)
pal_use <- pal_all[seq_len(n_grp)]

# p値format
p_fmt <- function(p, digits = 3) {
  if (length(p) == 0 || is.na(p)) return("NA")
  if (p < 1e-3) sprintf("%.1e", p) else formatC(p, format = "f", digits = digits)
}

lab_text <- paste0(
  "Pairwise log-rank P (BH)\n",
  "Low vs Intermediate = ", p_fmt(Low_vs_Int, 3), "\n",
  "Intermediate vs High = ", p_fmt(High_vs_Int, 3)
)

# KM plot
Plot_km <- ggsurvplot(
  fit_km,
  data = d_cc2,
  palette = pal_use,
  pval = TRUE,
  conf.int = FALSE,
  risk.table = TRUE,
  xlab = "Time (years)",
  ylab = "EFS (%)",
  fun = function(y) y * 100,
  xscale = "d_y",
  break.time.by = 365,
  xlim = c(0, 5 * 365),
  risk.table.y.text = FALSE,
  ggtheme = theme_bw(base_size = 10),
  tables.theme = theme_classic(base_size = 8),
  tables.col = "black",
  risk.table.col = "strata",
  pval.size = 3,
  fontsize = 2.5,
  font.risk.table = c(10, "plain"),
  legend = "top",
  legend.title = "Risk group",
  legend.labs = levels(d_cc2$risk_group),
  risk.table.legend = FALSE
)

x_pos <- 3.5 * 365
y_pos <- 30

Plot_km$plot <- Plot_km$plot +
  labs(title = "Event-Free Survival by Risk Group") +
  theme(
    legend.position   = "top",
    legend.box        = "vertical",
    legend.key.height = unit(0.3, "lines"),
    legend.spacing.y  = unit(0.1, "lines"),
    legend.text       = element_text(lineheight = 0.9, size = 8),
    legend.title      = element_text(size = 8),
    plot.title        = element_text(size = 10, hjust = 0.5)
  ) +
  annotate(
    "label",
    x = x_pos, y = y_pos,
    label = lab_text,
    hjust = 0.5, vjust = 1,
    size = 2.5,
    label.size = 0.2
  )

Plot_km$table <- Plot_km$table +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.title      = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.title.y    = element_blank(),
    axis.line.y     = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y    = element_blank(),
    panel.grid      = element_blank(),
    panel.border    = element_blank()
  )

plot_grob_km       <- ggplotGrob(Plot_km$plot)
risk_table_grob_km <- ggplotGrob(Plot_km$table)

grobXC <- arrangeGrob(
  arrangeGrob(
    plot_grob_km,
    top = textGrob(
      "B",
      x = unit(0, "npc"),
      just = "left",
      gp = gpar(fontface = "bold", fontsize = 12)
    )
  ),
  risk_table_grob_km,
  heights = c(4, 1),
  ncol = 1
)

grob7C <- arrangeGrob(
  PlotHeatmap,
  ncol = 1,
  top = textGrob(
    "C",
    x = unit(0, "npc"),
    just = "left",
    gp = gpar(fontface = "bold", fontsize = 12)
  )
)

top_rowWFigX <- arrangeGrob(grobBlank, grobXB, grobBlank, grobXC, grobBlank, ncol = 5, widths = c(0.1,3.5,0.1,2.5,0.1))
second_rowWFigX <- arrangeGrob(grobBlank, grob7C, grobBlank, ncol = 3, widths = c(0.1,8.5,0.1))

pdf("00Figure7New.pdf", width = 8.5, height = 10)
grid.arrange(grobBlank,HEADERFigX,grobBlank,top_rowWFigX,second_rowWFigX, ncol = 1, heights=c(0.1,0.1,0.1,4,5))
dev.off()

```
